text: Todos os produtos vendidos em ervanárias, cujos efeitos são medicamente comprovados, e que não contenham qualquer manipulação orgânica na sua composição – para além das características naturais do produto – deverão ter uma Classificação Portuguesa de Actividades Económicas (CAE) específica e beneficiarem fiscalmente tanto a pessoa que prefere o seu uso e compra, como das ervanárias que as vendem.
translation_a: All products sold in herbalists, whose effects are medically proven, and which do not contain any organic manipulation in their composition - apart from the natural characteristics of the product - should have a specific Portuguese Classification of Economic Activities (CAE) and benefit fiscally both the person who prefers their use and purchase, and the herbalists who sell them.
translation_b: All products sold in herbaries, whose effects are medically proven, and which do not contain any organic manipulation in their composition – in addition to the natural characteristics of the product – should have a specific Portuguese Classification of Economic Activities (CAE) and benefit taxally both the person who prefers their use and purchase, as well as the herbaries that sell them.

text: Statul va interveni doar pentru corectarea prin reglementare și supraveghere a pieței, atunci când funcționarea liberă a acesteia produce efecte contrare intereselor cetățenilor (în cazul monopolurilor de orice fel, și a manifestării unor abuzuri ale operatorilor cu poziții dominante pe piață; pentru protejarea depunătorilor, investitorilor și asiguraților de pe piața financiară; pentru soluționarea, prin metode și instrumente economice, a ineficienței din sectoarele aflate în proprietatea și administrarea statului).

text: Chceme zvýšit spotřebitelskou finanční gramotnost, abychom předešli zadlužení ze spotřebitelských úvěrů a dalších finančních produktů u řady občanů.
translation_a: We want to increase consumer financial literacy to prevent many citizens from falling into debt from consumer credit and other financial products.
translation_b: We want to increase consumer financial literacy in order to prevent debt from consumer loans and other financial products in a number of citizens.

text: V oblasti lékové politiky prosazujeme zejména:
translation_a: In the area of drug policy, we advocate in particular:
translation_b: In the field of medicine policy, we promote in particular:

text: Свобода неможлива без права власності.
translation_a: Freedom is impossible without property rights.
translation_b: Freedom is not possible without property.

text: Преодолеть бюджетный кризис.
translation_a: Overcome the budget crisis.
translation_b: Overcoming the budget crisis.

text: Il Prc ribadisce altresì la propria netta opposizione a qualsiasi ipotesi di frammentazione del sistema in una molteplicità di soggetti che producano, trasportino e distribuiscano l’energia elettrica, che rischierebbe di rendere ingovernabile il sistema con gravi cadute di qualità nel servizio reso ai cittadini/ utenti.
translation_a: The RCP also reiterates its clear opposition to any hypothesis of fragmentation of the system into a multiplicity of entities that produce, transport and distribute electricity, which would risk making the system ungovernable with serious falls in the quality of service rendered to citizens/users.
translation_b: The PRC also reiterates its strong opposition to any hypothesis of fragmentation of the system in a multiplicity of subjects producing, transporting and distributing electricity, which would risk making the system ungovernable with serious declines in the quality of the service rendered to citizens/users.

text: Grote technologiebedrijven zoals Facebook, Google en Amazon hebben enorme machtsposities in de markt.
translation_a: Large technology companies such as Facebook, Google and Amazon have huge positions of power in the market.
translation_b: Large technology companies such as Facebook, Google and Amazon have huge dominant positions in the market.

text: Spowodujemy znaczne przyspieszenie rozpoznawania przez sądy spraw gospodarczych, zwłaszcza w zakresie rozliczeń finansowych (zatory płatnicze).
translation_a: We will cause a significant acceleration of the courts' recognition of business cases, especially in the area of financial settlements (payment backlogs).
translation_b: We will significantly accelerate the processing of business cases by the courts, especially in the area of financial settlements (payment defaults).

text: Vhodným prvkem vedoucím ke zvýšení zaměstnanosti je vytvoření právních podmínek a standardů pro mikrofinancování samostatné výdělečné činnosti.
translation_a: An appropriate element leading to increased employment is the creation of legal conditions and standards for microfinance for self-employment.
translation_b: A suitable element leading to increased employment is the establishment of legal conditions and standards for microfinancing of self-employed.

text: Si des avancées importantes ont été enregistrées au cours de la législature qui s’achève, telles que la réforme bancaire, la loi de financement des PME ou encore les prêts-citoyens, il faut désormais veiller à ce qu’elles produisent leurs effets concrets pour les entrepreneurs et mobilisent davantage de moyens en faveur de l’économie réelle.
translation_a: Significant progress has been made in the course of the current legislature, such as banking reform, the SME financing law and citizen loans, but we now need to ensure that they have a tangible impact on entrepreneurs and mobilize more resources in favor of the real economy.
translation_b: While significant progress has been made during the upcoming legislature, such as banking reform, the SME financing law or citizen loans, it is now necessary to ensure that they produce their concrete effects for entrepreneurs and mobilize more resources for the real economy.

text: Постоянные консультации c управляющими и собственниками крупных российских предприятие, представителями среднего и мелкого бизнеса позволяют разрабатывать конкретные программы действий на основе предложений предпринимателей, управляющих, профсоюзов, экспертов в области экономики и права.
translation_a: Ongoing consultations with managers and owners of large Russian enterprises and representatives of medium and small businesses allow us to develop specific action programs based on proposals from entrepreneurs, managers, trade unions, economic and legal experts.
translation_b: Constant consultations with managers and owners of large Russian enterprises, representatives of medium and small allow to develop specific programmes of action based on proposals of entrepreneurs, managers, trade unions, experts in the field of economics and law.

text: Modelul actual de creștere bazat pe consum va fi înlocuit cu modelul de creștere bazat pe investiții.
translation_a: The current consumption-led growth model will be replaced by an investment-led growth model.
translation_b: The current consumption-based growth model will be replaced by the investment-based growth model.

text: La nostra proposta si fonda su tre passaggi fondamentali.
translation_a: Our proposal is based on three basic steps.
translation_b: Our proposal is based on three fundamental steps.

text: Зобов'язати осіб, які вивели капітали в офшори, повернути їх в Україну та сплатити з них усі належні податки.
translation_a: Oblige persons who have transferred capital to offshore companies to return it to Ukraine and pay all taxes due on it.
translation_b: Obligate the persons who have taken capital to the offshore, return them to Ukraine and pay all due taxes from them.

text: Wir treten dafür ein, dass die Regeln des gestärkten Stabilitäts-und Wachstumspakts und des Fiskalpakts strikt umgesetzt werden.
translation_a: We advocate strict implementation of the rules of the strengthened Stability and Growth Pact and the Fiscal Compact.
translation_b: We support the strict implementation of the rules of the strengthened Stability and Growth Pact and the fiscal pact.

text: Unsere klare solide Finanzpolitik hat uns einen Spielraum ermöglicht, den andere Staaten so nicht hatten.
translation_a: Our clearly sound fiscal policy has given us room to maneuver in a way that other countries did not have.
translation_b: Our clear and sound fiscal policy has given us a margin that other countries did not have.

text: Η ευαισθητοποίηση καταναλωτών για το τι περιέχουν, πώς παράγονται, πώς συσκευάζονται, πώς μεταφέρονται, πώς πωλούνται και πώς απορρίπτονται τα διάφορα προϊόντα είναι απαραίτητη. (π.χ. τοξικά είδη καθαρισμού μπορεί να αντικατασταθούν με μη τοξικά). Η συσκευασία μπορεί να είναι ανακυκλώσιμη ή/και βιοδιασπώμενη. Η επιλογή προϊόντων να γίνεται με κριτήριο να είναι “φιλικά’ προς το περιβάλλον ή τουλάχιστον λιγότερο επιβλαβή.
translation_a: Consumer awareness of what products contain, how they are produced, packaged, transported, sold and disposed of is essential. (e.g. toxic cleaning products can be replaced with non-toxic ones). Packaging may be recyclable and/or biodegradable. Products should be chosen to be 'environmentally friendly' or at least less harmful.
translation_b: Consumer awareness of what the products contain, how they are produced, how they are packaged, how they are transported, how they are sold and how they are discarded is essential (e.g. toxic cleaning products can be replaced with non-toxic ones). The packaging can be recyclable and/or biodegradable.

text: Diferenciar las responsabilidades y competencias entre el Gobierno y los entes reguladores, de manera que el Gobierno determine las prioridades sectoriales y los entes reguladores se ocupen de su papel de arbitaros entre usuarios y empresas.
translation_a: Differentiate responsibilities and competencies between the government and the regulators, so that the government determines sectoral priorities and the regulators take care of their role as arbiter between users and companies.
translation_b: Differentiate the responsibilities and competences between the Government and the regulatory entities, so that the Government determines the sectoral priorities and the regulatory entities take care of their role as arbitrators between users and companies.

text: Propomos alargar a todos os sectores de atividade os Centros de Arbitragem de Litígios em complemento ao sistema judicial, definindo esse foro para litígios contratualmente no início da atividade empresarial (adesão plena e imediata no momento de criação da empresa).
translation_a: We propose extending the Dispute Arbitration Centers to all sectors of activity as a complement to the judicial system, defining this forum for disputes contractually at the beginning of the business activity (full and immediate membership at the time of company creation).
translation_b: We propose to extend to all sectors of activity the Dispute Arbitration Centers in addition to the judicial system, defining this forum for disputes contractually at the start of business activity (full and immediate membership at the time of creation of the company).

text: За державою має бути забезпечена власність тільки на такі засоби виробництва і сфери діяльності, які мають загальнонаціональне значення і удержавлення яких виправдане світовим досвідом.
translation_a: The state should retain ownership of only such means of production and spheres of activity that are of national importance and whose retention is justified by international experience.
translation_b: The state must ensure ownership only of such means of production and spheres of activity which are of national importance and the holding of which is justified by world experience.

text: Wir unterstützen die Gewerkschaft, dies im Rahmen der Kollektivverträge zu erreichen.
translation_a: We support the union in achieving this within the framework of the collective agreements.
translation_b: We support the trade union to this within the framework of the collective agreements.

text: Προωθεί τυφλές ιδιωτικοποιήσεις που αντιστρατεύονται το συµφέρον της χώρας.
translation_a: It promotes blind privatisations that go against the interests of the country.
translation_b: It promotes blind privatizations that oppose the interests of the country.

text: Wir wollen die Macht der Banken und Konzerne brechen.
translation_a: We want to break the power of the banks and corporations.
translation_b: We want to break the power of banks and corporations.

text: Наведение порядка в финансовой деятельности и налогообложений естественных монополий и крупнейших налогоплательщиков.
translation_a: Establishing order in the financial activities and taxation of natural monopolies and major taxpayers.
translation_b: To bring order in financial activities and taxation of natural monopolies and the largest taxpayers.

text: Damit sich Verbraucher*innen gemeinsam gegen Tricks von Unternehmen und Bereicherung auf Verbraucher*innenkosten wehren können, machen wir uns für Sammelklagen stark, die unmittelbar zu einem Schadensersatz durch die Unternehmen führen.
translation_a: To enable consumers to jointly defend themselves against corporate trickery and enrichment at consumers' expense, we are campaigning for class actions that lead directly to compensation from companies.
translation_b: In order for consumers to jointly defend themselves against tricks by companies and enrichment at consumer’s internal costs, we advocate collective lawsuits that directly lead to compensation by companies.

text: За 5 лет мы должны построить в России не менее 1 тысячи новых школ, и за эти же 5 лет у нас не должно остаться ни одной школы в аварийном состоянии.
translation_a: In 5 years we must build at least 1 thousand new schools in Russia, and in the same 5 years we must not leave a single school in a state of disrepair.
translation_b: In five years, we must build at least 1,000 new schools in Russia, and in the same five years, we should not have one school left in an emergency state.

text: Borsa İstanbul bünyesinde Özel Sermaye Platformu kuracağız.
translation_a: We will establish a Private Equity Platform within Borsa Istanbul.
translation_b: We will establish a private capital platform in the Istanbul Stock Exchange.

text: Postupně budeme zvyšovat minimální mzdu z dnešních 8 500 Kč na 12 000 Kč v roce 2018.
translation_a: We will gradually raise the minimum wage from CZK 8 500 today to CZK 12 000 in 2018.
translation_b: We will gradually increase the minimum wage from SEK 8,500 today to SEK 12,000 in 2018.

text: Bölge ülkeleri ile ilişkiler ağını, sıkı ve kalıcı bağlar haline dönüştürerek bölgeye yönelik yeni ekonomik ve siyasi girişimlerin yapılması ve bölgede bugüne kadar gerçekleştirilen işbirliğinde ileri aşamalara ulaşılması önem taşımaktadır.
translation_a: It is important to transform the network of relations with the countries of the region into close and lasting ties, to undertake new economic and political initiatives in the region and to reach advanced stages in the cooperation realized so far in the region.
translation_b: Transforming the network of relations with regional countries into close and lasting ties, it is important to undertake new economic and political initiatives in the region and to advances in cooperation in the region so far.

text: Defiscalizzazione completa delle assunzioni e taglio della metà di tutte le imposte per le aziende già presenti sul territorio.
translation_a: Full defiscalization of hiring and a cut of half of all taxes for companies already in the area.
translation_b: A complete de-taxation of employment and reduction of half of all taxes for companies already present in the territory.

text: Θέλουµε η πολιτική ανταγωνισµού εκτός από τις επιχειρήσεις να προστατεύει και τον καταναλωτή, να ενισχύεται και να διευρύνεται σε όλους τους τοµείς της οικονοµικής δραστηριότητας.
translation_a: We want competition policy to protect not only businesses but also consumers, to be strengthened and expanded in all areas of economic activity.
translation_b: We want competition policy to protect consumers as well as, to be strengthened and expanded in all sectors of economic activity.

text: Proto si najímají české firmy, o nichž už dopředu musí vědět, že nemají k dispozici potřebnou technologii na likvidaci nebezpečných látek.
translation_a: That is why they hire Czech companies that they must know in advance do not have the necessary technology to dispose of hazardous substances.
translation_b: Therefore, they hire Czech companies, about which they must know in advance that they do not have the necessary technology to dispose of hazardous substances.

text: Il Ministero dell’Ambiente e della tutela del territorio e del mare non partecipa con proprio capitale ad alcuna Società.
translation_a: The Ministry of Environment and Land and Sea Protection does not participate with its own capital in any Company.
translation_b: The Ministry of the Environment and the Protection of the Territory and the Sea does not participate with its own capital in any Company.

text: De markt voor financiële derivaten wordt transparanter.
translation_a: The market for financial derivatives is becoming more transparent.
translation_b: The market for financial derivatives is becoming more transparent.

text: Grâce aux efforts fournis par le Fédéral, on observe une amélioration du solde de financement équivalente à 1.3% du PIB entre les années 2012 et 2013 (de 4 à 2.7%) pour l’ensemble des pouvoirs publics.
translation_a: Thanks to the efforts made by the Federal Government, the financing balance for the public sector as a whole improved by 1.3% of GDP between 2012 and 2013 (from 4 to 2.7%).
translation_b: Thanks to the efforts provided by the Federal Government, there is an improvement in the financing balance equivalent to 1.3% of GDP between 2012 and 2013 (from 4 to 2.7%) for all public authorities.

text: Мы требуем ввести государственную монополию на производство и оборот этилового спирта.
translation_a: We demand the introduction of a state monopoly on the production and circulation of ethyl alcohol.
translation_b: We demand a state monopoly on the production and circulation of ethyl alcohol.

text: За 3 роки подвоїти державні інвестиції на розвиток агропромислового комплексу.
translation_a: Double public investment in the development of the agricultural sector in 3 years.
translation_b: In three years to double the state investment in the development of the agro-industrial complex.

text: Скоротити кількість загальнодержавних податків і зборів, залишивши: податок на доходи фізичних осіб, податок на прибуток підприємств, податок на додану вартість, єдиний соціальний внесок, акцизний збір, податки на нерухомість і землю.
translation_a: Reduce the number of national taxes and fees, leaving only personal income tax, corporate income tax, value added tax, unified social tax, excise tax, real estate and land taxes.
translation_b: Reduce the number of state taxes and fees, leaving: income tax of individuals, income tax of enterprises, value added tax, single social contribution, excise tax, property and land taxes.

text: Bitki ve hayvan varlığının korunması amacıyla “Gen Bankası”na önem verilecektir.
translation_a: Importance will be given to the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Gene Bank"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" in order to protect plant and animal assets.
translation_b: The “Gen Bank” will be concerned with the protection of plant and animal existence.

text: Il demande de revenir à la formule antérieure de traités, lesquels ne constituaient pas une charte des multinationales au détriment du bien commun.
translation_a: It calls for a return to the previous formula of treaties, which did not constitute a charter for multinationals to the detriment of the common good.
translation_b: It calls for a return to the previous form of treaties, which did not constitute a charter of multinationals at the expense of the common good.

text: Terörden zarar gören bölgelerimizi yeniden imar ediyoruz.
translation_a: We are rebuilding our regions damaged by terrorism.
translation_b: We are rebuilding our areas damaged by terrorism.

text: Die „association d`intérêt collectif“ wäre demnach eine Vereinigung, die Produkte und Dienstleistungen von kollektivem Interesse und Nutzen anbietet und nicht auf die Bereicherung ihrer Mitglieder abzielt.
translation_a: The """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""association d`intérêt collectif"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" would thus be an association that offers products and services of collective interest and benefit and does not aim at the enrichment of its members.
translation_b: The “association d’intérêt collectif” would therefore be an association offering products and services of collective interest and benefit and not aiming at the enrichment of its members.

text: Відтворення мережі державних та комунальних підприємств роздрібноїторгівлі, послуг, аптек.
translation_a: Recreate the network of state and municipal retailers, services, and pharmacies.
translation_b: Reproduction of a network of state and communal enterprises of retail trade, services, pharmacies.

text: O αριθμός των δικαιολογητικών που απαιτούνται για την έκδοση των αδειών λειτουργίας περιορίζονται στον απολύτως αναγκαίο.
translation_a: The number of documents required for the issue of operating licences is limited to the minimum necessary.
translation_b: The number of supporting documents required for the issuance of operating licences shall be limited to what is strictly necessary.

text: Rideterminazione dei valori dei contributi unificati (che sono quelli che si versano per poter iniziare una causa) oggi molto elevati e che nei fatti provocano per le persone meno agiate una desistenza economica.
translation_a: Redetermination of the values of unified contributions (which are those that are paid in order to initiate a lawsuit) that are very high today and that in fact cause for less affluent people economic desistance.
translation_b: In addition, it is important to note that the use of the product is not limited to the use of the product or the use of the product.

text: Einhebung von Steuern auf andere Vermögenswerte würde erheblichen Aufwand bedeuten, der sich nur begrenzt mit den zu erwartenden Einnahmen rechtfertigen lässt.
translation_a: Levying taxes on other assets would involve considerable expense, which can only be justified to a limited extent by the expected revenue.
translation_b: Collecting taxes on other assets would involve considerable effort, which can only be justified in a limited way by the expected revenue.

text: Para politikasının öncelikli amacını enflasyonu düşürmek ve fiyat istikrarını sağlamak olarak yeniden tesis edeceğiz.
translation_a: We will re-establish the primary objective of monetary policy as reducing inflation and achieving price stability.
translation_b: We will re-establish the primary goal of monetary policy by reducing inflation and ensuring price stability.

text: Sería contradictorio y demagógico asignarle un papel importante al sector público y, al mismo tiempo, despreocuparse por su financiamiento o desdeñar la disciplina fiscal y monetaria.
translation_a: It would be contradictory and demagogic to assign an important role to the public sector and, at the same time, neglect its financing or disdain fiscal and monetary discipline.
translation_b: It would be contradictory and demagogic to assign an important role to the public sector and, at the same time, disregard its financing or disregard fiscal and monetary discipline.

text: Современные технологии позволяют маркировать деревья, чтобы вести постоянный контроль за передвижением древесины.
translation_a: Modern technology makes it possible to mark trees to keep a constant check on the movement of wood.
translation_b: Modern technologies make it possible to mark trees to keep constant control of the movement of wood.

text: Die Jugendlichen sollen in ihrer Ausbildungszeit stärker mit der Perspektive der Eigenständigkeit konfrontiert und vertraut gemacht werden.
translation_a: The young people should be confronted with and familiarized with the perspective of independence to a greater extent during their training period.
translation_b: Young people should be confronted and more familiarized with the perspective of independence during their training period.

text: Необходима направленная политика по стимулированию инвестиционной политики и повышению контроля за ее эффективностью.
translation_a: A targeted policy is needed to stimulate investment policy and increase control over its effectiveness.
translation_b: A targeted policy is needed to stimulate investment policy and increase control over its effectiveness.

text: Il nostro paese continua a rimanere molto dipendente da settori merceologici e tecnologici fondamentali per il pieno sviluppo economico del paese, rimanendo così soggiogato in logiche di dipendenza nei confronti di altri stati.
translation_a: Our country continues to remain highly dependent on commodity and technology sectors that are fundamental to the country's full economic development, thus remaining subjugated in logics of dependence on other states.
translation_b: Our country continues to remain highly dependent on the merchandising and technological sectors essential for the full economic development of the country, thus remaining subject to logic of dependence on other states.

text: Επίσης, μεταξύ άλλων, είναι κεφαλαιώδους σημασίας ο επαναπροσδιορισμός του ρόλου και της συμβολής όλων των μορφών της οικονομίας, δημόσιων επιχειρήσεων, μικρών ιδιωτικών επιχειρήσεων, μεγάλων ιδιωτικών επιχειρήσεων, συνεταιρισμών, μορφών αλληλέγγυας οικονομίας στο πλαίσιο μιας μικτής οικονομίας, για τη σχεδιασμένη και στοχευμένη μετάβαση σε ένα νέο, κοινωνικά δίκαιο και οικολογικά βιώσιμο παραγωγικό σύστημα.
translation_a: Also, among other things, it is crucial to redefine the role and contribution of all forms of the economy, public enterprises, small private enterprises, large private enterprises, cooperatives, forms of solidarity economy in the context of a mixed economy, for the planned and targeted transition to a new, socially just and ecologically sustainable production system.
translation_b: Also, among other things, it is crucial to redefine the role and contribution of all forms of economy, public enterprises, small private enterprises, large private enterprises, cooperatives, forms of solidarity economy in the context of a mixed economy, for the planned and targeted transition to a new, socially fair and ecologically sustainable production system.

text: D66 wil perverse beloningen terugdringen door De Nederlandsche Bank te laten toezien op de variabele beloningsstructuur van de Raad van Bestuur, het hoger- en middenmanagement en handelaren van banken.
translation_a: D66 wants to reduce perverse rewards by having De Nederlandsche Bank oversee the variable compensation structure of the Board of Directors, senior and middle management and traders of banks.
translation_b: D66 aims to reduce perverse remuneration by allowing De Nederlandsche Bank to oversee the variable remuneration structure of the Board of Directors, senior and middle management and bank traders.

text: Inciter à la mise en œuvre de la société européenne afin de permettre aux entrepreneurs de s’établir plus facilement dans d’autres pas de l’Union européenne.
translation_a: Encourage the implementation of the European Company to make it easier for entrepreneurs to set up in other parts of the European Union.
translation_b: Encourage the implementation of European society so that entrepreneurs can more easily establish themselves in other steps of the European Union.

text: Wir müssen daher unsere Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmer in die Lage versetzen, auch in wirtschaftlich schwierigen Zeiten heimische Arbeitsplätze zu sichern.
translation_a: We must therefore enable our entrepreneurs to secure domestic jobs even in economically difficult times.
translation_b: We must therefore enable our entrepreneurs to secure domestic jobs even in economically difficult times.

text: Essa deve dotarsi di uno Statuto improntato prima di tutto all’etica, al diritto e alla giustizia, ma mai alla concorrenza e alle altre regole del mercato.
translation_a: It must have a statute that is marked first and foremost by ethics, law and justice, but never by competition and other market rules.
translation_b: It must provide itself with a statute based primarily on ethics, law and justice, but never on competition and other market rules.

text: Bugetul trebuie să fie construit pe programe, să fie clar, transparent şi să se stabilească responsabilităţile legate de implementarea lui, să conţină măsuri pentru reînvigorarea economiei şi pentru crearea de noi locuri de muncă.
translation_a: The budget must be programme-based, clear, transparent and set out responsibilities for its implementation, and contain measures to reinvigorate the economy and create new jobs.
translation_b: The budget must be based on programmes, be clear, transparent and set responsibilities for its implementation, contain measures to revitalize the economy and create new jobs.

text: L’Agenzia delle Dogane e dei Monopoli non detiene quote di partecipazione, neppure minoritaria, in altre società.
translation_a: The Customs and Monopolies Agency does not hold shares, even minority shares, in other companies.
translation_b: The Customs and Monopoly Agency does not hold any shares, even minority, in other companies.

text: Le Bloc Québécois s'engage à forcer l'examen de tous les accords fiscaux conclus par le Canada avec les paradis fiscaux, l'examen des moyens à la disposition de l'Agence du revenu du Canada pour enquêter sur ce phénomène, ainsi que les moyens législatifs permettant d'obliger les grandes entreprises faisant affaire au Canada à payer leur juste part de taxes et d'impôt.
translation_a: The Bloc Québécois is committed to forcing a review of all tax agreements entered into by Canada with tax havens, an examination of the means available to the Canada Revenue Agency to investigate this phenomenon, as well as legislative means to force large corporations doing business in Canada to pay their fair share of taxes.
translation_b: The Quebec Bloc undertakes to force the review of all tax agreements concluded by Canada with tax havens, the examination of the means at the disposal of the Canada Revenue Agency to investigate this phenomenon, as well as the legislative means to compel large companies doing business in Canada to pay their fair share of taxes and taxes.

text: Καθιέρωση Χάρτας Δικαιωμάτων του Επιβάτη.
translation_a: Establishment of a Passenger Bill of Rights.
translation_b: Charter of Passenger Rights.

text: Kamu harcamalarının toplam hâsıla içerisindeki payının artırılmamasına ve böylelikle kamunun özel sektörü dışlayıcı etkisinin en aza indirilmesine dikkat edeceğiz.

text: Anzi, tale cieca fiducia nelle capacità di autoregolamentazione ha finito per bruciare ricchezza, inibendo il potenziale di crescita delle economie avanzate; ha costretto gli Stati sovrani a indebitarsi per salvare le istituzioni finanziarie too big to fail, mettendo a repentaglio la sostenibilità economica di sistemi di welfare State faticosamente costruiti in decenni di democrazia liberale, con le inevitabili ricadute sulle regioni più povere e i soggetti più deboli e vulnerabili.
translation_a: On the contrary, such blind faith in self-regulatory capacities has ended up burning wealth, inhibiting the growth potential of advanced economies; it has forced sovereign states into debt to bail out too-big-to-fail financial institutions, jeopardizing the economic sustainability of welfare state systems painstakingly built over decades of liberal democracy, with the inevitable fallout on poorer regions and the weakest and most vulnerable.

translation_b: These assessment processes can be managed by departmental committees, and should have quantitative and qualitative components, turn to colleagues from foreign universities for opinions on the work developed, and take into account student surveys.

text: Dat vertaalt zich in een groot aandeel hooggeschoolden in Vlaanderen: meer als 40% van de 25 tot 64 jarigen had in 2017 een diploma hoger onderwijs.

translation_b: Solutions to reduce the price (e.g. loan, subsidy) of the bicycle.

translation_b: We must be aware that the problem of communities in the szórvány/internal diaspora is first and foremost a problem of the big cities.

translation_b: Higher education will be provided by institutions which are legal entities of public law with full self-government, as well as by private university or polytechnic institutions and institutions owned by local self-government bodies.

text: Questo modello di trasporto scarica sulla collettività incidenti, morti, inquinamento acustico ed ambientale, congestione per un costo totale di circa 200mila miliardi l’anno.

translation_b: This model of transport discharges on the community accidents, deaths, noise and environmental pollution, congestion for a total cost of approximately 200 trillion a year.

text: Реальні доходи знизилися в 10-15 разів. Понад 90% громадян живуть у злиднях чи за межею виживання.
translation_a: Real incomes have fallen by 10-15 times. More than 90% of citizens live in poverty or on the verge of survival.
translation_b: Real income has decreased by 10-15 times. Over 90% of citizens live in poverty or below the survival limit.

text: O sistema financeiro desempenha um papel fundamental na economia, promovendo uma melhor afetação de recursos, através da transferência de poupança e de fundos excedentários de aforradores para setores e agentes económicos que deles necessitam, designadamente para consumir e investir, facilitando ainda um alisamento de gastos dos agentes ao longo do tempo.
translation_a: The financial system plays a fundamental role in the economy, promoting a better allocation of resources by transferring savings and surplus funds from savers to sectors and economic agents that need them, namely to consume and invest, while also facilitating a smoothing of agents' spending over time.
translation_b: The financial system plays a key role in the economy by promoting a better allocation of resources, by transferring savings and surplus funds from savers to sectors and economic actors who need them, namely to consume and invest, and facilitating a streamlining of spending by agents over time.

text: Halbuki teknoloji ithali gelişmekte olan her memleket gibi Türkiye’miz için de zaruri bir ihtiyaçtır.
translation_a: However, technology imports are a necessity for Turkey, as for every developing country.
translation_b: However, for Turkey, as for every country that is developing in technology, it is an urgent need.

text: Η μάθηση δεν περιέχει καθόλου κίνητρα ανάπτυξης της πρωτοβουλίας των μαθητών. Ο ανταγωνισμός μεταξύ των μαθητών έχει σαν αποτέλεσμα τα απογευματινά «ιδιαίτερα μαθήματα», που απορροφούν σημαντικό χρόνο από τους νέους και αποτελούν σοβαρή οικονομική επιβάρυνση των γονιών.
translation_a: Learning contains no incentives to develop students' initiative. Competition between pupils results in 'private lessons' in the afternoons, which take up a considerable amount of young people's time and are a serious financial burden on parents.
translation_b: Learning does not contain any incentives to develop student initiative at all. Competition among students has resulted in the afternoon """"special classes"""", which absorb significant time from young people and constitute a serious financial burden on parents.

text: Instrumentul secundar al luptei împotriva corupţiei este promovarea unei politici penale care pe de o parte să constituie o forţă descurajatoare pentru potenţialii făptuitori ai actelor de corupţie, pe de altă parte să asigure descoperirea făptuitorilor de acte de corupţie.
translation_a: The secondary tool in the fight against corruption is the promotion of a criminal policy that on the one hand is a deterrent to potential perpetrators of corruption and on the other ensures that perpetrators of corruption are detected.
translation_b: The secondary instrument of the fight against corruption is the promotion of a criminal policy that, on the one hand, constitutes a deterrent force for potential perpetrators of corruption acts, on the other hand, ensures the discovery of perpetrators of corruption acts.

text: Τη βελτίωση της υποδομής.
translation_a: Improving infrastructure.
translation_b: Improvement of infrastructure.

text: Um gleiche Entgelte für Frauen und Männer durchzusetzen, muss der Auskunftsanspruch im Entgelttransparenzgesetz durch ein Verbandsklagerecht ergänzt werden.

translation_b: In order to enforce equal pay for women and men, the right to information in the Wage Transparency Act must be supplemented by a federal lawsuit.

text: Zusätzlich sollte es die Möglichkeit zur berufsbegleitenden Ausbildung in einem Pflegeberuf geben.

translation_b: In addition, there should be the possibility of vocational training in a nursing profession.

text: Divieto comunque di sbarco dalle navi ONG per i passeggeri che non sono muniti di documenti identificativi.

translation_b: It is forbidden to disembark from NGO vessels for passengers who do not carry identification documents.

text: Yazar, gazeteci ve medya çalışanlarının maruz bırakıldığı işten attırma, ambargo, polis baskısı, hukuksuz yargılama, sansür ve hakaret davaları gibi uygulamaların önüne geçeceğiz.

text: Österreich ist jetzt schon beim Neubau in vielen Bereichen in einer Vorreiter-Position.

translation_b: Austria is already at the forefront of new construction in many areas.

text: Settori strategici come quelli del software informatico, dei prodotti di largo consumo, musica, audio, video sono i nuclei nevralgici di un piano di welfare informativo e simbolico, utile sia per le ricadute sullo sviluppo economico, sia per il rilievo che la diffusione della cultura ha sui diritti di cittadinanza.
translation_a: Strategic sectors such as those of computer software, consumer products, music, audio, and video are the nerve centers of an informative and symbolic welfare plan, which is useful both for its spillover effects on economic development and for the prominence that the dissemination of culture has on citizenship rights.
translation_b: Strategic sectors such as those of computer software, consumer products, music, audio, video are the neural nuclei of an informative and symbolic welfare plan, useful both for the repercussions on economic development, and for the relevance that the dissemination of culture has on citizens’ rights.

text: Privilégier les contacts bilatéraux de nos députés régionaux et communautaires avec les députés européens dans le cadre de leurs travaux et débats en assemblée.

text: E la differenza esclusa, mentre agisce il suo diritto ad accedere ai diritti, rinomina e riposiziona lo stessa idea di universalismo.

translation_b: With the EU Action Plan on Sustainable Finance, the European Commission has laid an important foundation for strengthening sustainability in the financial marketplace.

text: Mişcarea Populară consideră că este necesară susţinerea activă a intereselor strategice directe ale României în ceea ce priveşte securitatea energetică.

translation_b: The People’s Movement believes that it is necessary to actively support Romania’s direct strategic interests in terms of energy security.

text: În cazul programelor finanţate din bugetul de stat, în special al celor care privesc dezvoltarea infrastructurală, decizia asupra dezvoltării structurii teritoriale (regionale) nu poate fi prerogativa exclusivă a ministerului de resort.
translation_a: In the case of programmes financed from the state budget, especially those concerning infrastructure development, the decision on the development of the territorial (regional) structure cannot be the exclusive prerogative of the ministry in charge.
translation_b: In the case of programs financed from the state budget, in particular those relating to infrastructure development, the decision on the development of the territorial (regional) structure cannot be the exclusive prerogative of the relevant ministry.

text: Vamos flexibilizar as áreas exigidas às habitações, permitindo que essa definição, a ser feita, seja feita ao nível local, tendo em conta a realidade do mercado de cada concelho.

translation_b: We will flexize the areas required for housing, allowing this definition, to be made, to be made at the local level, taking into account the reality of the market of each county.

text: Atravessando diversas políticas sectoriais, são questões fundamentais para a juventude os princípios que orientam a política de juventude proposta pelo PCP, como são o acesso à educação e ao ensino, a um emprego com direitos, a uma vida independente, à produção e fruição culturais, à prática do desporto, a uma vida sexual saudável e assumida e a paz e a cooperação entre os povos.
translation_a: Cutting across various sectoral policies, the principles that guide the youth policy proposed by the PCP are fundamental issues for young people, such as access to education and teaching, employment with rights, an independent life, cultural production and enjoyment, practicing sport, a healthy and committed sex life and peace and cooperation between peoples.
translation_b: Through various sectoral policies, key issues for youth are the principles guiding the youth policy proposed by the CFP, such as access to education and education, employment with rights, an independent life, cultural production and enjoyment, the practice of sport, a healthy and committed sexual life and peace and cooperation between peoples.

text: Необходимо тщательно охранять «зеленые пояса» крупных городов, пресекать ликвидацию или застройку парков, скверов и исторических центров.
translation_a: It is necessary to carefully protect the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""green belts"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" of major cities, to prevent the elimination or development of parks, squares and historical centers.

translation_a: The amendment of the Law on Public Assistance, based on proposals that we as AKEL submitted, has helped broaden the definition of disabled, with the result that people with disabilities, mainly children, are now receiving public assistance.
translation_b: The amendment of the Public Aid Act, based on suggestions that we as ACEL have submitted, has helped to expand the term disabled, resulting in people with disabilities, especially children, receiving public aid today.

text: Obiectivul PLDM este de a asigura că până în 2020, atunci când aceşti copii vor fi in gimnaziu, Republica Moldova să fie cu mult mai înainte decât este astăzi şi să nu alunece înapoi în practicile eşuate care au strangulat economia şi societatea noastră zeci de ani.
translation_a: The PLDM's goal is to ensure that by 2020, when these children are in secondary school, Moldova is far ahead of where it is today and does not slip back into the failed practices that have strangled our economy and society for decades.
translation_b: The goal of the PLDM is to ensure that by 2020, when these children will be in high school, the Republic of Moldova will be much ahead than it is today and not slide back into the failed practices that have strangled our economy and society for decades.

text: Θεωρούμε, σε συμφωνία με την Ευρωπαϊκή Ένωση, ότι Αειφόρος ανάπτυξη σημαίνει πως πρέπει να στοχεύσουμε στο να καλυφθούν οι ανάγκες της παρούσας γενιάς χωρίς να υποθηκεύεται η ικανότητα των επόμενων γενεών να καλύψουν τις δικές τους ανάγκες.
translation_a: We believe, in line with the European Union, that Sustainable Development means that we must aim to meet the needs of the present generation without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.
translation_b: We believe, in agreement with the European Union, that sustainable development means that we must aim to meet the needs of the present generation without undermining the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.

text: Kunst und Kultur ermöglichen es uns, die Welt mit anderen Augen zu sehen, differenzierter zuzuhören und neu zu denken.

translation_b: Art and culture enable us to see the world with different eyes, listen more differentiated, and think again.

text: Stärkung Österreichs und Wiens als Amtssitz internationaler Organisationen.
translation_a: Strengthen Austria and Vienna as official seats of international organizations.
translation_b: Strengthening Austria and Vienna as headquarters of international organizations.

text: Στη νέα διεθνή κατάσταση η Ελλάδα, με βάση και αφετηρία την Ευρώπη, οφείλει να ασκεί πολυδιάστατη εξωτερική πολιτική.
translation_a: In the new international situation, Greece, with Europe as its base and starting point, must pursue a multidimensional foreign policy.
translation_b: In the new international situation, Greece, based on Europe, must pursue a multi-dimensional foreign policy.

text: Ми виступаємо за розширення свободи підприємницької діяльності, істотне скорочення функцій адміністративного регулювання економіки.

translation_b: We advocate the expansion of freedom of entrepreneurial activity, the substantial reduction of the functions of administrative regulation of the economy.

text: Sera mise à l’étude une assurance récolte obligatoire pour soutenir les agriculteurs contre les aléas climatiques et sanitaires.

translation_b: Compulsory crop insurance will be considered to support farmers against climate and health hazards.

text: La cittadinanza come insieme complesso e ricco dei diritti e come spazio pubblico di azione democratica per rappresentarli, negoziarli, scriverli.

translation_b: Citizenship as a complex and rich set of rights and as a public space of democratic action to represent them, negotiate them, write them.

text: Ambicje polityczne zostały skomprymowane do dwóch celów – uzyskania dużych środków z funduszy europejskich na perspektywę 2014-2020 i zdobycie wysokich stanowisk w Unii Europejskiej, Sojuszu Północnoatlantyckim, ewentualnie w innych organizacjach międzynarodowych.
translation_a: Political ambitions have been compressed into two goals - to obtain large amounts of European funds for the 2014-2020 perspective and to win high positions in the European Union, the North Atlantic Alliance, possibly in other international organizations.
translation_b: Political ambitions have been reduced to two goals: to obtain large funds from European funds for the 2014-2020 perspective and to gain high positions in the European Union, the North Atlantic Alliance, possibly other international organizations.

translation_b: Peace, stability, the associated prosperity and the values of the Union must also be extended to our broadened neighborhood.

translation_b: We are committed to a better distribution of our wealth and taxation that is fair, sustainable, fair and simple.

translation_b: The Ukrainian Socialist Party will seek decolonization, de-communization and demophysis of all spheres of Ukrainian social existence.

translation_b: The corresponding resources will be allocated for an infrastructure project in the Córdoba department, which is related below: Study, design and construction of a bridge over the San Jorge River, on the route that communicates the municipality of Ayapel, with the municipality of Pueblo Nuevo, and the municipality of Buenavista, in the correction of Nueva Esperanza, municipality of Pueblo Nuevo, Córdoba department.

text: Ввести право на получение двух пенсий для: 1) участников последнего военного призыва, 2) детей-сирот войны, 3) бывших несовершеннолетних узников концлагерей, 4) жертв политических репрессий, 5) Героев Социалистического Труда.

translation_b: To introduce the right to two pensions for: 1) participants of the last military call, 2) children-orphans of war, 3) former minor prisoners of concentration camps, 4) victims of political repression, 5) Heroes of Socialist Labour.

text: Esta cifra no deja de aumentar, siendo la viva muestra de que las condiciones de vida en nuestro país no han hecho más que empeorar.

text: E' ormai noto, infatti, anche se vanamente denunciato, che la ricetta per coniugare cambiamento e conservazione è sempre stata quella di scrivere le regole giuridiche senza intaccare presupposti per rendere effettivi i diritti che si andavano ad affermare sulla carta.

text: Vogliamo essere protagonisti di nuovi strumenti a servizio della pace tra i popoli: dal sostegno attivo alla prevenzione dei conflitti alle mediazioni politico-diplomatiche, fino all’interposizione nonviolenta dei corpi civili di pace.

text: Це означає, що людина повинна мати право вибору: бути їй найманим працівником, якщо не хоче ризикувати і брати участі в управлінні чи ставати вільним працівником і брати участь на рівних правах з іншими у створенні колективного підприємства, відкривати своє діло, працювати на своїй землі.

translation_b: The PCF, supporting Jean-Luc Mélenchon, wanted this anger in the face of poverty, unemployment, growing inequalities, the looting of natural resources, to find the way, not of division, but of hope and progress.

translation_b: Through the Hartz laws, women are disproportionately pushed into precarious, unprotected working relationships and in part-time work not chosen by themselves, but imposed.

text: C'est pourquoi ses enjeux doivent être abordés à l'échelle européenne ou mondiale et que sa régulation par l'Etat doit être limitée au strict nécessaire, à savoir offrir le service public minimum dont les individus ont besoin pour accéder au monde numérique, un monde numérique qui ouvre la voie à une société « augmentée », fondée sur le partage et le progrès, dès lors que la révolution numérique débouche sur de nouvelles perspectives, de nouveaux droits et de nouvelles libertés.
translation_a: That's why its challenges must be tackled on a European or global scale, and its regulation by the State must be limited to what is strictly necessary, i.e. offering the minimum public service that individuals need to access the digital world, a digital world that opens the way to an """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""augmented"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" society, based on sharing and progress, as the digital revolution opens up new perspectives, new rights and new freedoms.
translation_b: That is why its challenges must be addressed at the European or global level and its regulation by the state should be limited to the strictly necessary, namely to provide the minimum public service that individuals need to access the digital world, a digital world that paves the way for an “enlarged” society based on sharing and progress, as the digital revolution leads to new perspectives, new rights and new freedoms.

text: Będziemy to czynić poprzez dalsze uczestnictwo w zespołach parlamentarnych zajmujących się sprawami strażaków i podnoszenie postulatów zgłaszanych nam przez OSP z naszego województwa.

translation_b: We will do this by continuing to participate in parliamentary teams dealing with firefighters and raising the demands submitted to us by the OSP from our province.

text: U.D.M.R. este de acord cu introducerea impozitelor locale doar în măsura în care, concomitent, se reduce impozitarea centralizată.

text: PDSR şi-a formulat şi afirmat, clar şi consecvent, scopul şi idealurile fundamentale ale existentei şi activităţii sale.

translation_b: The PDSR has formulated and affirmed, clearly and consistently, the purpose and fundamental ideals of its existence and activity.

text: W 2020 roku zapewnimy też, by Polska uzyskała największe w całej Unii Europejskiej fundusze na II filar Wspólnej Polityki Rolnej, czyli na rozwój obszarów wiejskich.
translation_a: In 2020, we will also ensure that Poland receives the largest funding in the entire European Union for Pillar II of the Common Agricultural Policy, i.e. for rural development.
translation_b: In 2020 we will also ensure that Poland receives the largest funds in the entire European Union for the second pillar of the Common Agricultural Policy, i.e. for rural development.

text: Reforma veřejných financí zbrzdila zadlužování.

text: Zásadně se rovněž změnila organizace železniční dopravy.

text: A atual Lei de Bases do Sistema de Educativo completa, em 2016, trinta anos sobre a sua aprovação, razão pela qual importa proceder à sua atualização, que deve partir de uma reflexão alargada sobre a adequabilidade daquele quadro normativo, não só ao tempo presente, mas principalmente aos desafios que se prefiguram nos tempos futuros.
translation_a: The current Basic Law on the Education System will be thirty years old in 2016, which is why it is important to update it, starting from a broad reflection on the suitability of this legal framework, not only for the present time, but especially for the challenges that lie ahead.
translation_b: The current Basic Law of the Educational System completes, in 2016, thirty years after its approval, which is why it is important to proceed to its update, which should start from an extensive reflection on the adequacy of that normative framework, not only to the present time, but mainly to the challenges that are predicted in future times.

text: Esto significa que Europa debe renovar su apuesta estratégica por la agricultura, garantizando un mínimo de abastecimiento alimentario en el marco de la soberanía alimentaria y la preservación del medio ambiente y el medio rural.
translation_a: This means that Europe must renew its strategic commitment to agriculture, guaranteeing a minimum food supply within the framework of food sovereignty and the preservation of the environment and the rural environment.
translation_b: This means that Europe must renew its strategic commitment to agriculture, ensuring a minimum of food supply within the framework of food sovereignty and the preservation of the environment and the rural environment.

text: Die LSAP verteidigt und stärkt die Gemeindeautonomie!
translation_a: The LSAP defends and strengthens municipal autonomy!

translation_a: It will create a new and strong productive fabric that will open up fields of action for young scientists currently suffocating in a closed and anchored economic structure.
translation_b: It will create a new and powerful productive fabric that will open up fields of action for young scientists who are currently suffocating in a closed and anchored economic structure.

text: Ca urmare, avem o administrație publică ineficientă, costisitoare, vulnerabilă la corupţie şi incapabilă să genereze soluţii potrivite pentru problemele complexe cu care se confruntă ţara.
translation_a: As a result, we have a public administration that is inefficient, costly, vulnerable to corruption and unable to generate appropriate solutions to the complex problems facing the country.
translation_b: As a result, we have an inefficient, costly, vulnerable to corruption and incapable of generating appropriate solutions to the complex problems facing the country.

text: Situar a las personas y sus necesidades como el eje central de la atención de salud y a los y las profesionales liderando el Sistema.

translation_b: Situate people and their needs as the central axis of health care and the professionals leading the system.

translation_a: Enhancing the role of Parliament in the process of tabling and debating the Annual Budget, the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Report"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" and the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Audit Report"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_b: Enhancing the Parliament’s role in the process of submitting and discussing the Annual Budget, the “Accounts” and the “Audit Report”.

text: Informatizovaná demokracie je zároveň jedním z nejúčinnějších forem boje proti korupci.
translation_a: Computerised democracy is also one of the most effective forms of fighting corruption.
translation_b: Computerized democracy is also one of the most effective forms of fighting corruption.

text: În acelaşi timp, propunem ca dobânzile pe timp de 1 an de zile ale tuturor noilor credite agricole de până la 1 milion de lei să fie achitate tot de stat.
translation_a: At the same time, we propose that interest for 1 year on all new agricultural loans up to 1 million lei should also be paid by the state.
translation_b: At the same time, we propose that interest for 1 year of all new agricultural loans up to 1 million lei be paid by the state.

text: Takie podejście przyczyni się nie tylko do zachowania, ale także do przywrócenia produkcji rolniczej w gospodarstwach wykluczonych z produkcji towarowej, co zwiększy dochody rodzin rolniczych.
translation_a: This approach will contribute not only to the preservation, but also to the restoration of agricultural production on farms excluded from commodity production, which will increase the income of farming families.
translation_b: This approach will contribute not only to the preservation, but also to the restoration of agricultural production in farms excluded from commodity production, which will increase the incomes of farm families.

text: Verdere schaalvergroting en megastallen gaan we tegen.
translation_a: Further scaling up and mega-stalls will be opposed.

text: Daarom staan we nu voor fundamentele keuzes: hoe houden we onze zorg toegankelijk, betaalbaar en van hoge kwaliteit, gebaseerd op solidariteit met elkaar en met volgende generaties?
translation_a: Therefore, we now face fundamental choices: how do we keep our care accessible, affordable and of high quality, based on solidarity with each other and with future generations?
translation_b: Therefore, we are now facing fundamental choices: how do we keep our care accessible, affordable and of high quality, based on solidarity with each other and with future generations?

text: Asigurarea unui ajutor social lunar în valoare de 150.000 lei pentru familiile tinere, în primii 5 ani de căsătorie.
translation_a: Provide a monthly social allowance of 150,000 lei for young families in the first 5 years of marriage.
translation_b: A monthly social assistance of 150,000 lei for young families during the first 5 years of marriage.

text: Творческий гений народа, оплодотворенный идеями Добра, Истины, Красоты, восстановит роль России как всемирной «державы духа», преумножит ее конкурентные преимущества в экономическом и интеллектуальном соревновании наций.
translation_a: The creative genius of the people, fertilized by the ideas of Good, Truth, Beauty, will restore Russia's role as a world """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""power of the spirit"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""", multiply its competitive advantages in the economic and intellectual competition of nations.
translation_b: The creative genius of the people, fertilized by the ideas of Good, Truth, Beauty, will restore Russia’s role as a world “spirit power”, multiply its competitive advantages in the economic and intellectual competition of nations.

text: Wprowadzimy jasne i zachęcające ulgi podatkowe dla przedsiębiorstw realizujących działal-ność B&R, jakie istnieją np. w Norwegii, gdzie przedsiębiorstwa zatrudniające powyżej 250 pracowników mogą odpisać 18% (a mniejsze przededsiębiorstwa – 20%) sumy wydatków poniesionych na B&R, związanych z projektem uznanym przez właściwą instytucję rządową.
translation_a: We will introduce clear and encouraging tax breaks for companies carrying out R&D activities, such as those that exist, for example, in Norway, where companies with more than 250 employees can write off 18% (and smaller pre-companies 20%) of the sum of expenses incurred for R&D, related to a project recognized by the relevant government institution.
translation_b: We will introduce clear and encouraging tax deductions for B&R companies, such as those in Norway, where companies with more than 250 employees can deduct 18% (and smaller companies – 20%) of the total B&R expenses incurred for a project recognized by a competent government agency.

text: Çoğunluğun baskısına karşı, tek tek her yurttaşın haklarını koruyan politikalardadır.
translation_a: It is in policies that protect the rights of each individual citizen against the oppression of the majority.
translation_b: Against the oppression of the majority, they are in policies that protect the rights of every single citizen.

text: A questão é como superá-la, sem atentar contra a estabilidade da economia.
translation_a: The question is how to overcome it without jeopardizing the stability of the economy.
translation_b: The question is how to overcome it without compromising the stability of the economy.

text: Creando, cioè, una vera e propria istituzione politica di livello europeo che sia in grado di emettere bond per gestire la domanda aggregata e intervenire in caso di rischi sistemici.
translation_a: That is, creating a genuine European-level political institution that would be able to issue bonds to manage aggregate demand and intervene in case of systemic risks.
translation_b: That is, creating a truly European-level political institution capable of issuing bonds to manage aggregate demand and intervene in the event of systemic risks.

text: Z roku na rok rośnie liczba służb państwowych, które posiadają uprawnie-nia do ingerowania w prywatność obywateli, a także zakres tych uprawnień.
translation_a: The number of state services that have the authority to interfere with citizens' privacy is growing every year, as is the scope of that authority.
translation_b: From year to year, the number of public services that have the power to interfere in the privacy of citizens, as well as the scope of these powers, is increasing.

text: НЕВОЗМОЖНО БЫТЬ ЗДОРОВЫМ В БОЛЬНОЙ ОКРУЖАЮЩЕЙ СРЕДЕ!
translation_a: IT'S IMPOSSIBLE TO BE HEALTHY IN A SICK ENVIRONMENT!
translation_b: It is impossible to be healthy in a sick environment.

text: Umożliwimy instalowanie wiatraków przez wspólnoty mieszkańców.
translation_a: We will enable the installation of windmills by communities of residents.

text: Apoiar a difusão de tecnologia de informação que integre todos os componentes do sistema de justiça.

translation_b: Support the dissemination of information technology that integrates all components of the justice system.

text: Si derechos constitucionales tales como el derecho de acceso a la cultura, la libertad de expresión e información, el pluralismo, etc. tienen su traducción en el marco concreto del mundo del libro, es claro que principios como el derecho y universalización del acceso al libro, el derecho de edición y difusión del libro o la diversidad en la edición del libro justifiquen que éste reciba un trato especial por parte del Gobierno Central.
translation_a: If constitutional rights such as the right of access to culture, freedom of expression and information, pluralism, etc. are translated into the specific framework of the book world, it is clear that principles such as the right and universalization of access to books, the right to publish and disseminate books or diversity in book publishing justify special treatment by the Central Government.
translation_b: If constitutional rights such as the right of access to culture, freedom of expression and information, pluralism, etc. have their translation in the concrete framework of the book world, it is clear that principles such as the right and universalization of access to the book, the right of editing and dissemination of the book or the diversity in the editing of the book justify that it receives a special treatment by the Central Government.

text: È compito della scuola favorire tale processo di sviluppo prevalentemente fisico ed emotivo e fare in modo che avvenga in maniera equilibrata, senza incrementare eccessivamente un aspetto (per esempio quello mnemonico/intellettuale) a discapito degli altri (l’emotivo e il fisico/ludico).
translation_a: It is the school's job to foster this process of predominantly physical and emotional development and to make sure that it takes place in a balanced way, without over-increasing one aspect (e.g., the mnemonic/intellectual) to the detriment of the others (the emotional and the physical/ludic).
translation_b: It is the task of the school to promote this process of development predominantly physical and emotional and make sure that it takes place in a balanced way, without excessively increasing one aspect (for example the mnemonic / intellectual) at the expense of others (the emotional and the physical / playful).

text: Le MR propose :-d’élargir le « passeport » diabète aux malades qui souffrent de diabète de type 1 afin de permettre une prise en charge intégrée et multidisciplinaire des patients et donc, à termes, un meilleur suivi.
translation_a: The MR proposes:-extending the diabetes """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""passport"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" to patients suffering from type 1 diabetes, to enable integrated, multidisciplinary patient management and, ultimately, better follow-up.
translation_b: The MR proposes to extend the diabetes “passport” to patients suffering from type 1 diabetes in order to allow integrated and multidisciplinary care of patients and thus, in terms, a better follow-up.

text: Manter o diálogo responsável e qualificado com todos os segmentos da sociedade, buscando a construção de consensos e atuando de forma democrática no equacionamento de conflitos.

translation_b: Maintain responsible and qualified dialogue with all segments of society, seeking to build consensus and acting democratically in the equation of conflicts.

translation_b: Create a system of information reintegration of residents of occupied territories in Ukraine.

text: Odmítáme kroky vedoucí k vytvoření fiskální unie, která by směřovala k harmonizaci daní a dalším ztrátám suverenity členských států.

translation_b: We reject steps leading to the creation of a fiscal union aimed at tax harmonization and further losses of sovereignty among Member States.

text: Цьому повинні сприяти як екологічне законодавство, так і спеціальні програми запровадження екологічно чистих технологій.

translation_b: This should be facilitated by both environmental legislation and special programs for introducing environmentally friendly technologies.

translation_b: Ukraine needs a qualitatively new type of relationship between citizen and state.

translation_a: Regionalizing aid under the first pillar of the CAP in order to guarantee a fairer distribution of aid among the various types of farming/regions, integrating the thousands of farms in the Centre and North into the modernization effort.
translation_b: Regionalise the first pillar of the CAP to ensure a more equitable distribution of the aid among the various types of agriculture/regions, integrating the thousands of farms in the Central and North into the modernization effort.

translation_b: At the same time, Groen! wants to expand jobs, allowing older workers to gradually reduce their working hours through additional holidays and forms of part-time work.

text: Głos posła mniejszości niemieckiej jest obecny w dyskursie publicznym, a narzędzia, które posiada – jak chociażby możliwość wystąpienia o opinię prawną do Biura Analiz Sejmowych – powodują, że zyskuje on potężne argumenty w dyskusji.
translation_a: The voice of the German minority MP is present in the public discourse, and the tools he has - such as the ability to request a legal opinion from the Office of Parliamentary Analyses - mean that he gains powerful arguments in the discussion.
translation_b: The voice of a German minority member is present in the public discourse, and the tools he has – such as the possibility of applying for a legal opinion to the Office of Seimas Analysis – make him gain powerful arguments in the discussion.

translation_b: Not by chance, once again, the strongest symbol of a civic and moral upsurge came from the women’s movement.

translation_a: This also requires a stronger perspective on diversity in mainstream youth work.

text: В этом смысле русская идея – синоним российской идеи, то есть идеи всех россиян, не отделяющих свою судьбу от судьбы русского народа, и считающих себя подлинными патриотами своей страны, независимо от своей национальной принадлежности.
translation_a: In this sense, the Russian idea is synonymous with the Russian idea, that is, the idea of all Russians who do not separate their fate from the fate of the Russian people, and who consider themselves true patriots of their country, regardless of their nationality.
translation_b: In this sense, the Russian idea is synonymous with the Russian idea, that is, the ideas of all Russians who do not separate their fate from the fate of the Russian people, and who consider themselves true patriots of their country, regardless of their nationality.

text: Aujourd’hui, l’ascenseur social est en panne en Europe : les catégories sociales populaires ont moins de chances de connaître une amélioration de leur condition, et également de voir leurs enfants progresser, que la génération précédente.
translation_a: Today, the social elevator has broken down in Europe: the working classes are less likely than the previous generation to experience an improvement in their situation, and also to see their children progress.
translation_b: Today, the social elevator is breaking down in Europe: popular social categories are less likely to experience an improvement in their condition, and also to see their children progress, than the previous generation.

text: Zpřesníme monitoring kvality půdy a vůči přestupcům zavedeme sankce.
translation_a: We will refine soil quality monitoring and introduce sanctions against offenders.
translation_b: We will streamline the monitoring of soil quality and introduce sanctions against offenders.

translation_b: We will put special emphasis on ensuring that health coverage includes access to pharmaceutical products and health services.

translation_a: Encourage entrepreneurship by all means and introduce generous incentives to attract investment.
translation_b: Encourage entrepreneurship by all means and establish bold incentives to attract investment.

translation_b: The Armed Forces of Ukraine must be built on the principle of reasonable self-sufficiency, on a professional (contractual) basis.

translation_a: We will facilitate access to existing municipal ducts to reduce costs and save time in the extension of fiber networks.
translation_b: We will facilitate access to existing municipal channels to reduce and save time on the extension of fiber networks.

text: Met de op een na grootste haven en de grootste petrochemische cluster van Europa op ons grondgebied, het dichtste spoorwegnet en een hoogopgeleide bevolking liggen de kansen voor het grijpen.

translation_b: With Europe’s second-largest port and largest petrochemical cluster on our territory, the most dense railway network and a highly educated population, there are opportunities to seize.

translation_b: In this legislature, thanks to the initiative of the Democratic Party, resources for universities and research have again increased, after the season of center-right cuts.

text: So können besonders gefährdete Wohngebiete erkannt und gezielt mit Polizeistreifen überwacht werden.

translation_b: Thus, vulnerable residential areas can be identified and targeted with police stripes.

text: Abogar porque los gobiernos municipales desarrollen de manera directa o con otros órganos del Estado funciones relacionadas con salud pública y asistencia social, educación y cultura, protección del medio ambiente, turismo, transporte y tránsito públicos, deporte y recreación, construcción y mantenimiento de caminos vecinales y obras de infraestructura.

translation_b: To advocate that municipal governments develop directly or with other state bodies functions related to public health and social assistance, education and culture, environmental protection, tourism, public transport and transit, sport and recreation, construction and maintenance of neighboring roads and infrastructure works.

text: Nos últimos anos, o governo induziu as plenárias, para contemplar seus próprios objetivos, por meio da ação de grupos previamente formados, para interferir nos debates e no acolhimento de propostas, o que levou representantes legítimos de vários setores culturais a se afastar dos colegiados setoriais.
translation_a: In recent years, the government has induced the plenary sessions to meet its own objectives, through the action of previously formed groups, to interfere in the debates and the acceptance of proposals, which has led legitimate representatives from various cultural sectors to distance themselves from the sectoral collegiate bodies.
translation_b: In recent years, the government has induced the plenaries, to contemplate its own goals, through the action of previously formed groups, to interfere in the debates and in the reception of proposals, which has led legitimate representatives from various cultural sectors to move away from the sectoral collegiates.

text: Os instrumentos que colocaremos em ação permitirão promover o desenvolvimento, gerar emprego e distribuir renda.
translation_a: The instruments we will put into action will make it possible to promote development, generate employment and distribute income.
translation_b: The instruments we will put into action will help promote development, generate jobs and distribute income.

text: Запровадимо систему грошової винагороди для громадян за виявлення корупції.
translation_a: We will introduce a system of monetary rewards for citizens for detecting corruption.
translation_b: Implement a system of monetary rewards for citizens for the detection of corruption.

text: Il giudice, tenuto conto della entità del patrimonio dell'inquinatore e della gravità del danno, può imporre al condannato di prestare idonea cauzione, determinandone l'ammontare in misura comunque non inferiore al doppio dei costi di bonifica.
translation_a: The court, taking into account the extent of the polluter's assets and the severity of the damage, may require the convicted person to provide suitable security, determining the amount in any case not less than twice the cost of remediation.
translation_b: The court, taking into account the extent of the property of the polluter and the severity of the damage, may order the convicted person to pay an appropriate deposit, determining the amount in any case not less than twice the cost of recovery.

text: Wir sehen und fördern Kunst und Kultur auch als Schlüssel zur Beteiligung gesellschaftlich benach-teiligter Bevölkerungsgruppen – in der Stadt-, Quartiers- und Regionalentwicklung, bei Bauprojekten, der Anlage und Gestaltung von öffentlichen Freiräumen, in der Umweltbildung und für die ständige Entwicklung neuer Kulturangebote.
translation_a: We also see and promote art and culture as the key to the participation of socially disadvantaged population groups - in urban, neighborhood and regional development, in construction projects, the creation and design of public open spaces, in environmental education and for the continuous development of new cultural offerings.
translation_b: We also see and promote art and culture as the key to the participation of socially adjacent populations – in urban, neighborhood and regional development, in construction projects, the installation and design of public open spaces, in environmental education and for the constant development of new cultural offerings.

text: Trebuie acordată o atenție majoră dezvoltării spațiilor rurale, deoarece nivelul de trai a celor ce trăiesc în aceste zone în multe cazuri este foarte scăzut, iar șansele găsirii unui loc de muncă sau a continuării studiilor sunt minime.
translation_a: Major attention needs to be paid to the development of rural areas, as the standard of living of those living in these areas is in many cases very low and the chances of finding a job or continuing their education are minimal.
translation_b: Particular attention should be paid to the development of rural areas, as the standard of living of those living in these areas is in many cases very low and the chances of finding a job or continuing studies are minimal.

text: Mandat otrzymać powinni ci, którzy są najbardziej związani z Polską lokalną i będą zawsze blisko ludzkich spraw.

translation_b: The mandate should be given to those who are most connected with local Poland and will always be close to human affairs.

text: Engelli çocuğu olan annelere ilave gün hakkı verdik.

translation_b: We have given the mothers of disabled children an extra day.

text: Diese Erfolge waren aber erst der anfang, denn noch immer gibt es eine reihe von lücken, die es zu schließen gilt.

translation_b: But these successes were only the beginning, because there are still a number of gaps that need to be filled.

text: Voor CD&V vormt naast solidariteit ook het verzekeringsprincipe een essentieel onderdeel van de sociale bescherming.
translation_a: For CD&V, in addition to solidarity, the principle of insurance is an essential part of social protection.
translation_b: For CD&V, in addition to solidarity, the insurance principle is also an essential part of social protection.

text: Al Estado le corresponde apoyar preferentemente: a las agriculturas más débiles, proporcionándoles los instrumentos para que se integren a los mercados financieros, de tecnología y de capacitación.
translation_a: It is the State's responsibility to give priority support to the weakest agricultural sectors, providing them with the instruments to integrate them into the financial, technology and training markets.
translation_b: It is up to the State to preferably support the weakest agriculture by providing them with the tools to integrate into the financial, technological and training markets.

text: İşçi ve memur tüm çalışan kadınlarımıza doğuma bağlı olarak ilk çocukta 2 ay, ikinci çocukta 4 ay üçüncü ve üzeri çocukta 6 ay yarı zamanlı, tam ücretli çalışma hakkı ve çocuğun okula başlama yaşına kadar kısmi süreli çalışma hakkı tanıyacağız.
translation_a: We will grant all working women, both civil servants and workers, the right to work part-time, full-paid work for 2 months for the first child, 4 months for the second child, and 6 months for the third and more children, and the right to part-time work until the child starts school.
translation_b: Workers and officials will give all our working women the right to part-time, full-paid work for 6 months for the first child, 2 months for the second child, 4 months for the third child and older children, depending on birth, and the right to part-time work until the child starts school.

text: México es el país con mayor población migrante en el mundo con casi 13 millones de ciudadanos en el exterior.
translation_a: Mexico is the country with the largest migrant population in the world with almost 13 million citizens abroad.
translation_b: Mexico is the country with the largest migrant population in the world with 13 million citizens abroad.

text: Στην Διάσκεψη Ειρήνης των Παρισίων το 1946 το κατοχικό χρέος της Γερμανίας προς την Ελλάδα ανήρχετο σε 100 δισ. ευρώ.
translation_a: At the Paris Peace Conference in 1946, Germany's occupation debt to Greece amounted to 100 billion euros.
translation_b: At the Paris Peace Conference in 1946, Germany's occupation debt to Greece amounted to 100 billion euros.

text: O esforço deve ser conjunto: todos os poderes e todos os níveis de governo trabalhando em união e harmonia para a superação da crise institucional, econômica, social e moral.
