translation_b: The effort must be joint: all powers and all levels of government working in unity and harmony to overcome the institutional, economic, social and moral crisis.

text: Зробимо допомогу родинам, де є інваліди, не менше двох тисяч гривень на місяць.

translation_b: We will help families where there are disabled people, not less than two thousand UAH per month.

text: İnancı ne olursa olsun, insana insan olduğu için her yerde sahip çıkacağız, saygı göstereceğiz.
translation_a: We will protect and respect people everywhere because they are human beings, regardless of their beliefs.
translation_b: No matter what faith, we will have respect everywhere because we are human.

text: Ülkemiz, özellikle gelişmekte olan ülkelerin sorun ve beklentilerini dile getirmede önemli bir rol üslenmektedir.

translation_b: Our country plays an important role in expressing the problems and expectations of developing countries in particular.

text: Cezaevlerinde doluluk oranından ötürü insanlık onuruna aykırı koşullar açığa çıkmaktadır.

translation_b: Conditions in prison are contrary to human dignity.

text: El desarrollo de las potencialidades humanas con respeto irrestricto a las diferencias culturales y de género.

translation_b: The development of human potentialities with unrestricted respect for cultural and gender differences.

text: We geven onderzoekers het recht om onderzoeksdata openbaar te maken.

translation_b: We give researchers the right to publish research data.

text: Конституційне підтвердження права народу на володіння природними ресурсами, землею, виробничими активами.
translation_a: Constitutional confirmation of the people's right to own natural resources, land, and productive assets.
translation_b: Constitutional confirmation of the right of the people to own natural resources, land, production assets.

text: Também incentiva os setores algodoeiro e de química fina a desenvolver insumos diferenciados.
translation_a: It also encourages the cotton and fine chemicals sectors to develop differentiated inputs.
translation_b: It also encourages the cotton and fine chemical sectors to develop differentiated inputs.

text: Najważniejszymi z nich są rodzina i naród.
translation_a: The most important of these are the family and the nation.
translation_b: The most important are the family and the people.

text: Усиление уголовной ответственности за преступления против жизни, здоровья и собственности граждан.
translation_a: Strengthening criminal liability for crimes against the life, health and property of citizens.
translation_b: Strengthening criminal liability for crimes against the life, health and property of citizens.

text: Peu de temps après sa mise en marche, on a découvert que des subventions étaient gérées dans la confusion la plus totale par Développement des ressources humaines (DRHC) et que des proches du Parti libéral du Canada en profitaient.
translation_a: Shortly after its launch, it was discovered that Human Resources Development Canada (HRDC) was mismanaging grants, and that people close to the Liberal Party of Canada were taking advantage of them.
translation_b: Shortly after its launch, it was discovered that grants were managed in the utmost confusion by Human Resource Development (HRD) and that members of the Liberal Party of Canada were taking advantage of it.

text: La crisis del sistema de Administración de Justicia debe pasar por una escogencia transparente y de evaluación de mérito y trayectoria profesional de los aspirantes, siempre con amplia publicidad y escrutinio público que se sugiere sea por votación directa y secreta de los ciudadanos, estos Magistrados que conforman la Corte Suprema de Justicia, deben garantizar la implementación efectiva de una carrera judicial, bases sobre las cuales se deben consolidar un sistema de administración de justicia independiente y transparente, para lo cual deben establecer un cronograma para su ejecución, como un proceso institucionalizado de una real carrera judicial.
translation_a: The crisis of the system of Administration of Justice must go through a transparent selection and evaluation of merit and professional trajectory of the candidates, always with wide publicity and public scrutiny, which is suggested to be by direct and secret vote of the citizens, these Magistrates that make up the Supreme Court of Justice, must guarantee the effective implementation of a judicial career, bases on which they must consolidate a system of independent and transparent administration of justice, for which they must establish a timetable for its execution, as an institutionalized process of a real judicial career.
translation_b: The crisis of the Justice Administration system must go through a transparent selection and evaluation of merit and professional trajectory of the aspirants, always with wide publicity and public scrutiny that is suggested either by direct and secret voting of citizens, these Magistrates that make up the Supreme Court of Justice, must guarantee the effective implementation of a judicial career, bases on which a system of independent and transparent justice administration should be consolidated, for which they should establish a timetable for its execution, as an institutionalized process of a real judicial career.

text: Se fortalezcan los instrumentos de coordinación de la Hacienda estatal y las Haciendas Autonómicas a través de la reforma del Consejo de Política Fiscal y Financiera y, especialmente, mediante la reforma de la Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria.
translation_a: The instruments for the coordination of the State Treasury and the Autonomous Treasuries are to be strengthened through the reform of the Fiscal and Financial Policy Council and, especially, through the reform of the State Tax Administration Agency.
translation_b: Strengthen the instruments of coordination of the State Finance and Autonomous Finance through the reform of the Fiscal and Financial Policy Council and, especially, through the reform of the State Agency for Tax Administration.

text: Promover en el Consejo Superior de Trabajo un análisis y discusión de la estructura del Consejo de Salud Ocupacional, para evitar que continúe el debilitamiento en la ejecución y puesta en práctica de las políticas de Salud Ocupacional.
translation_a: Promote in the Superior Labor Council an analysis and discussion of the structure of the Occupational Health Council, in order to prevent the continued weakening of the execution and implementation of Occupational Health policies.
translation_b: Promote in the Higher Labour Council an analysis and discussion of the structure of the Occupational Health Council, to prevent continued weakening in the implementation and implementation of Occupational Health policies.

text: Exclusivismul de orice natură produce tensiuni sociale și politice.
translation_a: Exclusivism of any kind produces social and political tensions.
translation_b: Exclusivism of any nature produces social and political tensions.

translation_b: Quotas have been introduced for high-tech medical services: if the quota is exhausted - you will simply be denied help!

text: Activitatea de profesionalizare a forțelor armate se va desfășura concomitent cu menținerea serviciului militar obligatoriu, urmărindu-se realizarea unui raport corespunzător între militarii profesioniști și militarii încorporați, ce va fi corelat cu nevoile de completare ale marilor unități, ale unităților și formațiunilor, în funcție de gradele de operaționalizare ale acestora.
translation_a: The professionalisation of the armed forces will be carried out at the same time as maintaining compulsory military service, with the aim of achieving an appropriate ratio between professional and conscripts, which will be correlated with the needs of the large units, units and formations, according to their operational levels.
translation_b: The activity of professionalization of the armed forces will be carried out simultaneously with the maintenance of compulsory military service, aiming at achieving an appropriate ratio between professional and incorporated military personnel, which will be correlated with the needs of supplementation of large units, units and formations, according to their degrees of operationalization.

text: Kentlerin gelişebilmesi için yeni yatırımlar ne kadar önemli ise vasıflı iş gücünün yetiştirilmesi de aynı ölçüde önemlidir.
translation_a: As important as new investments are for the development of cities, the training of a skilled workforce is equally important.
translation_b: As important as new investments are for the development of cities, the development of skilled workforce is equally important.

text: Una nuova azione programmatrice pubblica, da determinarsi e realizzarsi anche con il concorso dei privati, ma soprattutto democraticamente, anche in forme decentrate sul territorio, e che abbia al suo centro, in primo luogo, un grande impegno pluridecennale di riconversione ambientale.
translation_a: A new public planning action, to be determined and carried out also with the help of private individuals, but above all democratically, even in decentralized forms in the territory, and which has at its center, first and foremost, a major multi-decade commitment to environmental reconversion.
translation_b: A new public programming action, to be determined and realized also with the contribution of the private, but above all democratically, also in decentralized forms on the territory, and that has at its center, in the first place, a large multi-decade commitment to environmental reconversion.

text: En Belgique, les leviers traditionnels de la politique de mobilité et des transports sont, pour une grande part, dans les mains des régions.
translation_a: In Belgium, the traditional levers of mobility and transport policy are largely in the hands of the regions.
translation_b: In Belgium, the traditional leverage of mobility and transport policy is largely in the hands of the regions.

translation_b: Promote the voluntary participation of young people in crime prevention programmes.

text: Взамен тщетных попыток «догнать и перегнать» западные страны по всем параметрам, последовательное ускорение научной деятельности и промышленного внедрения в приоритетных областях, необходимых для ускорения развития нашей промышленности, а также в области науки, в которых достигнуты результаты, превосходящие мировые стандарты с последующим экспортом продуктов нашей передовой промышленности за рубеж.
translation_a: Instead of futile attempts to """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""catch up and overtake"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" Western countries in all parameters, consistent acceleration of scientific activity and industrial implementation in priority areas necessary to accelerate the development of our industry, as well as in the field of science in which the results exceeding world standards have been achieved with the subsequent export of products of our advanced industry abroad.
translation_b: In exchange for futile attempts to """"catch and overtake"""" Western countries in all parameters, consistent acceleration of scientific activity and industrial implementation in the priority areas necessary to accelerate the development of our industry, as well as in the field of science, in which results have been achieved that exceed the world standards with subsequent export of products of our advanced industry abroad.

text: Mit dem sozialen Arbeitsmarkt schaffen wir neue Perspektiven für Langzeitarbeitslose, die auf absehbare Zeit keine realistischen Chancen auf dem ersten Arbeitsmarkt haben.
translation_a: With the social labor market, we are creating new prospects for the long-term unemployed who have no realistic chances on the primary labor market in the foreseeable future.
translation_b: With the social labour market, we create new prospects for long-term unemployed people who in the foreseeable future do not have realistic opportunities on the first labour market.

translation_b: In this way, we can all easily see how our representatives vote, in which votes they participate and not, and which motions they support.

text: UDMR face eforturi pentru asigurarea finanţării muncii de cercetare solicitând atât părţii române cât şi celei ungare să sprijine cauza cercetării ştiinţifice maghiare din România din fonduri bugetare, şi insistă asupra accesului real al cercetătorilor maghiari din România la sursele Uniunii Europene prin construirea unui cadru instituţional adecvat.
translation_a: The RMDSU is making efforts to secure funding for research work by asking both the Romanian and Hungarian sides to support the cause of Hungarian scientific research in Romania with budgetary funds, and insists on real access for Hungarian researchers in Romania to European Union sources by building an appropriate institutional framework.
translation_b: The UDMR strives to ensure the funding of research work by calling on both the Romanian and Hungarian side to support the cause of Hungarian scientific research in Romania from budgetary funds, and insists on the actual access of Hungarian researchers from Romania to the European Union sources by building an appropriate institutional framework.

text: Die Grund- und Bürgerrechte geraten auch in parlamentarischen Demokratien immer wieder unter Druck.

translation_b: Basic and civil rights are also constantly under pressure in parliamentary democracies.

translation_b: This is the program of the excluded who have not succumbed to submission and conformism.

translation_a: The PDSR organisations - constantly reinvigorated by prestigious people of recognised professional and civic value, authentic personalities in the community where they live and work, are active in all parts of the country.
translation_b: PDSR organizations – constantly revitalized by prestigious people with a recognized professional and civic value, authentic personalities in the community in which they live and work, operate in all localities of the country.

translation_a: In 2006, we will complete Ukraine's accession to the WTO, safeguarding the interests of the state and domestic producers.
translation_b: In 2006, we will complete Ukraine’s accession to the WTO, guaranteeing the interests of the state and the domestic producer.

text: Dokończenie reformy ubezpieczeń społecznych musi respektować utrzymanie właściwych i akceptowalnych społecznie relacji pomiędzy wysokością rent i emerytur, a przede wszystkim – zagwa-rantować, iż świadczenia będą zaspokajać potrzeby świadczeniobiorców.

translation_b: The completion of the social security reform must respect the maintenance of an appropriate and socially acceptable relationship between the amounts of pensions and pensions and, above all, ensure that the benefits will meet the needs of beneficiaries.

translation_b: This ruthless, devastating conflict does not allow our country to move forward and develop as it deserves.

text: Un gouvernement libéral donnera, par l'entremise de son initiative « Le Canada numérique », la priorité à la sécurité, en collaborant à cette fin avec le secteur privé et d'autres instances gouvernementales au pays et à l'étranger.
translation_a: A Liberal government, through its """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Digital Canada"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" initiative, will make security a priority, working with the private sector and other government bodies at home and abroad.
translation_b: A liberal government will prioritize security through its Digital Canada initiative, working with the private sector and other government agencies at home and abroad.

translation_a: We want our country's international mission to be based on the nonviolent option and cooperation.
translation_b: We want our country’s international mission to be based on nonviolent choice and cooperation.

text: Asimismo, el desarrollo de habilidades digitales permitirá la reconversión de los trabajadores y trabajadoras que ocupan los puestos que sean sustituidos por la automatización.
translation_a: Likewise, the development of digital skills will enable the retraining of workers who occupy the positions that will be replaced by automation.
translation_b: The development of digital skills will also allow the reconversion of workers who occupy the positions that are replaced by automation.

text: Vom susţine limitarea şi prevenirea efectelor negative ale schimbărilor climatice şi reducerea emisiilor de gaze cu efect de seră.

translation_b: We will support limiting and preventing the adverse effects of climate change and reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

text: Основою ідеологічної доктрини партії та найголовнішим принципом її формування є визнання членами ХДП України християнського світосприймання як форми самоусвідомлення та самовираження особи, всебічне сприяння поширенню віровчення і традицій християнства на засадах екуменізму.
translation_a: The basis of the party's ideological doctrine and the most important principle of its formation is the recognition by the members of the CDU of the Christian worldview as a form of self-awareness and self-expression, and the comprehensive promotion of the Christian doctrine and traditions on the basis of ecumenism.
translation_b: The basis of the ideological doctrine of the party and the main principle of its formation is the recognition by the members of the Democratic Party of Ukraine of the Christian worldview as a form of self-awareness and self-expression of the person, the comprehensive promotion of the spread of the doctrine and traditions of Christianity on the basis of ecumenism.

translation_b: Decentralization of the healthcare system.

text: Daha adil ve eşit bir toplum inşa etmenin ön koşullarından biri doğayı korumak, yeşil adaleti sağlamaktır.

translation_b: 205 thousand farmers benefited from the application in 2004, while this number rose to 838 thousand farmers as of the end of March 2018.

text: En d’autres mots, sur base de ces chiffres, pour répondre aux défis démographiques qui attendent la Région, il faudrait construire, en moyenne, les 14 années à venir (échéance 2026) 47,4 % de logements en plus qu’en 2011 (20,9 % de plus que la moyenne des dix dernières années).
translation_a: In other words, based on these figures, to meet the demographic challenges facing the Region, we would need to build, on average, over the next 14 years (to 2026) 47.4% more homes than in 2011 (20.9% more than the average over the last ten years).
translation_b: In other words, on the basis of these figures, to meet the demographic challenges that await the Region, it would be necessary to build, on average, in the next 14 years (term 2026) 47,4% more housing than in 2011 (20,9% more than the average of the last ten years).

text: Um den Mangel an pädagogischen Fach- und Lehrkräften mit gut qualifiziertem Personal nachhaltig bewältigen zu können, wollen wir mit einem Bund-Länder- Programm hochwertige Quereinstiegsbildung fördern, bestehende Weiterbildungs- und Qualifizierungsangebote stärken und gemeinsame Qualitätsstandards sichern.
translation_a: In order to be able to overcome the shortage of educational specialists and teachers with well-qualified personnel in the long term, we want to promote high-quality lateral entry training with a federal-state program, strengthen existing further training and qualification offers and ensure common quality standards.
translation_b: In order to sustainably cope with the shortage of educational specialists and teachers with well-qualified staff, we aim to promote high-quality cross-level education with a federal program, strengthen existing training and qualification offers and ensure common quality standards.

text: Promover una política de medicamentos basada en el acceso universal, la comercialización, el control de calidad y el uso racional de éstos.

translation_b: Promote a medicine policy based on universal access, marketing, quality control and rational use.

text: Σημαντικές βελτιώσεις χρειάζονται και στο σύστημα εισαγωγής στην τριτοβάθμια εκπαίδευση.

translation_b: Significant improvements are also needed in the system of admission to higher education.

text: Nejen proto je třeba posílit status seniora ve společnosti i jeho postavení v rodině a usilovat o větší informovanost o problematice stárnutí, stáří a mezigenerační solidarity.

text: La modul cantitativ, pierderile prin asimilare suferite de către populaţia de etnie maghiară survin în marea majoritate în oraşe unde trăiesc comunităţi maghiare de mai multe mii sau zeci de mii de suflete.

text: Se fortalecerán los sistemas de comercialización justa y los circuitos cortos de producción en los que se minimice el concurso de intermediarios, para evitar que la presión sobre los precios de los productos agrícolas obligue al campesinado a buscar otras fuentes de sustento y migrar a la ciudad.

translation_b: Fair marketing systems and short circuits of production in which the competition of intermediaries is minimized will be strengthened, to prevent pressure on the prices of agricultural products from forcing peasants to seek other sources of livelihood and migrate to the city.

text: Таке розуміння прав людини та її відносин з державою принципово протистоїть марксистському, в якому робиться наголос на права громадянські, в основі яких лише громадянська цінність людини, її відповідність державній волі, піднесеній у ранг закону.
translation_a: This understanding of human rights and their relationship with the state is fundamentally opposed to the Marxist one, which emphasizes civil rights, based on the civic value of a person and his or her compliance with the state will, which is elevated to the rank of law.
translation_b: Such an understanding of human rights and its relations with the state is fundamentally opposed to the Marxist, in which the emphasis is placed on civil rights, on the basis of which only the civil value of the person, its conformity to the state will, raised to the rank of law.

text: In questo mutato quadro normativo, si modifica anche l'assetto delle aziende di gestione, che tendono ad operare superando definitivamente i tradizionali confini amministrativi comunali per assumere progressivamente la forma di aziende sovraterritoriali, attraverso integrazioni orizzontali, per diversificare la produzione in più ambiti settoriali, o attraverso integrazioni verticali, per accrescere il proprio posizionamento nelle diverse filiere di servizi.
translation_a: In this changed regulatory framework, there is also a change in the structure of management companies, which tend to operate by definitively transcending traditional municipal administrative boundaries to gradually take the form of supra-territorial companies, either through horizontal integrations, to diversify production across multiple sectoral areas, or through vertical integrations, to increase their positioning in different service chains.

translation_a: The whole debate on Health and Welfare (which together absorb an expenditure of more than 400 trillion equivalent to about 22 percent of GDP) has swung between two absurd extremes: cut indiscriminately, and consequently produce serious wounds in the welfare state and the Social Body, or leave things as they are.

translation_a: The EU funds for rural development will finance a program that has already been colloquially called """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Cow plus,"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" which, according to its actual content, we are laboriously calling """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Welfare plus,"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" and to which we intend to allocate at least 30% and, as farmers become interested in this program, even more of the rural development funds provided for Poland for 2021-2027.
translation_b: From the EU funds for rural development will be financed the program, which has already been commonly called “Krowa plus”, and which according to its actual content we call “Dobrostan plus” and to which we intend to allocate at least 30%, and as far as farmers are interested in this program even more funds for rural development, provided for Poland for the period 2021-2027.

text: Při výstavbě zemědělských provozů budou upřednostňovány rekonstrukce „venkovských brownfields“.

text: Jednym z przejawów imposybilizmu jest krępo-wanie możliwości działania władzy wykonawczej, której kompetencje zostały w nieracjonalny i niepre-cyzyjny sposób rozdzielone, a jednocześnie przyzna-nie organom o kompetencjach „negatywnych”, takim jak Trybunał Konstytucyjny, możliwości w praktyce dowolnego blokowania władzy ustawodawczej i wy- konawczej oraz „kreatywnego” definiowania zakresu swoich uprawnień.
translation_a: One of the manifestations of impossibilism is the fettering of the ability of the executive branch, whose competencies have been irrationally and imprecisely distributed, while at the same time granting bodies with """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""negative"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" competencies, such as the Constitutional Court, the ability in practice to block the legislative and executive powers at will and to """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""creatively"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" define the scope of their powers.
translation_b: One of the manifestations of impossibilism is the limitation of the ability of the executive to act, whose powers have been irrationally and unpredictably divided, while at the same time not granting to bodies with “negative” powers, such as the Constitutional Court, the possibility in practice of any blocking of the legislative and executive powers and “creative” defining the scope of their powers.

text: Je pense qu’il est temps de rendre effectif le principe posé à l’article 8 de la Constitution de 1946,qui fait partie des Droits de l’homme et principes de souveraineté nationale sur lesquels repose notreRépublique, selon lequel tout travailleur participe, par l’intermédiaire de ses délégués, non seulementà la détermination collective des conditions de travail, mais aussi à la gestion des entreprises.
translation_a: I think it's time to give effect to the principle laid down in Article 8 of the 1946 Constitution, which is one of the human rights and principles of national sovereignty on which our Republic is based, according to which all workers participate, through their representatives, not only in the collective determination of working conditions, but also in the management of companies.
translation_b: I think it is time to make effective the principle laid down in Article 8 of the 1946 Constitution, which is part of the Human Rights and principles of national sovereignty on which our Republic is based, according to which every worker participates, through his delegates, not only in the collective determination of working conditions, but also in the management of companies.

text: Anche le politiche sociali ed economiche incentrate sulla difesa dei più deboli e sulla promozione di un sistema di pari opportunità richiedono che il merito diventi la bussola di una competizione positiva sul terreno della responsabilità e che ogni cittadino sia chiamato a corrispondere ai doveri fiscali in relazione al proprio patrimonio con fermezza e severità.
translation_a: Social and economic policies focused on defending the weakest and promoting a system of equal opportunity also require that merit become the compass of positive competition on the terrain of responsibility and that every citizen be called upon to correspond to fiscal duties in relation to his or her wealth firmly and severely.

text: Para cerrar la brecha que nos separa de los países más adelantados de la revolución científica y técnica se hace necesario un decidido apoyo del Estado en sus diferentes escalas y del sector productivo, y una reforma en la financiación de la educación superior, que asocie los subsidios a la oferta a la generación efectiva de externalidades para sentar las bases materiales de un sistema nacional de ciencia y tecnología, concebido como estrategia para colocar a Colombia en condiciones de defender y preservar su soberanía en esta nueva fase del mercado mundial, signada por la más aguda competencia derivada de la creciente aplicación de altas tecnologías a la producción.
translation_a: In order to close the gap that separates us from the most advanced countries in the scientific and technical revolution, it is necessary to have strong support from the State in its different scales and from the productive sector, and a reform in the financing of higher education, which associates subsidies to supply with the effective generation of externalities to lay the material foundations of a national system of science and technology, conceived as a strategy to place Colombia in conditions to defend and preserve its sovereignty in this new phase of the world market, marked by the most acute competition derived from the growing application of high technologies to production.
translation_b: To close the gap that separates us from the most advanced countries of the scientific and technical revolution, a decisive support of the State in its different scales and the productive sector is necessary, and a reform in the financing of higher education, which associates subsidies with the offer to the effective generation of externalities to set the material bases of a national system of science and technology, conceived as a strategy to place Colombia in the conditions of defending and preserving its sovereignty in this new phase of the world market, signed by the most acute competition derived from the growing application of high technologies to production.

translation_b: The pervasiveness of knowledge in the new productive paradigm (from the techno-scientific complex to the collection-processing-management of information/data) shows how the system of knowledge and scientific research have taken on an increasingly central role in determining the decisive characteristics of the future of our societies.

text: La nostra proposta di programma vuole quindi andare al di là della scadenza elettorale, non solo perché si proietta per il tempo dell’intera legislatura, ma soprattutto perché si riferisce ad un progetto di ricostruzione di un nuovo blocco sociale, attorno a quelle figure di lavoratori, manuali e intellettuali, divise e contrapposte dai processi di riorganizzazione capitalistica del lavoro - entro la globalizzazione che ha dominato gli anni più recenti, che a tutti gli effetti ha assunto i caratteri di una vera “rivoluzione restauratrice” di un ordine sociale capitalistico – e che dunque bisogna riunificare.
translation_a: Our proposed program therefore wants to go beyond the electoral deadline, not only because it is projected for the time of the entire legislature, but above all because it refers to a project for the reconstruction of a new social bloc, around those figures of workers, manual and intellectual, divided and opposed by the processes of capitalist reorganization of labor -- within the globalization that has dominated the most recent years, which to all intents and purposes has taken on the characteristics of a true """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""restorative revolution"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" of a capitalist social order -- and which therefore must be reunified.
translation_b: Our program proposal therefore wants to go beyond the electoral deadline, not only because it is projected for the time of the entire legislature, but above all because it refers to a project of reconstruction of a new social block, around those figures of workers, manual and intellectual, divided and opposed by the processes of capitalist reorganization of labor - within the globalization that has dominated the most recent years, which in any event has taken the characteristics of a true “restaurative revolution” of a capitalist social order – and which therefore must be reunited.

translation_b: The precautionary principle is a risk management tool that can be invoked when there is scientific uncertainty about a potential risk to human health or the environment arising from a particular action or policy.

translation_b: After all, it is possible to re-establish the ZSK - citizens themselves create a cooperative, receive a plot, contribute 30% and then for 20 years pay the rest of the value from the salary.

translation_b: The low overall level of social spending, already mentioned earlier, is made evident by the fact that, as noted by the Istat, pensions constitute an indispensable yet of rescue for millions of Italians close to the poverty line.

translation_b: Indeed, women continue to face greater difficulties in accessing employment, including their first employment, and in advancing their professional careers, with particular emphasis on their reduced presence in economic decision-making places.

translation_b: Europe has a shared responsibility for refugees who are persecuted or in great need and therefore are entitled to protection.

text: În perioada următoare rămâne una dintre cele mai importante sarcini politice ale comunităţii noastre ca prin prezenţă şi atenţie continuă să urmărim la nivel local şi naţional toate deciziile care vizează interesele educaţionale ale membrilor comunităţii noastre pentru a fi capabili să reacţionăm rapid faţă de orice decizie care lezează sau ignoră interesele comunităţii maghiare.
translation_a: In the coming period, it remains one of the most important political tasks of our community that through continuous presence and attention we follow up at local and national level all decisions that concern the educational interests of our community members in order to be able to react quickly to any decision that harms or ignores the interests of the Hungarian community.
translation_b: In the coming period, it remains one of the most important political tasks of our community that through presence and attention we continue to monitor at the local and national level all decisions aimed at the educational interests of our community members in order to be able to react quickly to any decision that hurts or ignores the interests of the Hungarian community.

text: Приоритет для ЕДИНОЙ РОССИИ - развитие агропромышленного комплекса.

translation_b: The priority for UNITED RUSSIA is the development of the agro-industrial complex.

text: Запровадження муніципальних органів правопорядку.

translation_a: The MNR maintains that underdevelopment is a terrible sequel to the maturation of the unregulated capitalist system; that the status of """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Underdeveloped"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" is a condition of national alienation, by which Bolivia discovers that what it produces turns against it in International Trade.
translation_b: The MNR argues that underdevelopment is a terrible sequel to the maturing of the unregulated capitalist system; that the status of “underdeveloped” is a condition of national alienation, by which Bolivia discovers that what it produces turns against it in International Trade.

text: Зведення прав людини до рівня громадянських з їхнім дарованим характером, повністю вписується в систему тотальної державності і є засобом соціалізації (одержавлення) індивіда на противагу принципові людської суверенності.
translation_a: Reducing human rights to the level of civil rights with their bestowed nature fully fits into the system of total statehood and is a means of socializing (enslaving) an individual as opposed to the principle of human sovereignty.
translation_b: The reduction of human rights to the level of civil rights with their gifted character fully fits into the system of total statehood and is a means of socialization (statalization) of the individual in opposition to the principle of human sovereignty.

text: Μια σύντομη επισκόπηση των σχέσεων κράτους και κοινωνίας τα τελευταία χρόνια, αρκεί για να διαπιστώσουμε ότι όλες οι προσχηματικές προσπάθειες βελτίωσης κατέληξαν σε εκτρωματικά αποτελέσματα.
translation_a: A brief review of state-society relations in recent years is enough to show that all the pretended efforts to improve them have resulted in abortive results.
translation_b: A brief overview of the relations between state and society in recent years is sufficient to conclude that all pretentious efforts to improve have resulted in disproportionate results.

translation_b: Considering that the ratio of public deficits to GDP is not more than 3 percent is one of the Maastricht criteria, the magnitude of public deficits in our country is better understood.

translation_b: We will ensure a significant acceleration of the reconstruction and reconstruction of roads of the 1st class.

translation_b: The state has no other funds except those taken from the pockets of the citizens.

translation_b: The low remuneration for the provision of services, whether of complementary public, philanthropic or private networks, needs to be discussed with urgency, because it causes inefficiencies and compromises the quality of care.

text: A escolaridade obrigatória de 12 anos, dividida entre o ensino básico com nove anos de duração e organizado em três ciclos de ensino, e o ensino secundário com duração de três anos, é excessivamente segmentada, obrigando os alunos a várias transições e ruturas, o que não contribui para o combate ao insucesso escolar.
translation_a: Compulsory schooling of 12 years, divided between basic education of nine years' duration and organized into three cycles of education, and secondary education of three years' duration, is excessively segmented, forcing students into several transitions and breaks, which does not contribute to combating school failure.

text: Già nel 1968 la Commissione interministeriale De Marchi, produsse un piano per la sicurezza idrogeologica dell’intero Paese prevedendo un articolato complesso di opere ed interventi distribuito nell'arco di 30 anni per una spesa di circa 9.000 miliardi di lire (circa 76 miliardi di euro, fabbisogno di circa 2,5 miliardi di euro per anno 1,6 per mille del PIL), ma il progetto non venne attuato.

translation_b: Volunteering must prevail, but public authorities must encourage, through a broad campaign, the development of sports practices that carry positive values in them.

text: Доверие к обязательствам российского государства перед инвесторами должно быть полностью восстановлено, а внутренний долг - будет неукоснительно обслуживаться.
translation_a: Confidence in the Russian state's obligations to investors must be fully restored, and domestic debt must be rigorously serviced.

text: Haremos una defensa de las políticas públicas en educación, en políticas de vivienda y en políticas sociales.

text: Susţinem protejarea patrimoniului natural şi a biodiversităţii, prin promovarea utilizării şi a dezvoltării tehnologiilor care respectă mediul, în principal în domeniul transportului.

text: Liczne przypadki uchylania przez TK już obowiązujących ustaw i rozporządzeń – często po wielu latach ich funkcjonowania – powodują poważne komplikacje, niepewność i lekceważenie prawa.

text: Il est dans l'intérêt du Canada d'attirer les meilleurs étudiants étrangers, surtout ceux qui proviennent des puissances économiques émergentes, et de maintenir leurs liens avec le Canada une fois leurs études terminées.
translation_a: It's in Canada's interest to attract the best foreign students, especially those from emerging economic powers, and to maintain their ties with Canada once they've completed their studies.
translation_b: It is in Canada’s interest to attract the best international students, especially those from emerging economic powers, and to maintain their ties with Canada once they have completed their studies.

text: Completare la capitolul IX.Bursele de studiu pentru studenţi vor creşte la 150.000 lei, bursele de merit la 175.000 lei, iar bursele de ajutor social la 140.000 lei.

translation_b: Strict housing for animals requires interventions such as snail caps, animals are transported over enormous distances to be slaughtered or fed, and exhibit stress and cannibalistic behavior due to improper breeding and the way they are kept.

text: Ce serait à ces tribunaux épaulés par les expertises et l’assistance de justice, à décider du lieu d’internement, de la libération à l’essai et de la désignation du service chargé du suivi après libération.

text: PiS stawia na rozwój gospodarki polskiej, gospodarki konkurencyjnej, bazującej na innowacjach i nowych technologiach, na wykorzystaniu potencjału polskiej nauki.

translation_b: PiS is focused on the development of the Polish economy, a competitive economy based on innovation and new technologies, on the use of the potential of Polish science.

text: Como se ha recogido en el documento de Oviedo (conclusiones de la primera conferencia de Asambleas Legislativas Regionales Europeas -CALRE-), “… la acción de la Comunidad Europea, de conformidad con el principio de subsidiariedad, no sólo afecta a los estados miembros, sino también a sus entidades, en la medida en que éstas disponen de un poder legislativo propio que les confiere el derecho constitucional nacional"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_a: As stated in the Oviedo document (conclusions of the first conference of European Regional Legislative Assemblies -CALRE-), """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""... the action of the European Community, in accordance with the principle of subsidiarity, affects not only the member states, but also their entities, insofar as they have their own legislative power conferred on them by national constitutional law"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_b: As has been recognised in the document of Oviedo (conclusions of the first conference of European Regional Legislative Assemblies -CALRE-), “...the action of the European Community, in accordance with the principle of subsidiarity, not only affects the member states, but also its entities, to the extent that they have a legislative power that confers them the national constitutional right.”

text: Ci muoviamo nel solco degli obiettivi sostenibili 2030 delle Nazioni unite e dell’accordo di Parigi.

text: Intenzivněji využité území s vyšší hustotou bytů bude moci získat až 100 000 Kč na každou jednotku za šetrné chování v daném území.

text: Il faut assurer une continuité dans l’engagement de nouvelles recrues avec une surveillance constante du processus de recrutement.

text: C’est pourquoi nous proposons de faire en sorte que les responsables de Fédérations et les acteurs principaux puissent bénéficier de crédits d’heures auprès de leur employeur afin d’assister à des formations, à des réunions entre responsables de Fédérations, à l’AISF ou au COIB qui leur donneront un accès plus simple et plus rapide à l’information, à un réseau, au cadre mis en place par la FWB ainsi qu’aux obligations légales que les Fédérations sportives sont censées remplir.
translation_a: That's why we're proposing that federation managers and key players should be able to claim time credits from their employers to attend training courses, meetings between federation managers, the AISF or the COIB, which will give them easier and quicker access to information, to a network, to the framework set up by the FWB and to the legal obligations that sports federations are expected to meet.
translation_b: That is why we propose to ensure that Federation leaders and key stakeholders can benefit from credit hours from their employer to attend training sessions, meetings between Federation leaders, the AISF or the COIB that will give them easier and faster access to information, a network, the framework set up by the FWB as well as the legal obligations that the Sports Federations are supposed to meet.

text: Se conformer aux directives européennes et internationales en matière d'efficacité de l'aide et mettre sur pied une concertation entre tous les acteurs de la coopération au développement qui aurait pour objectif la rédaction d’un plan d’action visant la qualité et l’efficacité de l’aide directe et indirecte.
translation_a: Comply with European and international guidelines on aid effectiveness, and set up a dialogue between all development cooperation players, with the aim of drawing up an action plan to improve the quality and effectiveness of direct and indirect aid.
translation_b: To comply with European and international guidelines on aid effectiveness and to establish a consultation between all stakeholders of development cooperation aimed at drawing up an action plan for the quality and effectiveness of direct and indirect aid.

text: Garantimos a liberdade de imprensa, mas ficou o monopólio dos meios de comunicação.

text: Spesso le aziende, anche quando a conoscenza, rinunciano alla Formazione Finanziata a causa delle difficoltà organizzative di progettazione e rendicontazione: noi proponiamo quindi, da un lato dei meccanismi più agili e semplici ed uguali per tutte le Regioni (alle Regioni spetta normalmente il compito di erogare i fondi), dall’altro meccanismi più trasparenti di assegnazione dei fondi.
translation_a: Often companies, even when aware, give up on Financed Training because of the organizational difficulties of planning and reporting: we therefore propose, on the one hand, more agile and simple mechanisms that are the same for all regions (the regions are normally in charge of disbursing the funds), and on the other hand, more transparent mechanisms for allocating funds.
translation_b: Often companies, even when they know, give up the Financed Training due to the organizational difficulties of planning and reporting: we therefore propose, on the one hand, the most agile and simple and equal mechanisms for all Regions (the Regions normally have the task of providing funds), on the other hand, more transparent mechanisms of allocation of funds.

text: Для досягнення цієї мети необхідна мобілізація всіх патріотичних і демократичних сил на активну діяльність на державотворчій ниві і в протистоянні старорежимним реакційним силам.

text: Ante el riesgo de escasez de agua que sufre Colombia (a pesar de contar con un potencial hídrico que es seis veces el promedio mundial y cuatro veces el suramericano) es necesario elevar a rango constitucional el conjunto de bienes de uso público que se relacionan con el agua, en procura de una mayor protección y una menor vulnerabilidad a los cambios legislativos.
translation_a: Given the risk of water scarcity in Colombia (despite having a water potential that is six times the world average and four times the South American average), it is necessary to elevate to constitutional rank the set of public goods related to water, in order to provide greater protection and less vulnerability to legislative changes.
translation_b: In the face of the risk of water scarcity that suffers Colombia (despite having a water potential that is six times the world average and four times the South American) it is necessary to raise to constitutional rank the set of public use goods that are related to water, in order to provide greater protection and a lower vulnerability to legislative changes.

text: Vediamo, ad esempio, con favore l’istituzione del Tribunale della Famiglia, in grado di accorpare i diversi settori giurisdizionali attualmente esistenti, di specializzarsi per l’area tematica e trattare unitariamente tutti i problemi riguardanti la famiglia: dalla separazione tra coniugi, all’affidamento dei figli, alla tutela dei minori, sino al diritto penale minorile, nell’ottica dell’imprescindibile tutela dei diritti dei minori nati nel matrimonio o al di fuori di esso.
translation_a: We see, for example, with favor the establishment of the Family Court, which would be able to merge the different jurisdictional areas that currently exist, specialize by subject area, and deal unifiedly with all problems concerning the family: from separation between spouses, child custody, child protection, and even juvenile criminal law, with a view to the indispensable protection of the rights of children born in or out of wedlock.
translation_b: We see, for example, with favour the establishment of the Family Tribunal, capable of bringing together the various jurisdictions currently existing, of specialising in the thematic area and of treating unitarily all problems concerning the family: from separation between spouses, to the custody of children, to the protection of children, to the criminal law of children, in the view of the indispensable protection of the rights of children born in marriage or outside it.

text: Вважаючи одним з найважливіших завдань здійснення демократизації політичної системи, забезпечення справжнього народовладдя і посилення контролю з боку трудящих за усіма органами управління, комуністи виступають за розробку і прийняття такої нової Конституції України, яка б закріпила демократичні засади і соціалістичну спрямованість розвитку нашого суспільства, соціальні гарантії, які вже мали трудящі, і систему Рад народних депутатів, виключала можливість встановлення в республіці авторитарної диктатури.
translation_a: Considering one of the most important tasks to be the democratization of the political system, ensuring genuine democracy and strengthening workers' control over all governing bodies, the communists advocate the development and adoption of a new Constitution of Ukraine that would enshrine the democratic principles and socialist orientation of our society, the social guarantees already enjoyed by workers and the system of Soviets of People's Deputies, and exclude the possibility of establishing an authoritarian dictatorship in the republic.
translation_b: Considering one of the most important tasks of implementing the democratization of the political system, ensuring genuine people's rule and strengthening control by the workers over all bodies of government, the Communists advocate the development and adoption of such a new Constitution of Ukraine, which would consolidate the democratic principles and the socialist orientation of the development of our society, the social guarantees that the workers already had, and the system of the Councils of People's Deputies, excluding the possibility of establishing an authoritarian dictatorship in the republic.
