translation_a: MHP has prepared a long-term energy strategy taking into account that energy has political, diplomatic, environmental and humanitarian dimensions in addition to its economic dimension.
translation_b: MHP has developed a long-term energy strategy, taking into account the economic dimension of energy as well as its political, diplomatic, environmental and human dimensions.

text: Resultado de contextos de trabalho altamente competitivos e concorrenciais, este fenómeno tem vindo a ganhar escala a nível global e está a registar níveis preocupantes entre as gerações de profissionais mais jovens, o que levou a OMS a classificar o burnout, em Maio deste ano, como doença profissional.
translation_a: As a result of highly competitive work environments, this phenomenon has been gaining scale globally and is registering worrying levels among younger generations of professionals, which led the WHO to classify burnout as an occupational disease in May of this year.
translation_b: As a result of highly competitive and competitive working environments, this phenomenon has gained scale globally and is recording worrying levels among the younger generations of professionals, which has led the WHO to classify burnout, in May of this year, as a occupational disease.

text: Ми переконані, що парламентаризм, а тим більше президентська форма правління, ніколи не захищатимуть інтересів простих людей праці.
translation_a: We are convinced that parliamentarism, let alone the presidential form of government, will never protect the interests of ordinary working people.
translation_b: We are convinced that parliamentarism, especially the presidential form of government, will never defend the interests of ordinary people.

text: O achatamento salarial, os desestímulos à carreira e ao mérito produziram um êxodo dos melhores quadros da administração direta em direção à administração-indireta.
translation_a: The flattening of salaries, the disincentives to careers and merit have led to an exodus of the best staff from the direct administration to the indirect administration.
translation_b: The flat wage, the incentives to career and merit produced an exodus from the best cadres of direct administration to the indirect administration.

text: Além da exploração de classe, que se abate sobre a maioria dos brasileiros, as mulheres estão submetidas a uma opressão de sexo, que impõe uma rígida divisão de trabalho e de papéis sociais.
translation_a: In addition to class exploitation, which affects the majority of Brazilians, women are subject to gender oppression, which imposes a rigid division of labor and social roles.
translation_b: In addition to the class exploitation, which strikes the majority of Brazilians, women are subjected to a sex oppression, which imposes a rigid division of work and social roles.

text: Východiskem je, že zahraniční politiku formuluje vláda.
translation_a: The starting point is that the government formulates foreign policy.
translation_b: Foreign policy is formulated by the government.

text: Zelení budou usilovat o doplnění současné podoby antidiskriminačního zákona o možnost podání žaloby ve veřejném zájmu (actiopopularis).
translation_a: The Greens will seek to supplement the current form of the Anti-Discrimination Act with the possibility of bringing an action in the public interest (actiopopopularis).
translation_b: The Greens will seek to supplement the existing form of the anti-discrimination law with the possibility of bringing a public interest lawsuit (actiopopularis).

text: UDMR insistă ca în Consiliul Naţional Audiovizual, în conducerea societăţii de radio şi televiziune publică, respectiv în alte instituţii similare să fie prezent şi un reprezentant al comunităţii noastre etnice.
translation_a: The RMDSU insists that a representative of our ethnic community should be present in the National Audiovisual Council, in the management of the public radio and television company and in other similar institutions.
translation_b: The UDMR insists that in the National Audiovisual Council, in the management of the public radio and television company, respectively in other similar institutions, a representative of our ethnic community should also be present.

text: L’agence a pour objectif la sécurité de la chaîne alimentaire et la qualité des aliments afin de protéger la santé du consommateur.
translation_a: The agency's objective is to ensure the safety of the food chain and food quality, in order to protect consumer health.
translation_b: The Agency aims at food chain safety and food quality in order to protect consumer health.

text: Prosazením deregulačního balíčku, který již máme připravený, chceme odstranit nejkřiklavější případy zbytečné byrokracie a administrativní zátěže podnikatelů.
translation_a: By enforcing the deregulation package we have already prepared, we want to remove the most flagrant cases of unnecessary bureaucracy and administrative burden on entrepreneurs.
translation_b: By implementing the deregulation package that we already have prepared, we want to eliminate the most crippling cases of unnecessary bureaucracy and administrative burden on entrepreneurs.

text: Dovrebbe anche consentire a miliardi di utenti e oggetti intelligenti (elettrodomestici, macchine elettroniche, etc) di approdare nell’Internet of Things, ovvero l’internet delle cose, e di connettersi alle reti.
translation_a: It should also enable billions of users and smart objects (home appliances, electronic machines, etc.) to land in the Internet of Things, or the Internet of Things, and connect to networks.
translation_b: It should also allow billions of users and smart objects (electrical appliances, electronic machines, etc.) to land in the Internet of Things, or the Internet of Things, and to connect to networks.

text: Wer die Umwelt schützt, kämpft für eine lebenswerte und gerechte Welt für alle.
translation_a: Those who protect the environment fight for a livable and just world for all.
translation_b: Those who protect the environment are fighting for a life-worthy and just world for all.

text: Het laten uitvoeren van kunstjes door dieren getuigt niet van respect, terwijl hun levenslange opsluiting in kooien onacceptabel is.
translation_a: Having animals perform tricks does not show respect, while their life-long confinement in cages is unacceptable.
translation_b: The execution of crafts by animals does not show respect, while their lifelong imprisonment in cages is unacceptable.

text: Uvědomujeme si přínos digitální ekonomiky, zejména pro menší závislosti na místě.
translation_a: We recognise the benefits of the digital economy, especially for less dependence on location.
translation_b: We are aware of the benefits of the digital economy, especially for smaller location dependencies.

text: Tradičně spojuje vysokou výkonnost se solidaritou.
translation_a: Traditionally, it combines high performance with solidarity.
translation_b: It has traditionally combined high performance with solidarity.

text: Ecolo propose d’agir en intégrant systématiquement la variable « bruit » dans tout projet d’implantation, d’aménagement urbain… aux fins d’en réduire l’impact.
translation_a: Ecolo proposes to take action by systematically integrating the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""noise"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" variable into any project for new buildings, urban development, etc., in order to reduce its impact.
translation_b: Ecolo proposes to act by systematically integrating the variable “noise” into any project of deployment, urban planning... in order to reduce its impact.

text: La prima è la diretta conseguenza di una norma del Governo Berlusconi del 2008, con la quale è stato introdotto il blocco del turn-over, prevedendo che solo il 20% del personale universitario in pensionamento potesse essere rimpiazzato con nuove assunzioni.
translation_a: The first is a direct consequence of a 2008 Berlusconi government regulation that introduced a turnover freeze, stipulating that only 20 percent of retiring university staff could be replaced with new hires.
translation_b: The first is the direct consequence of a rule by the Berlusconi government in 2008, which introduced the turn-over block, providing that only 20% of university staff in retirement could be replaced with new hiring.

text: No que respeita ao meio ambiente, é crucial transformá-lo de aspecto limitante em elemento essencial no planejamento e no desenho de estratégias sustentáveis.
translation_a: As far as the environment is concerned, it is crucial to transform it from a limiting aspect into an essential element in the planning and design of sustainable strategies.
translation_b: When it comes to the environment, it is crucial to turn it from a limiting aspect to an essential element in planning and designing sustainable strategies.

text: Promovarea informatizării administrației publice, optimizării sistemelor de comunicații de date, organizării de bănci de date , nomenclatoare și registre de interes public (legislație, indicatori static, evidenta populației, cadastru , registru comercial etc.) precum și a creșterii gradului de acces al publicului.
translation_a: Promoting the computerisation of public administration, optimising data communication systems, organising data banks, nomenclatures and registers of public interest (legislation, static indicators, population register, cadastre, commercial register, etc.) and increasing public access.
translation_b: Promote the computerization of the public administration, the optimization of data communication systems, the organization of databases, nomenclators and registers of public interest (legislation, static indicators, population records, cadastral, commercial register, etc.) as well as increasing the degree of public access.

text: Большая зарплата, беспроцентный кредит на 20 лет на приобретение жилья (плюс к этому – ещё и гектар земли бесплатно) льготы по оплате ЖКХ, дороги, развитие перерабатывающих производств должны стать основой заселения этих регионов.
translation_a: Large salaries, interest-free loans for 20 years to purchase housing (plus a hectare of land for free), benefits for housing and utilities, roads, and the development of processing industries should become the basis for the settlement of these regions.
translation_b: A large salary, a interest-free loan for 20 years for the purchase of housing (plus an hectare of land for free), benefits for the payment of housing, roads, the development of processing industries should become the basis for settlement of these regions.

text: Die bisherigen Ergebnisse der Riester-Rente sind nicht zufriedenstellend.
translation_a: The results of the Riester pension so far are not satisfactory.
translation_b: So far, the results of the Riester pensions are not satisfactory.

text: Wir wollen mit neuen Produkten und Dienstleistungen unsere wirtschaftliche Entwicklung auf eine neue Basis stellen.
translation_a: We want to put our economic development on a new footing with new products and services.
translation_b: We want to put our economic development on a new basis with new products and services.

text: Ne-am declarat, încă de la începutul mandatului, ca fiind pro-business şi pro-generare de investiţii majore.
translation_a: We have declared ourselves, since the beginning of our mandate, to be pro-business and pro-generation of major investments.
translation_b: We have declared ourselves, from the beginning of our mandate, as pro-business and pro-generation of major investments.

text: Необходимо не на словах, а на деле преодолеть отношение к культуре как к чему-то третьестепенному, существующему """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""по остаточному принципу"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_a: It is necessary not in words, but in deeds to overcome the attitude to culture as something third-rate, existing """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""on the residual principle"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_b: It is necessary to overcome the attitude toward culture as to something third-level, existing """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""on the residual principle"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".

text: Wij zijn zo ongeveer de eerste generatie die de gevolgen van klimaatverandering en het verlies aan biodiversiteit kan zien en de laatste die er nog iets aan kan doen om de schade te beperken.
translation_a: We are just about the first generation to see the effects of climate change and biodiversity loss and the last to do anything about it to mitigate the damage.
translation_b: We are about the first generation to see the impacts of climate change and the loss of biodiversity and the last generation to do something to limit the damage.

text: Молодь одержить законодавчі гарантії працевлаштування і житлове кредитування.
translation_a: Young people will receive legislative guarantees of employment and housing loans.
translation_b: Youth will receive legal guarantees for employment and housing loans.

text: Совесть и труд не в почете.
translation_a: Conscience and labor are not honored.
translation_b: Conscience and work are not worthwhile.

text: La numérisation du patrimoine.
translation_a: Heritage digitization.
translation_b: Digitalization of heritage.

text: Sie prüfen die Ent-scheidung anhand der Gesetze, treffen allenfalls eine neue Entscheidung oder verweisen im Ausnahmefall die Rechtssache an die Behörde zurück.
translation_a: They review the decision on the basis of the law, make a new decision if necessary or, in exceptional cases, refer the case back to the authority.
translation_b: They review the decision in accordance with the law, make a new decision, or, in exceptional cases, refer the case back to the authority.

text: Per questo proponiamo uno spostamento progressivo della spesa sanitaria in questa direzione.
translation_a: Therefore, we propose a gradual shift of health care spending in this direction.
translation_b: Therefore, we are proposing a gradual shift in health spending in this direction.

text: Crearea unor centre internaționale de cercetare științifică pentru conservarea sistemului ecologic național și valorificarea potențialului natural al României.
translation_a: Creation of international scientific research centres for the conservation of the national ecological system and the valorisation of Romania's natural potential.
translation_b: Creation of international scientific research centers for the conservation of the national ecological system and the exploitation of Romania’s natural potential.

text: Пільги можновладцям – скасуємо.
translation_a: Let's cancel the privileges for those in power.
translation_b: Polls can be removed.

text: Se dará prioridad a las zonas que implementen cultivos de agricultura orgánica, con lo que se garantizará la dotación de agua para riego para infraestructura de 7,500 has con riego presurizado y agricultura orgánica.
translation_a: Priority will be given to areas that implement organic agriculture crops, which will guarantee the provision of water for irrigation infrastructure for 7,500 hectares with pressurized irrigation and organic agriculture.
translation_b: Priority will be given to areas that implement organic farming crops, thereby ensuring the provision of irrigation water for 7,500 ha of pressurized irrigation and organic farming infrastructure.

text: La médecine a fait beaucoup de progrès, de nombreux médicaments changent la qualité de vie et le pronostic des malades, mais les médicaments sont coûteux pour la sécurité sociale, et peuvent aussi provoquer des maladies « iatrogènes54 ».
translation_a: Medicine has made a great deal of progress, and many drugs are changing the quality of life and prognosis of patients, but drugs are expensive for the social security system, and can also cause """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""iatrogenic"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" diseases54 .
translation_b: Medicine has made a lot of progress, many medicines change the quality of life and the prognosis of the sick, but medicines are expensive for social security, and can also cause “iatrogenic” diseases.

text: Este eroarea de fond a actualei coaliții: prețul recesiunii pe care a provocat-o este mai mare decât prețul susținerii creșterii economice.
translation_a: It is the fundamental error of the current coalition: the price of the recession it has caused is higher than the price of sustaining economic growth.
translation_b: This is the fundamental mistake of the current coalition: the price of the recession it has caused is higher than the price of sustaining economic growth.

text: Мы считаем, что защита наших соотечественников за рубежом должна стать одним из приоритетов российской внешне политической стратегии.
translation_a: We believe that the protection of our compatriots abroad should become one of the priorities of Russia's foreign policy strategy.
translation_b: We believe that protecting our compatriots abroad should become one of the priorities of Russia’s foreign policy strategy.

text: Ήδη πάνω από 95% των φορολογούμενων στην Ελλάδα υποβάλλουν και διορθώνουν δηλώσεις εισοδήματος ηλεκτρονικά.
translation_a: Already more than 95% of taxpayers in Greece submit and correct income tax returns electronically.
translation_b: More than 95% of taxpayers in Greece already submit and correct their income statements electronically.

text: A escola são pessoas a aprender umas com as outras..
translation_a: School is people learning from each other.
translation_b: Schools are people who learn from each other.

text: Promuovere un’assimilazione efficace al posto di un’integrazione di facciata.
translation_a: Promoting effective assimilation instead of cosmetic integration.
translation_b: Promote effective assimilation instead of facade integration.

text: Nuestra convicción es que, para lograr un país más libre y justo, debemos generar políticas públicas que vayan en directo beneficio de la clase media y las familias más vulnerables.
translation_a: Our conviction is that, in order to achieve a freer and fairer country, we must generate public policies that go directly to the benefit of the middle class and the most vulnerable families.
translation_b: Our conviction is that, in order to a more free and just country, we must generate public policies that benefit the middle class and the most vulnerable families.

text: Two-rzono niczym nieuzasadniony klimat niechęci i po- dejrzeń wobec Centralnego Biura Antykorupcyjnego kierowanego przez Mariusza Kamińskiego, by wresz-cie przystąpić do operacji odwołania go z pełnionej funkcji i „ukręcenia głowy”, niemal na oczach opinii publicznej, wykrytej przez CBA aferze hazardowej z udziałem polityków PO i osób związanych z tą partią.
translation_a: An unjustified climate of resentment and suspicion was created against the Central Anti-Corruption Bureau headed by Mariusz Kaminski, in order to finally proceed with the operation to dismiss him from his post and """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""turn a blind eye"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""", almost in front of the public, to the gambling scandal uncovered by the CBA and involving PO politicians and people associated with the party.
translation_b: Two times the unjustified climate of reluctance and resentment towards the Central Anti-Corruption Bureau led by Mariusz Kamiński, to finally proceed to the operation of removing him from his office and “turning his head,” almost in the eyes of the public opinion, the gambling affair detected by the CBA involving politicians of the PO and people related to this party.

text: Φιλολαϊκή πολιτική δεν μπορεί να εφαρμοστεί από καμμιά δήθεν «αριστερή κυβέρνηση», γιατί η εξουσία θα βρίσκεται στα χέρια των μονοπωλίων που έχουν στα χέρια τους και την οικονομική δύναμη.
translation_a: A pro-people policy cannot be implemented by any so-called """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""left government"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""", because power will be in the hands of the monopolies, which also have economic power in their hands.
translation_b: Popular policy cannot be implemented by any so-called “left government”, because power will be in the hands of monopolies who have in their hands and economic power.

text: Türkiye plânlı kalkınmayı tahakkuk ettirebilmek üzere klâsik metodlardan sıyrılmalı ve bu kalkınmayı süratle sağlamak için bü¬yük hamle yapılmalıdır.
translation_a: In order to realize planned development, Turkey must break away from classical methods and make a great move to achieve this development rapidly.
translation_b: Turkey must be removed from the classical methods in order to enable the planned development and must be carried out rapidly in order to ensure this development.

text: También a través de una política de subsidios que ya le cuestan al país más de 35 mil millones anuales, se ha creado una economía falsa en la que se beneficia más el que sí puede pagar, a costa del eterno olvidado, el más pobre.
translation_a: Also, through a policy of subsidies that already cost the country more than 35 billion annually, a false economy has been created in which those who can pay benefit the most, at the expense of the eternally forgotten, the poorest.
translation_b: Also through a policy of subsidies that already cost the country more than 35 billion annually, a false economy has been created in which the most beneficial is the one who can pay, at the expense of the eternally forgotten, the poorest.

text: Meer invloed van de gebruikers op de planning van de gezondheidszorg op allenivo's van planning.
translation_a: More user influence on health care planning at all levels of planning.
translation_b: More user influence on health care planning on all levels of planning.

text: Úspory financí vynakládaných na veřejnou správu s podmínkou, že se nedotknou úrovně veřejných služeb a nezhorší podmínky občanů.
translation_a: Savings in public administration spending, provided they do not affect the level of public services and do not worsen citizens' conditions.
translation_b: Savings of funds spent on public administration, provided that they do not affect the level of public services and do not deteriorate the conditions of citizens.

text: Kentlerin gelişiminde, ekonomi ve ekoloji dengesini gözeteceğiz.
translation_a: We will balance economy and ecology in the development of cities.
translation_b: In the development of cities, we will monitor the economic and ecological balance.

text: Problemem jest na-tomiast niepłacenie abonamentu, co wymaga popra-wienia regulacji prawnej, a także zaprzestania przez rządzących polityków nieodpowiedzialnego kwe-stionowania sensu opłat abonamentowych.
translation_a: The problem, on the other hand, is the non-payment of subscription fees, which requires improved regulation, as well as an end to irresponsible quackery by ruling politicians about the meaning of subscription fees.
translation_b: The problem, on the other hand, is the non-payment of the subscription, which requires improved legal regulation, as well as the cessation of the irresponsible questioning of the meaning of the subscription fees by the ruling politicians.

text: As formas de sociabilidade dos brasileiros se restringem cada vez mais.
translation_a: Brazilians' forms of sociability are becoming increasingly restricted.
translation_b: The forms of sociability of Brazilians are becoming increasingly restricted.

text: Wij willen dat de Europese Unie woningcorporaties weer toestaat om te investeren in huurwoningen voor lage én middeninkomens.
translation_a: We want the European Union to again allow housing corporations to invest in rental housing for low and middle income earners.
translation_b: We want the European Union to allow housing corporations to invest in low- and middle-income rental housing.

text: Через іноземну інтервенцію та спровоковану більшовиками громадянську війну національно-демократична революція в Україні не втрималася в мирних рамках.
translation_a: Due to foreign intervention and a Bolshevik-inspired civil war, the national democratic revolution in Ukraine failed to stay within a peaceful framework.
translation_b: Due to foreign intervention and the civil war provoked by the Bolsheviks, the national-democratic revolution in Ukraine failed to stay within peaceful frameworks.

text: Αφομοίωση διεθνών επιτυχημένων πρακτικών οργάνωσης, σχεδιασμού και διακυβέρνησης μητροπολιτικών περιοχών.
translation_a: Assimilation of international successful practices of metropolitan area organisation, planning and governance.
translation_b: Mastering international successful practices of organization, planning and governance of metropolitan areas.

text: Construir un plural e integrado mundo rural productivo y participativo, garante del medio ambiente, es también uno de nuestros objetivos.
translation_a: One of our objectives is also to build a plural and integrated rural world that is both productive and participatory, while safeguarding the environment.
translation_b: Building a plural and integrated productive and participatory rural world, guarantor of the environment, is also one of our goals.

text: Le MR veut avant tout que tous les citoyens se réapproprient le projet politique européen car seule l’Europe peut nous apporter les vraies réponses ambitieuses et rassurantes à nos incertitudes, à nos doutes, à nos craintes mais aussi à nos attentes et à nos ambitions.
translation_a: Above all, the MR wants all citizens to reappropriate the European political project, because only Europe can provide us with real, ambitious and reassuring answers to our uncertainties, doubts and fears, but also to our expectations and ambitions.
translation_b: The MR wants all citizens to re-appropriate the European political project because only Europe can bring us the real ambitious and reassuring answers to our uncertainties, our doubts, our fears but also to our expectations and our ambitions.

text: Бідність багатьох сімей призводить до руйнації соціальних відносин у державі.
translation_a: The poverty of many families leads to the destruction of social relations in the country.
translation_b: The poverty of many families leads to the destruction of social relations in the state.

text: Meer in het algemeen zal in het beleid moeten worden uitgegaan van bundeling van woningbouw, niet-agrarische werkgelegenheid en voorzieningen (recreatie, cultuur).
translation_a: More generally, policies will have to rely on bundling housing, non-agricultural employment and facilities (recreation, culture).
translation_b: More generally, the policy will have to be based on combining housing, non-agricultural employment and facilities (recreation, culture).

text: Ein ganz wichtiges Element, um die Qualität in der Schule nachhaltig zu steigern, ist auch die flächendeckende Einführung eines 360°-Feedbacks.
translation_a: A very important element in sustainably increasing quality in the school is also the comprehensive introduction of 360° feedback.
translation_b: A very important element in the sustainable improvement of quality at school is the wide-ranging introduction of 360° feedback.

text: Debe sumarse la reglamentación de formas de atención al público en el exterior para que los servicios no sean interrumpidos y sean de mayor alcance territorial.
translation_a: In addition, the regulation of ways of serving the public abroad should be added so that services are not interrupted and have a wider territorial scope.
translation_b: It should be added to the regulation of forms of public attention abroad so that the services are not interrupted and are of greater territorial reach.

text: Stratejik önemi giderek artan su kaynaklarımızın korunması ve geliştirilmesi için uzun vadeli planlar uygulayacağız.
translation_a: We will implement long-term plans for the protection and development of our increasingly strategically important water resources.
translation_b: We will implement long-term plans to preserve and improve our increasingly important water resources.

text: Приоритеты ПЭВК в области культуры, определяются полиэтничностью народа Крыма, его обширными связями с различными регионами бывших союзных республик, исключительной насыщенностью полуострова памятниками культуры, архитектуры разных эпох и народов.
translation_a: The PECC's priorities in the field of culture are determined by the multi-ethnicity of the people of Crimea, its extensive ties with various regions of the former Soviet republics, the exceptional saturation of the peninsula with cultural and architectural monuments of different eras and peoples.
translation_b: Priorities of the PEVC in the field of culture are determined by the multi-ethnicity of the people of Crimea, its extensive links with various regions of the former Union republics, the exclusive saturation of the peninsula with cultural monuments, architecture of different epochs and peoples.

text: Brak odpowiedniej liczby specjalistów oraz fachowego wsparcia dla nauczy-cieli, a także zbyt duże obciążenie ich różnorodnymi zadaniami zawodo-wymi powodują, że nie można mówić o skutecznym wspomaganiu indywi-dualnego rozwoju ucznia poprzez zapewnienie mu odpowiedniej pomocy psychologiczno-pedagogicznej, dostosowanie programu nauczania czy dobór indywidualnych form i metod pracy.
translation_a: The lack of an adequate number of specialists and professional support for teachers, as well as the excessive burden of their various professional tasks, means that it is impossible to speak of effective support for the individual development of the student by providing adequate psychological and pedagogical assistance, adjusting the curriculum or selecting individual forms and methods of work.
translation_b: The lack of an adequate number of specialists and professional support for teachers, as well as the excessive burden of their diverse professional tasks, make it impossible to speak about effective support for the individual-dual development of the student by providing appropriate psychological and pedagogical assistance, adjusting the curriculum or selecting individual forms and methods of work.

text: Die SVP fordert, dass wieder höhere Anforderungen an die Gymnasias-ten und Studierenden gestellt und die Gymnasialzeit verkürzt wird.
translation_a: The SVP is calling for higher demands to be placed on grammar school pupils and students again and for the time spent at grammar school to be shortened.
translation_b: The SVP calls for higher demands on high schools and students again and for shortened high school hours.

text: Principy ekologického rozvoje musí být normou ve všech ekonomických resortech české ekonomiky.
translation_a: The principles of ecological development must be the norm in all economic sectors of the Czech economy.
translation_b: The principles of ecological development must be the norm in all economic sectors of the Czech economy.

text: Vom promova identitatea noastră naţională în complementaritate cu cea europeană, la fel de veche şi de autentică.

translation_b: We will promote our national identity in complementarity with the European one, equally ancient and authentic.

text: În condiţiile în care restructurarea a devenit o problemă critică pentru dezvoltarea în perspectivă a României, USD consideră că, la fel de critică a devenit şi nevoia de descentralizare a finanţelor.
translation_a: At a time when restructuring has become a critical issue for Romania's future development, the USD believes that the need for financial decentralisation has become equally critical.
translation_b: As restructuring has become a critical issue for Romania’s prospective development, USD considers that the need for decentralization of finances has become equally critical.

text: Neste quadro, as autarquias de maioria CDU têm demonstrado capacidade de mobilização de competências e recursos para racionalizar a ocupação do espaço e humanizar a vida nos respectivos concelhos, com resultados globalmente reconhecidos e valorizados, embora limitados pelos meios financeiros disponíveis e pelo carácter centralizador da legislação existente.
translation_a: Within this framework, the CDU majority municipalities have demonstrated their ability to mobilize competences and resources to rationalize the occupation of space and humanize life in their respective municipalities, with results that are globally recognized and valued, although limited by the financial means available and the centralizing nature of existing legislation.
translation_b: In this framework, the majority CDU municipalities have demonstrated the ability to mobilize skills and resources to rationalize the occupation of space and humanize life in their respective counties, with globally recognized and valued results, although limited by the available financial means and the centralizing character of existing legislation.

translation_b: Each OSP unit, in order to effectively take care of the safety of local communities, must be equipped with appropriate equipment.

text: Chcę budować przyjazną Polskę i państwo, o którym z dumą powiemy, że jest nasze.

translation_b: I want to build a friendly Poland and a country that we will proudly say is ours.

text: Riuscire ad ottenere successi nella prevenzione dell'alcolismo, del tabagismo, delle dipendenze attraverso efficaci campagne _di educazione alla salute (alimentare, ecc. ) e di educazione stradale, significa anche dare un fondamentale contributo alla salute della popolazione al contenimento della spesa sanitaria.
translation_a: Succeeding in the prevention of alcoholism, smoking, and addiction through effective campaigns _of health education (nutrition, etc. ) and traffic education, also means making a fundamental contribution to the health of the population to the containment of health expenditure.
translation_b: To success in the prevention of alcoholism, smoking, addictions through effective campaigns of health education (food, etc.) and road education, also means to make a fundamental contribution to the health of the population by constraining health spending.

text: Die Digitalisierung kann die Versorgungsqualität und die Effizienz verbessern und Fachkräfte von Aufgaben entlasten.

translation_b: Digitalization can improve supply quality and efficiency and relieve professional tasks.

text: CHP iktidarında kadınlar toplumda güçlenecek ve iş gücüne daha fazla katılacaktır.

text: Zo zorgen we ervoor dat iedereen tegen een minimale kostprijs kan deelnemen.

translation_b: This ensures that everyone can participate at a minimum cost.

text: Polegają one przede wszystkim na ograniczaniu przez jednostki samorządu działalności rozwojowej; mniej więcej jedna trzecia jest zmuszona całkowicie z niej zrezygnować.

translation_b: They consist primarily in the restriction of development activities by local authorities; about one-third of them are forced to abandon them altogether.

text: El costo de la desnutrición de un niño o niña constituye una pérdida irreparable que afecta y compromete de alguna manera a toda la población nacional.
translation_a: The cost of malnutrition of a child constitutes an irreparable loss that affects and compromises in some way the entire national population.
translation_b: The cost of malnutrition of a child constitutes an irreparable loss that affects and compromises in some way the entire national population.

text: Rodičovskou bude možné čerpat do 5 let věku dítěte.

translation_b: Parental allowance can be taken up to the age of 5 years of the child.

text: Україна ввійде в Єдиний економічний простір.
translation_a: Ukraine will join the Single Economic Space.
translation_b: Ukraine joins the Single Economic Area.

text: Nous devons en effet garantir un soutien à la société civile qui agit au plan européen pour plus de justice sociale et mettre en place plus de démocratie participative en impliquant les citoyens européens et le Parlement européen.
translation_a: We need to guarantee support for civil society working at European level to achieve greater social justice, and to implement more participatory democracy by involving European citizens and the European Parliament.
translation_b: We need to ensure support for civil society that works at the European level for greater social justice and for more participatory democracy by involving European citizens and the European Parliament.

text: Решение жилищной проблемы позволит изменить крайне неблагоприятную демографическую ситуацию, которая характеризуется резким падением рождаемости.
translation_a: Solving the housing problem will change the extremely unfavorable demographic situation, which is characterized by a sharp drop in the birth rate.
translation_b: Resolving the housing problem will change the extremely unfavorable demographic situation, which is characterized by a sharp decline in fertility.

text: Po vzoru Německa nebo Slovenska chceme zavést povinné zálohování i jednorázových lahví, které bude průmysl motivovat k vyšší recyklaci.
translation_a: Following the example of Germany or Slovakia, we want to introduce mandatory deposit of disposable bottles, which will motivate the industry to recycle more.
translation_b: Following the example of Germany or Slovakia, we want to introduce compulsory backup of even single-use bottles, which will motivate the industry to recycle more.

text: Es una propuesta macroeconómica que prioriza la reducción de la pobreza como objetivo final.
translation_a: It is a macroeconomic proposal that prioritizes poverty reduction as the ultimate goal.
translation_b: It is a macroeconomic proposal that prioritizes poverty reduction as the ultimate goal.

text: Συµµετοχή στα Κέντρα Εκπαίδευσης Ενηλίκων για την απόκτηση νέων γνώσεων και δεξιοτήτων.

translation_b: Participation in adult education centers to acquire new knowledge and skills.

text: По мере деградации государственного механизма происходит сверхконцентрация капитала в центре при одновременном обнищании регионов.
translation_a: With the degradation of the state mechanism, capital is overconcentrated in the center while the regions are impoverished.
translation_b: As the state mechanism degrades, there is a superconcentration of capital in the center, while the regions are impoverished.

text: Забезпечити випускникам середніх спеціальних та вищих навчальних закладів перше робоче місце.

translation_b: To provide graduates of secondary specialized and higher educational institutions with the first job.

text: Accountability, em tradução livre “prestação de contas”, palavra de difícil tradução singular para o português, é um conceito muito utilizado na teoria da administração e na teoria econômica, com o sentido de obrigação de prestar contas de recursos, encargos etc., pressupondo que os mesmos estejam especificados a priori, principalmente quando sua execução implica a participação de diferentes pessoas, em diferentes níveis.
translation_a: Accountability, in free translation """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""rendering of accounts"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""", a word that is difficult to translate into Portuguese, is a concept widely used in management theory and economic theory, with the meaning of the obligation to render accounts of resources, charges, etc., assuming that they are specified a priori, especially when their execution involves the participation of different people at different levels.
translation_b: Accountability is a concept widely used in the theory of administration and in economic theory, with the sense of obligation to provide accounts of resources, charges, etc., assuming that they are specified a priori, especially when their execution involves the participation of different people, at different levels.

text: Esse passado deixou marcas de discriminação racial, profundas e inaceitáveis, que só muito recentemente começaram a ser apagadas.

translation_b: This past has left traces of deep and unacceptable racial discrimination, which have only very recently begun to be erased.

text: Pozostali przedsiębiorcy będą rozliczali składki ZUS na obecnych, ryczałtowych zasadach - zmiany nie będą się wiązały z jakimkolwiek podwyższeniem obciążeń składkowych dla żadnego przedsiębiorcy.

translation_b: The other entrepreneurs will settle ZUS contributions on the current, flat rate rules - the changes will not involve any increase in the contributions burden for any entrepreneur.

text: Se propone para el quinquenio: Reducir costos fiscales con medidas tales como el incremento de los topes de deducción del IVA para la compra de gasoil productivo y la autorización a liquidar trimestralmente los créditos fiscales por concepto de IVA al gasoil, admitiendo su utilización para el pago de combustible (ver la sección “Política Económica” en Un Uruguay auténticamente productivo).
translation_a: It is proposed for the five-year period: To reduce fiscal costs with measures such as increasing the VAT deduction ceilings for the purchase of productive diesel oil and authorizing the quarterly liquidation of tax credits for VAT on diesel oil, allowing its use for the payment of fuel (see the section """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Economic Policy"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" in A Truly Productive Uruguay).
translation_b: Reduce tax costs with measures such as increasing the VAT deduction rates for the purchase of productive gasoil and authorizing the quarterly settlement of tax credits for the concept of VAT on gasoil, allowing its use for the payment of fuel (see section “Economic Policy” in An Uruguay authentically productive).

text: La richiesta sulla rete, data dalla somma della Produzione destinata al consumo e dalle Importazioni al netto delle Esportazioni (Saldo estero) è cresciuta dai 235 TWh (20,2 Mtep) del 1990 ai 340 TWh (29,2 Mtep) del 2007, anno di massimo storico, per poi crollare nel biennio 2008-2009, fino a toccare i 320 TWh (27,5 Mtep).
translation_a: Demand on the grid, given by the sum of Production for consumption and Imports net of Exports (Foreign Balance) grew from 235 TWh (20.2 Mtoe) in 1990 to 340 TWh (29.2 Mtoe) in 2007, its peak year, and then plummeted in 2008-2009 to 320 TWh (27.5 Mtoe).
translation_b: The demand on the network, given by the sum of Production for Consumption and Imports net of Exports (Foreign Balance), grew from 235 TWh (20,2 Mtep) in 1990 to 340 TWh (29,2 Mtep) in 2007, a record high, and then fell in the two-year 2008-2009, to reach 320 TWh (27,5 Mtep).

text: Pozostawimy dotychczasowy wymiar pensum.

text: Fortalecer los gobiernos locales para el manejo de los desechos sólidos de manera que pueda cumplir con la legislación vigente.

translation_b: The nation cannot be left to the mercy of the external supply of technologies essential to its survival.

translation_a: For Greece, innovation means an aggressive and creative business strategy with an international horizon, consumers who are looking for better products and who have the income to risk buying new products, seamless operation of complementary activities and related industries (suppliers, consultants, etc.), efficient infrastructure, including education, training, research and technological development.
translation_b: Innovation means for Greece an aggressive and creative strategy of with international horizons, consumers looking for better products and who have income margins to risk the purchase of new products, smooth operation of complementary activities and related industries (suppliers, consultants, etc.), efficient infrastructure, including education, training, research and technological development.

text: Diese Menschen sollen bestmöglich unterstützt, entlastet und auch abgesichert werden (z. B. indem die Pflegezeit auf die Pension angerechnet wird).

translation_b: These people should be best supported, relieved and also insured (e.g. by counting care time to the pension).

text: Prawo i Sprawiedliwość doprowadzi do urealnienia kontroli Sejmu poprzez odpowiednie zmiany w katalogu uprawnień Komisji oraz zakresu jej dostępu do „wrażliwych” informacji niejawnych.
translation_a: The Law and Justice Party will bring about a more realistic control of the Sejm through appropriate changes to the Commission's catalog of powers and the scope of its access to """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""sensitive"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" classified information.
translation_b: Law and Justice will lead to the implementation of the control of the Seimas by appropriate changes in the catalog of powers of the Commission and the scope of its access to “sensitive” classified information.

text: Tale opzione alleggerirebbe i compiti dei consorzi di filiera del vetro e della plastica in primis.

text: Budeme podporovat snižování energetické náročnosti průmyslu cestou jeho restrukturalizace směrem k výrobám s nízkou energetickou náročností a vysokou přidanou hodnotou.

translation_b: We will support the reduction of the energy efficiency of the industry by restructuring it towards production with low energy efficiency and high added value.

text: Inzake het ruimtelijk ordeningsbeleid moeten flankerende maatregelen worden genomen die ervoor zorgen dat open ruimte bewaard wordt en dat geen overloopgebied met Brussel ontstaat.

text: Curiosamente, alguns países da Europa, onde não há disponibilidade de álcool etílico, são pioneiros na substituição do óleo diesel pelo álcool.
translation_a: Interestingly, some European countries, where ethyl alcohol is not available, are pioneers in replacing diesel oil with alcohol.
translation_b: Interestingly, some countries in Europe, where ethyl alcohol is not available, are pioneers in replacing diesel oil with alcohol.

text: Będziemy kontynuować programy wspierające zakup pierwszego mieszkania lub budowę domu, ze szczególnym wsparciem zarezerwowanym dla rodzin wielodzietnych.
translation_a: We will continue programs to support the purchase of a first apartment or the construction of a house, with special support reserved for families with many children.
translation_b: We will continue to support programs that support the purchase of the first apartment or the construction of a house, with special support reserved for multi-child families.

text: Ciągłe aktualna jest potrzeba rozwoju transportu kolejowego i zmniejszenia przewozów towarowych transportem drogowym.
translation_a: The need to develop rail transport and reduce freight transport by road is constantly topical.
translation_b: There is a constant need for the development of rail transport and the reduction of road freight.

text: Ми знаємо як налагодити ефективну антикорупційну систему, що покладе край безкарності масштабних корупціонерів.
translation_a: We know how to set up an effective anti-corruption system that will put an end to the impunity of large-scale corrupt officials.
translation_b: We know how to establish an effective anti-corruption system that will put an end to the impunity of large-scale corruptors.

text: În ciclul parlamentar ce urmează vom sprijini consolidarea Consiliului de Dezvoltare Regională Nord-vest, Vest și Centru.
translation_a: In the next parliamentary cycle we will support the strengthening of the North-West, West and Centre Regional Development Council.
translation_b: In the next parliamentary cycle we will support the strengthening of the North-West, West and Central Regional Development Council.

text: Η επίτευξη της ίσης μεταχείρισης αντρών και γυναικών και των ίσων ευκαιριών απαιτεί καινοτόμες και δυναμικές δράσεις.
translation_a: Achieving equal treatment of men and women and equal opportunities requires innovative and dynamic actions.
translation_b: Achieving equal treatment of men and women and equal opportunities requires innovative and dynamic actions.

text: Pentru a căpăta încredere în sine şi speranţă în viitor, fiecare tânăr, trebuie să-şi găsească un ideal, să aibă o perspectivă a propriei evoluţii şi să se bucure de un suport material corespunzător.
translation_a: In order to gain self-confidence and hope for the future, every young person must find an ideal, have a perspective of their own development and enjoy adequate material support.
translation_b: In order to gain self-confidence and hope for the future, every young person must find an ideal, have a perspective on his own development and enjoy appropriate material support.

text: Un développement humain ne peut donc être qu’un développement durable, c’est-à-dire « un développement qui répond aux besoins du présent sans compromettre la capacité des générations futures à répondre aux leurs ».
translation_a: Human development can therefore only be sustainable development, i.e. """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_b: “Sustainable development is a development that meets the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs.”

text: El servicio de telefonía móvil, por ejemplo, presentó altos crecimientos durante los últimos tres años (72% en 2004, 110% en 2005 y 48% en 2006), llegando a tener una penetración del 70,2% en 2006, una de las más altas en Latinoamérica.
translation_a: Mobile telephony service, for example, grew strongly over the last three years (72% in 2004, 110% in 2005 and 48% in 2006), reaching a penetration rate of 70.2% in 2006, one of the highest in Latin America.
translation_b: Mobile phone service, for example, has experienced high growth over the last three years (72% in 2004, 110% in 2005 and 48% in 2006), reaching a penetration of 70.2% in 2006, one of the highest in Latin America.

text: Tandis que les conflits militaires entre les grandes puissances appartiennent largement au passé, il existe une compétition économique rude qui a recours à tous les moyens.
translation_a: While military conflicts between the great powers are largely a thing of the past, there is fierce economic competition using every possible means.
translation_b: While military conflicts between major powers largely belong to the past, there is a harsh economic competition that uses all means.

text: Desde o período colonial, várias batalhas foram travadas, buscando atendimento de demandas da população brasileira.

text: Até junho de 1993, a Petrobrás já havia concluído a perfuração de 91 poços nas duas províncias, que possibilitaram estimar reservas explotáveis de 83,9 milhões de barris de óleo e 52,2 bilhões de metros cúbicos de gás natural, respectivamente 2,3 e 38% das marcas nacionais.
translation_a: By June 1993, Petrobrás had completed the drilling of 91 wells in the two provinces, which made it possible to estimate exploitable reserves of 83.9 million barrels of oil and 52.2 billion cubic meters of natural gas, 2.3 and 38 percent of the national mark respectively.
translation_b: By June 1993, Petrobras had already completed the drilling of 91 wells in the two provinces, which made it possible to estimate exploitable reserves of 83.9 million barrels of oil and 52.2 billion cubic meters of natural gas, respectively 2.3 and 38% of the national brands.

text: Los sectores que han mantenido el poder del Estado utilizan, repetidamente, la represión y violencia de la fuerza pública y organismos de seguridad contra los que se oponen a sus imposiciones y lograr, de esa manera, imponer su decisión cuando se trata de políticas y proyectos que atentan contra la democracia y el respeto de los derechos humanos en todos sus niveles, incluso la vida.
translation_a: The sectors that have maintained the power of the State repeatedly use repression and violence of the public forces and security agencies against those who oppose their impositions and thus manage to impose their decision when it comes to policies and projects that threaten democracy and respect for human rights at all levels, including life.
translation_b: The sectors that haveined the power of the State use, repeatedly, the repression and violence of public force and security agencies against those who oppose their impositions and, in that way, impose their decision when it comes to policies and projects that attack democracy and respect for human rights at all levels, including life.

text: Успішні скоординовані дії повинні грунтуватися на цілеспрямованій політичній стратегії і тактиці, а не на аматорській імпровізації.

translation_b: Successful coordinated actions should be based on targeted political strategy and tactics, not on amateur improvisation.

text: As ferrovias, mais econômicas que as rodovias, serão usadas nos casos de movimentação de grandes volumes no interior das ilhas.
