translation_b: Railways, more economical than roads, will be used in cases of large volumes of traffic inside the islands.

text: Een van de meest fundamentele taken van de overheid is – op basis van de bijbelse gegevens – recht vaststellen, recht bewaren, recht herstellen en recht doen.
translation_a: One of the most fundamental duties of government - based on the biblical record - is to establish justice, preserve justice, restore justice and do justice.
translation_b: One of the most fundamental tasks of government – based on biblical data – is to establish law, to preserve it, to restore it, and to do it.

text: Sólo así podrán evitarse las situaciones discriminatorias y de competencia desleal padecidas por nuestra flota, como es el caso de la atunera o en la captura de 'cebo vivo' en nuestras propias aguas, causadas por barcos de mayor tecnología y autonomía procedentes del continente europeo.
translation_a: This is the only way to avoid the discriminatory situations and unfair competition suffered by our fleet, as in the case of the tuna fleet or in the capture of 'live bait' in our own waters, caused by vessels with greater technology and autonomy from the European continent.
translation_b: Only in this way can discriminatory situations and unfair competition suffered by our fleet be avoided, such as the case of tuna or the capture of ‘living cebo’ in our own waters, caused by vessels of greater technology and autonomy from the European continent.

text: Поэтому нет ничего удивительного в том, что приватизация (в ее нынешнем виде) вызывает негодование у большинства россиян.
translation_a: It is therefore not surprising that privatization (in its current form) is resented by the majority of Russians.
translation_b: Therefore, it is not surprising that privatization (in its present form) is outrageous to most Russians.

text: Het is van belang het samenhangende beleid tussen conflictpreventie, conflictbeheersing en wederopbouw zowel in de EU als in Nederland verder te ontwikkelen.
translation_a: It is important to further develop the coherent policy between conflict prevention, conflict management and reconstruction both in the EU and in the Netherlands.
translation_b: It is important to further develop the coherent policy between conflict prevention, conflict management and reconstruction both in the EU and in the Netherlands.

text: Questa legge si prefigge di ridurre il “turismo dei rifiuti” che nel caso dei rifiuti organici è davvero paradossale vista la semplicità di gestione.
translation_a: This law aims to reduce """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""waste tourism,"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" which in the case of organic waste is truly paradoxical given the simplicity of management.
translation_b: This law aims to reduce the “waste tourism” that in the case of organic waste is really paradoxical given the simplicity of management.

text: Le commerce international des produits agricoles doit en outre être encadré par des normes et par des règles spécifiques qui favorisent l’autonomie la souveraineté alimentaire de chaque région du monde et interdisent les spéculations financières meurtrières.
translation_a: International trade in agricultural products must also be governed by specific standards and rules that promote the autonomy and food sovereignty of each region of the world, and prohibit deadly financial speculation.
translation_b: In addition, international trade in agricultural products must be governed by specific standards and rules that promote the autonomy and food sovereignty of each region of the world and prohibit deadly financial speculation.

text: Petrol ve doğalgaz alanında önemli düzenlemeleri hayata geçirdik.
translation_a: We have implemented important regulations in the field of oil and natural gas.
translation_b: We have made important regulations in the field of oil and natural gas.

text: Prevedere la realizzazione di alloggi per i familiari dei malati negli ospedali di alta specializzazione di cui esistono poche unità nell'intero paese.
translation_a: Provide housing for family members of the sick in the highly specialized hospitals of which there are few units in the entire country.
translation_b: To provide for the realization of housing for the relatives of the sick in high-specialized hospitals of which there are few units throughout the country.

text: A reforma urbana, projeto dos excluídos pela lógica vigente da produção das cidades, e objetivo estratégico dos movimentos que lutam por moradia, transporte barato e de qualidade, saúde, escolas, infra-estrutura e equipamentos públicos, constitui-se, desse modo, num conjunto de políticas que enfrenta os problemas estruturais do complexo urbano, geradas pelo modo capitalista de organização do espaço e dos serviços com a finalidade do lucro e não das melhores condições possíveis de vida para a maioria da população.
translation_a: Urban reform, the project of those excluded by the current logic of city production, and the strategic objective of the movements fighting for housing, cheap and quality transport, health, schools, infrastructure and public facilities, is thus a set of policies that tackle the structural problems of the urban complex, generated by the capitalist way of organizing space and services with the aim of profit and not the best possible living conditions for the majority of the population.
translation_b: Urban reform, the project of those excluded by the current logic of the production of cities, and the strategic goal of the movements that struggle for housing, cheap and quality transport, health, schools, infrastructure and public equipment, is thus a set of policies that addresses the structural problems of the urban complex, generated by the capitalist way of organizing space and services for the purpose of profit and not the best possible living conditions for the majority of the population.

text: Щорічно збільшувати бюджетну підтримку інфраструктури здорового способу життя, фізичної культури і спорту.
translation_a: Increase annual budget support for the infrastructure of healthy lifestyles, physical culture and sports.
translation_b: Annually increase budget support for infrastructure of healthy lifestyle, physical culture and sports.

text: Consolidarea clădirilor afectate de cutremure, inundații și alte calamități.
translation_a: Consolidating buildings damaged by earthquakes, floods and other disasters.
translation_b: Strengthening buildings affected by earthquakes, floods and other disasters.

text: Pragniemy budować swoją przyszłość w oparciu o pełną akceptacje i współpracę z narodem polskim, jego poszczególnymi obywatelami, mając na uwadze dobro każdej grupy społecznej.
translation_a: We want to build our future on the basis of full acceptance and cooperation with the Polish nation, its individual citizens, with a view to the well-being of each social group.
translation_b: We want to build our future on the basis of full acceptance and cooperation with the Polish people, their individual citizens, taking into account the good of each social group.

text: Жоден пенсіонер не буде отримувати пенсію менше реального прожиткового мінімуму для пенсіонерів, затвердженого законом.
translation_a: No pensioner will receive a pension less than the real subsistence level for pensioners approved by law.
translation_b: No pensioner will receive a pension less than the real subsistence minimum for pensioners approved by law.

text: Благополучие семьи.
translation_a: Family Well-Being.
translation_b: The well-being of the family.

text: Ce qui représente un fonctionnaire sur cinq de la Région wallonne.
translation_a: This represents one in five civil servants in the Walloon Region.
translation_b: This represents one in five officials in the Walloon Region.

text: Рух домагатиметься, щоб кожен громадянин України мав можливість реалізувати свої здібності, отримуючи справедливу винагороду за працю, суспільно-корисні ідеї, новаторські ініціативи, трудову заповзятливість.
translation_a: The Movement will strive to ensure that every citizen of Ukraine has the opportunity to realize his or her abilities, receiving fair remuneration for work, socially useful ideas, innovative initiatives, and labor entrepreneurship.
translation_b: The movement will seek that every citizen of Ukraine has the opportunity to realize their abilities, receiving a fair reward for work, socially useful ideas, innovative initiatives, labor commitment.

text: De groene ruimte wordt in Vlaanderen schaarser en schaarser.
translation_a: Green space is becoming scarcer and scarcer in Flanders.
translation_b: The green space in Flanders is becoming scarce and scarce.

text: De verdere ontwikkeling van het DigiD-systeem moet daarom niet alleen gebruikersvriendelijk, maar ook heel goed beveiligd zijn.
translation_a: Therefore, further development of the DigiD system must not only be user-friendly, but also very secure.
translation_b: The further development of the DigiD system must therefore not only be user-friendly, but also very well secured.

text: Por estas razones, la existencia de una radio y una televisión pública comarcal --donde los municipios sean menores de 5.000 habitantes--es de vital importancia para ofrecer un servicio público a la comunidad.
translation_a: For these reasons, the existence of a regional public radio and television station -where the municipalities have less than 5,000 inhabitants- is of vital importance to offer a public service to the community.
translation_b: For these reasons, the existence of a comarcal public radio and television -- where municipalities are less than 5,000 inhabitants -- is of vital importance to offer a public service to the community.

text: În cadrul unui sistem special de protecţie socială vor fi create condiţii pentru ca, în familie şi în societate, copiii să fie protejaţi şi sprijiniţi pentru a fi educaţi şi pregătiţi corespunzător pentru viaţă, prin:majorarea alocaţiilor de stat pentru copii cu 50% în 1997 şi dublarea acestora în anul 1998, astfel încât să se asigure îmbunătăţirea raportului dintre alocaţia de stat pentru copii, bursele pentru studenţi şi salariul mediu.
translation_a: Within a special system of social protection, conditions will be created for children to be protected and supported in the family and in society so that they can be properly educated and prepared for life, by:increasing state child allowances by 50% in 1997 and doubling them in 1998, so as to ensure an improvement in the ratio between the state child allowance, student grants and the average wage.
translation_b: Within the framework of a special system of social protection, conditions will be created for children to be protected and supported in the family and in society in order to be educated and prepared for life appropriately, by: increasing the state child allowances by 50% in 1997 and doubling them in 1998, so as to ensure the improvement of the ratio between the state child allowance, student grants and average wage.

text: Громадяни, чиї прибутки нижчі за прожитковий мінімум, повинні отримувати відповідну доплату.
translation_a: Citizens whose incomes are below the subsistence level should receive an appropriate supplement.
translation_b: Citizens whose income is lower than the subsistence minimum must receive a corresponding allowance.

text: Bis 2030 wird ein Bevölkerungsrückgang von sieben Prozent erwartet.
translation_a: A population decline of seven percent is expected by 2030.
translation_b: By 2030, the population is expected to decline by seven percent.

text: Będziemy aktywni w tworzeniu założeń wspólnej polityki energetycznej UE tak, aby zagwarantowane były w niej interesy naszego kraju.
translation_a: We will be active in creating the assumptions of a common EU energy policy so that the interests of our country are guaranteed in it.
translation_b: We will be active in formulating the objectives of the common energy policy of the EU so that the interests of our country are safeguarded in it.

text: Guvernarea ARD va relansa învățământul românesc și îl va plasa între sistemele de educație moderne care pregătesc absolvenți competitivi în tot spațiul european.
translation_a: The ARD government will relaunch Romanian education and place it among the modern education systems that prepare competitive graduates throughout Europe.
translation_b: The ARD government will revive Romanian education and place it among the modern education systems that prepare competitive graduates across the European space.

text: Durch den Totalumbau der Sozialversicherung drohen PatientInnen mehr Selbstbehalte und schlechtere Versorgung bei medizinischen Leistungen.
translation_a: The total restructuring of social insurance threatens patients with more deductibles and poorer care for medical services.
translation_b: Due to the total change in social security, patients are at risk of increased self-restraint and worse care for medical services.

text: Παρόλα αυτά, οι περιορισμοί στις δημόσιες δαπάνες έχουν οδηγήσει σε πολλές περικοπές που προκαλούν σοβαρά προβλήματα στον τομέα της Υγείας.
translation_a: However, restrictions on public spending have led to many cuts that are causing serious problems in the health sector.
translation_b: Nevertheless, restrictions on public spending have resulted in many cuts that cause serious health problems.

text: Tarım sektöründe faaliyet gösteren KİT’ler, tarım satış kooperatifleri ve bankaların rasyonel çalışmaları sağlanarak tarım sektörünü gerçek anlamda d es tek leyecek bir yapıya kavuşt urul ması temin edilecektir.
translation_a: By ensuring the rational operation of SEEs, agricultural sales cooperatives and banks operating in the agricultural sector, it will be ensured that they have a structure that will truly support the agricultural sector.
translation_b: The KICs operating in the agricultural sector, agricultural sales cooperatives and the rational work of the banks will ensure that the agricultural sector in the real sense will be provided with a single structure.

text: Die Chancen der Frauen müssen weiter verbessert werden.
translation_a: The opportunities for women must be further improved.
translation_b: Women’s opportunities need to be improved.

text: Possuímos energia endógena sufi ciente, globalmente falando, sob a forma hidráulica, eólica e fotovoltaica para que, tomadas as devidas medidas de adaptação, possamos acabar a médio prazo com a importação de todo o tipo de energias fósseis.
translation_a: We have enough endogenous energy, globally speaking, in the form of hydro, wind and photovoltaics so that, with the right adaptation measures, we can stop importing all kinds of fossil fuels in the medium term.
translation_b: We have endogenous energy consciously, globally speaking, in the form of hydraulic, wind and photovoltaic so that, after taking the appropriate measures of adaptation, we can end in the medium term with the importation of all kinds of fossil energies.

text: Transférer intégralement la compétence de nettoiement des voiries aux communes et d’attribuer à la Région toute la chaîne des déchets et des encombrants.
translation_a: Transfer full responsibility for street cleaning to the communes, and assign the entire waste and bulky waste chain to the Region.
translation_b: Transfer the entire power of cleaning the roads to the municipalities and assign the entire waste chain to the Region.

text: Haremos una reforma penitenciaria radical para mejorar las condiciones carcelarias, fomentar la rehabilitación y conseguir financiamiento para efectuar estos cambios.
translation_a: We will undertake radical prison reform to improve prison conditions, encourage rehabilitation and secure funding to effect these changes.
translation_b: We will make a radical penitentiary reform to improve prison conditions, encourage rehabilitation and get funding to make these changes.

text: Budeme usilovat o udržení každého pracovního místa na venkově a vytváření nových pracovních příležitostí v zemědělství, lesnictví a všech navazujících podnikatelských oblastí.
translation_a: We will work to keep every job in the countryside and create new jobs in agriculture, forestry and all related business areas.
translation_b: We will strive to maintain every job in the countryside and create new job opportunities in agriculture, forestry and all subsequent business areas.

text: Il terzo è l’introduzione del principio di SOSTENIBILITÀ AMBIENTALE in luogo di sviluppo sostenibile.
translation_a: The third is the introduction of the principle of ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY in place of sustainable development.
translation_b: The third is the introduction of the principle of Environmental Sustainability instead of Sustainable Development.

text: Недопустимо, чтобы этот показатель, к примеру, в республиках Северного Кавказа в разы превышал аналогичный в других регионах России.
translation_a: It is unacceptable that this indicator, for example, in the republics of the North Caucasus is many times higher than in other regions of Russia.
translation_b: It is unacceptable that this figure, for example, in the republics of the North Caucasus in times exceeded the same in other regions of Russia.

text: З 2008 р. втричі збільшаться виплати курсантам та солдатам строкової служби.
translation_a: Starting in 2008, payments to cadets and conscripts will triple.
translation_b: From 2008 onwards, the salaries of the graduates and soldiers will be increased three times.

text: Sous l’impulsion du PS, des mesures fortes ont été prises lors des précédentes législatures pour la prise en charge des maladies chroniques.
translation_a: Under the impetus of the Socialist Party, strong measures have been taken in previous legislatures to improve the management of chronic diseases.
translation_b: Under the impulse of the PS, strong measures were taken in the previous legislatures to take care of chronic diseases.

text: Kritik ve Yarım Kalmış Ulaştirma Altyapısı projelerini süratle tamamlayacağız.
translation_a: We will swiftly complete critical and unfinished transportation infrastructure projects.
translation_b: We will quickly complete the critical and semi-residual infrastructure projects.

text: Vom asigura măsuri adecvate pentru însănătoşirea monedei naţionale şi asigurarea unui curs relativ stabil al leului, prin:consolidarea mediului concurential ca urmare a aplicării programelor de restructurare a producţiei în sectoarele industriale cu tehnologii depăşite.
translation_a: We will ensure appropriate measures to restore the national currency and ensure a relatively stable exchange rate of the leu, by:strengthening the competitive environment as a result of the implementation of production restructuring programmes in industrial sectors with outdated technologies.
translation_b: We will ensure appropriate measures for the recovery of the national currency and to ensure a relatively stable course of the lion, by: strengthening the competitive environment as a result of the application of programmes of restructuring of production in industrial sectors with obsolete technologies.

text: Hayvanları korumayı kabahatler kanunu kapsamından çıkarıp ceza kanunu kapsamına alacağız.
translation_a: We will remove animal protection from the misdemeanor law and include it under the criminal law.
translation_b: We will remove the protection of animals from the scope of the law and bring it to the penalty of the law.

text: La politica deve essere conscia del fatto che se da una parte """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Industria 4.0"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" crea nuovi posti di lavoro e opportunità, dall'altra è un paradigma che comporterà, in un prossimo futuro, pesanti conseguenze sull'occupazione a causa del largo impiego di soluzioni di robotica.
translation_a: Policymakers need to be aware that while """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Industry 4.0"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" creates new jobs and opportunities, it is a paradigm that will lead to heavy employment consequences in the near future due to the widespread use of robotics solutions.
translation_b: Politics must be aware that if on the one hand """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Industry 4.0"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" creates new jobs and opportunities, on the other hand it is a paradigm that will have, in the near future, heavy consequences on employment due to the widespread use of robotics solutions.

text: Wir wollen den gezielten Ankauf von Flächen, die aus Naturschutzperspektive wertvoll sind – als Überlebensinseln für die Vielfalt, wenn deren Erhalt durch die Eigentümer*innen nicht gewährleistet ist.
translation_a: We want the targeted purchase of areas that are valuable from a nature conservation perspective - as survival islands for diversity if their preservation is not guaranteed by the owners.
translation_b: We want the targeted purchase of land that is valuable from a nature conservation perspective – as survival islands for diversity when their preservation is not guaranteed by the owners.

text: Türkiye-AB ilişkilerinin yakin geçmişi; şantaj lar, önşart-lar, dayatmalar, haksiz talep ve baskilarla dolu bir hayal kirikliği hikayesidir.
translation_a: The recent history of Turkey-EU relations is a story of disappointment, full of blackmail, preconditions, impositions, unjust demands and pressures.
translation_b: The historical history of Turkey-EU relations is a story of fantasy, full of blackmail, prerequisites, impositions, unfair demands and pressures.

text: Cette situation n’est pas sans induire de nombreux écueils pour la qualité de la démocratie et du processus de délibération.
translation_a: This situation is not without its pitfalls for the quality of democracy and the deliberative process.
translation_b: This situation is not without causing many challenges to the quality of democracy and the deliberation process.

text: СВОБОДА ЛЮДИНИ. Кожна людина від народження набуває невід'ємних прав і свобод, які держава не може порушити або скасувати.
translation_a: HUMAN FREEDOM: Every human being is born with inalienable rights and freedoms that the state cannot violate or abolish.
translation_b: Every person from birth acquires inalienable rights and freedoms that the state cannot violate or abolish.

text: Η πρόληψη πρέπει να είναι καθολική, εξειδικευμένη με βάση την ηλικία, το φύλο, το επάγγελμα, το περιβάλλον, την κατοικία.
translation_a: Prevention must be universal, specific to age, gender, occupation, environment, housing.
translation_b: Prevention should be universal, specialized based on age, gender, profession, environment, residence.

text: E che troppo spesso sacche di disperazione accolte indiscriminatamente si inseriscono nei tessuti indigeni di maggior disagio, generando conflitti sociali, fenomeni di delinquenza ed  estensione di episodi di asservimento al crimine organizzato.
translation_a: And that all too often pockets of indiscriminately welcomed desperation insert themselves into the indigenous fabrics of greater distress, generating social conflicts, delinquency phenomena and the extension of episodes of subservience to organized crime.
translation_b: And that too often bags of despair welcomed indiscriminately enter the indigenous tissues of the most discomfort, generating social conflicts, phenomena of crime and the extension of episodes of enslavement to organized crime.

text: KOBİ’lerin finansal sektöre olan borçları yeniden yapılandırılacaktır.
translation_a: SMEs' debts to the financial sector will be restructured.
translation_b: Women’s debt to the financial sector will be restructured.

text: Будет принят базовый федеральный закон о государственной промышленной политике.
translation_a: A basic federal law on state industrial policy will be adopted.
translation_b: A basic federal law on state industrial policy will be adopted.

text: Зафиксировать это положение в Конституции РФ и отразить его во всех учебниках по национальной истории.
translation_a: To fix this provision in the Constitution of the Russian Federation and reflect it in all textbooks on national history.
translation_b: To record this provision in the Constitution of the Russian Federation and to reflect it in all national history textbooks.

text: Żadna szkoła nie jest dziś w stanie wyposażyć nas w wiedzę i umiejętności zawodowe, które wystarczą do emerytury.
translation_a: No school today can equip us with knowledge and professional skills sufficient for retirement.
translation_b: No school today is able to equip us with the knowledge and professional skills that will suffice for retirement.

text: Die Telearbeit bietet neue Wege zur Erschliessung von Arbeitskräften und Arbeitsstellen und eine Möglichkeit zur besseren Vereinbarkeit von Familie und Beruf.
translation_a: Telecommuting offers new ways to tap into the workforce and jobs, and a way to better balance family and work.
translation_b: Telemarketing offers new ways to create workforce and jobs and a way to better reconcile family and work.

text: Ми також виділимо чіткий перелік медичних послуг, які будуть всім без винятку надаватись безкоштовно.
translation_a: We will also provide a clear list of medical services that will be provided free of charge to everyone without exception.
translation_b: We will also highlight a clear list of medical services that will be provided to all without exception.

text: Ancak Türkiye’nin bekâsına yönelik tehditler henüz tamamen bertaraf edilmiş değildir.
translation_a: However, the threats to Turkey's survival have not yet been completely eliminated.
translation_b: But the threats to Turkey’s independence have not yet been completely eliminated.

text: O estabelecimento de limites administrativos para o exercício de uma determinada atividade económica dificulta o seu desenvolvimento, quer devido aos custos criados pelo cumprimento dos limites, quer pelos custos criados pelo seu enforcement.
translation_a: The establishment of administrative limits for the exercise of a given economic activity hinders its development, both due to the costs created by complying with the limits and the costs created by enforcing them.
translation_b: The establishment of administrative limits for the exercise of a particular economic activity makes it difficult to develop it, either due to the costs created by compliance with the limits or the costs created by their enforcement.

text: Nationale Sonderwege - wie sie in vielen Bereichen von Rot-Grün beschritten wurden - sind abzulehnen.
translation_a: National special paths - such as those taken by the Red-Green Party in many areas - should be rejected.
translation_b: National special routes - as they have been taken in many areas of red-green - are to be rejected.

text: Çalışma hayatında kadınlar, çocuklar, yaşlılar, engelliler gibi dezavantajlı gruplar için özel koruyucu tedbirler alınacaktır.
translation_a: Special protective measures will be taken for disadvantaged groups such as women, children, the elderly and the disabled in working life.
translation_b: Special protective measures will be taken for disadvantaged groups such as women, children, the elderly, disabled people.

text: Impulsar una estrategia clara de cooperación y transferencia tecnológica de aquellos países que están a la vanguardia en la innovación científica a escala mundial.
translation_a: Promote a clear strategy of cooperation and technology transfer to those countries that are at the forefront of scientific innovation on a global scale.
translation_b: Promote a clear strategy of cooperation and technological transfer of those countries that are at the forefront of scientific innovation on a global scale.

text: Увеличить доплату к пенсии за каждый отработанный год сверх пенсионного возраста с 1 до 5%.
translation_a: Increase the pension supplement for each year worked above retirement age from 1 to 5%.
translation_b: Increase the pension allowance for each year spent above the retirement age from 1% to 5%.

text: Ми створимо умови для якісного забезпечення, підвищення навичок, армійського і професійного зростання, комфорту власного побуту та побуту родин військових.
translation_a: We will create conditions for quality support, skill development, military and professional growth, and the comfort of their own lives and the lives of military families.
translation_b: We will create conditions for quality provision, skills improvement, military and professional growth, the comfort of our own lives and the lives of military families.

text: Para dar conta desse desafio, é necessário um conjunto de iniciativas de curto, médio e longo prazos, para construir soluções estruturais, capazes de permitir que a presente e as futuras gerações de brasileiros possam estar plenamente conscientes e relativamente tranqüilas quanto aos direitos que poderão usufruir após o término de uma longa dedicação de vida laboral.
translation_a: To meet this challenge, a set of short-, medium- and long-term initiatives is needed to build structural solutions capable of enabling present and future generations of Brazilians to be fully aware and relatively calm about the rights they will be able to enjoy after the end of a long working life.
translation_b: To address this challenge, a set of short, medium and long-term initiatives are needed, to build structural solutions, capable of allowing the present and future generations of Brazilians to be fully aware and relatively calm about the rights they can enjoy after the end of a long dedicated working life.

text: Resort vnitra by přitom neměl řešit jen důsledky, ale účinnými nástroji by měl napomoci i preventivním opatřením, kterými se bezpečnostním rizikům dá předcházet.
translation_a: The Ministry of the Interior should not only deal with the consequences, but should also use effective tools to help prevent security risks.
translation_b: The interior resort should not only address the consequences, but should also provide effective tools for preventive measures that prevent security risks.

text: Her yıl ortalama 800 bin kişiye istihdam yaratacağız.
translation_a: We will create an average of 800,000 jobs every year.
translation_b: We will create an average of 800,000 jobs each year.

text: Votați candidații Partidului Romania mare înscriși sub sigla alăturata!

translation_b: The membership is honorary, the members of the Board elect the Director and approve the budget.

text: Experiența guvernării care-și încheie acum mandatul a confirmat încă o dată că învestitorii străini vin numai acolo unde pot obține profit și unde li se oferă motivație și argumente pentru a-și învesti banii, resursele, tehnologia și know-how-ul.
translation_a: The experience of the government that is now ending its mandate has confirmed once again that foreign investors only come where they can make a profit and where they are given the motivation and arguments to invest their money, resources, technology and know-how.
translation_b: The experience of the government that is now ending its mandate has once again confirmed that foreign investors come only where they can make profits and where they are given motivation and arguments to invest their money, resources, technology and know-how.

text: Γι' αυτό το σκοπό απαιτείται κατάρτιση ολοκληρωμένου και σταθερού στρατηγικού σχεδίου προώθησης της Ελλάδας, των μοναστηριών, των εκκλησιών και των ιερών κειμηλίων που υπάρχουν στη χώρα.
translation_a: To this end, a comprehensive and stable strategic plan for the promotion of Greece, its monasteries, churches and sacred relics is required.
translation_b: For this purpose, a comprehensive and stable strategic plan for the promotion of Greece, the monasteries, churches and holy relics that exist in the country is required.

text: Un déficit de l’ouïe ou de la vue est un handicap quotidien.
translation_a: A hearing or sight impairment is a daily handicap.
translation_b: A hearing or vision impairment is a daily disability.

text: Es ist für Österreich gut, dass wichtige Konzernzentralen im Land behalten werden.
translation_a: It is good for Austria that important corporate headquarters are kept in the country.
translation_b: It is good for Austria that important group headquarters will be retained in the country.

text: Справжній мир можливий лише в без’ядерному світі.
translation_a: True peace is possible only in a nuclear-free world.
translation_b: Real peace is only possible in a nuclear-free world.

text: Το κατά κεφαλήν εισόδημα αυξήθηκε από το 73,8% του μέσου όρου της ΕΕ των 15 το 2003, στο 82,3% το 2007.
translation_a: Income per capita rose from 73.8% of the EU-15 average in 2003 to 82.3% in 2007.
translation_b: Per capita income increased from 73.8% of the EU-15 average in 2003 to 82.3% in 2007.

text: I ripetuti scandali hanno sconvolto la coscienza civile del Paese e fatto crescere il distacco dei cittadini dalla politica.
translation_a: Repeated scandals have shaken the country's civic consciousness and made citizens' detachment from politics grow.
translation_b: The repeated scandals have shaken the civil conscience of the country and increased the separation of citizens from politics.

text: Per non parlare del voto amministrativo, che vorrebbero concedere agli stranieri dopo solo 5 anni.
translation_a: Not to mention the administrative vote, which they would like to grant to foreigners after only five years.
translation_b: Not to mention the administrative vote, which they would like to grant to foreigners after only 5 years.

text: Ми закликаємо  виборців обрати до Рад усіх рівнів більшість представників експлуатованого народу та трудової інтелігенції.
translation_a: We call on voters to elect to the Soviets of all levels a majority of representatives of the exploited people and the labor intelligentsia.
translation_b: We call on voters to elect the majority of the representatives of the exploited people and labor intelligence to the Councils of all levels.

text: Η χρονική επέκταση του προγράμματος θα επιτρέψει να γίνουν περικοπές από σπατάλη και διαφθορά, όχι από μισθούς και συντάξεις.
translation_a: The extension of the programme will allow cuts to be made from waste and corruption, not from wages and pensions.
translation_b: The extension of the program will allow for cuts on waste and corruption, not on wages and pensions.

text: L’ASEM (Dialogue Asie-Europe) est le principal espace multilatéral pour un tel partenariat, axé autour de trois piliers :
translation_a: ASEM (Asia-Europe Meeting) is the main multilateral forum for such a partnership, based on three pillars:
translation_b: The ASEM (Asia-Europe Dialogue) is the main multilateral space for such a partnership, focused around three pillars:

text: Op zondag gaat het niet om het stipt nalaten van allerlei dagelijkse bezigheden.
translation_a: Sunday is not about punctually refraining from all kinds of daily activities.
translation_b: Sunday is not about omitting all kinds of daily activities.

text: Podniesienie płacy minimalnej zwiększy konsumpcję i będzie bodźcem do podniesienia pozostałych płac na rynku pracy.
translation_a: Raising the minimum wage will increase consumption and stimulate other wages in the labor market.
translation_b: The increase in the minimum wage will increase consumption and will be an incentive to raise the remaining wages in the labour market.

text: Anayasa; “hâkimiyet-i milliye” nin yerleşmesine imkan sağlayacak nitelikte olmalıdır.
translation_a: The Constitution must be of a quality that will enable the establishment of """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""sovereignty of the nation"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""".
translation_b: The Constitution must be in the capacity to enable the “reign of the millennium” to settle.

text: Der Kulturstaatsminister darf nicht weiterhin allein hinter verschlossenen Türen über die Bewilligung von Förderanträgen entscheiden, sondern wir brauchen transparente Kriterien, öffentliche, mitberatende Jurysitzungen und eine regelmäßige Evaluation in jedem Förderbereich.
translation_a: The Minister of State for Culture must not continue to decide alone behind closed doors on the approval of funding applications; instead, we need transparent criteria, public jury meetings in which the jury is consulted, and regular evaluation in every funding area.
translation_b: The Minister of Culture must not continue to decide behind closed doors alone on the approval of subsidy applications, but we need transparent criteria, public, advisory jury sessions and a regular evaluation in each subsidy area.

text: Ceux-ci n’ont désormais plus droit à des compléments d’ancienneté.
translation_a: They are no longer entitled to additional seniority.
translation_b: They are no longer entitled to old-fashioned supplements.

text: O cerinţă Fundamentală o constituie, de asemenea, egalitatea in drepturi şi independenţa diferitelor instituţii de învăţământ - de stat, ale bisericilor, susţinute de asociaţii, fundaţii sau particulare precum şi asigurarea inter - comunicabilităţii şi circulaţiei între diferitele forme.
translation_a: A fundamental requirement is also the equality of rights and independence of the different educational institutions - state, church, association, foundation or privately supported - and ensuring inter-communicability and circulation between the different forms.
translation_b: A fundamental requirement is also the equality in rights and independence of the various educational institutions - state, church, supported by associations, foundations or individuals, as well as the ensuring of inter-communicability and circulation between the various forms.

text: Ми були і залишатимемося нацією миру.
translation_a: We have been and will remain a nation of peace.
translation_b: We were and will remain a nation of peace.

text: Der Fleiß junger Menschen darf nicht ausgenutzt werden.
translation_a: The diligence of young people must not be exploited.
translation_b: The efforts of young people should not be exploited.

text: Selon l’Organisation de coopération et de développement économique (OCDE), quatre générations sont nécessaires en Belgique pour que les descendants d’une famille aux revenus modestes atteignent le revenu moyen.
translation_a: According to the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), it takes four generations in Belgium for the descendants of a low-income family to reach the average income.
translation_b: According to the Organization for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), it takes four generations in Belgium for the descendants of a low-income family to reach the average income.

text: Vom sprijini realizarea construcţiei Catedralei Neamului în Bucureşti şi a Muzeului Spiritualităţii Ortodoxe.
translation_a: We will support the construction of the Cathedral of the Nation in Bucharest and the Museum of Orthodox Spirituality.
translation_b: We will support the construction of the National Cathedral in Bucharest and the Museum of Orthodox Spirituality.

text: Η Πολιτεία οφείλει να οργανώσει και να παράσχει υπηρεσίες ποιοτικές υποκαθιστώντας δαπάνες των νοικοκυριών και των πολιτών.
translation_a: The state must organise and provide quality services by substituting household and citizen expenditure.
translation_b: The state must organize and provide quality services by replacing household and citizens’ expenses.

text: Um entsprechende zivile Fachkräftepools aus- und aufbauen zu können, wollen wir in Deutschland die Mittel für das Zentrum für Internationale Friedenseinsätze und für den Zivilen Friedensdienst verdoppeln, mehr Geld in die Friedensforschung geben und das friedenspädagogische Angebot an Schulen unterstützen.
translation_a: In order to be able to develop and build up appropriate pools of civilian specialists, we want to double funding in Germany for the Center for International Peace Operations and for the Civil Peace Service, give more money to peace research, and support peace education programs in schools.
translation_b: In order to be able to expand and build corresponding civilian specialist pool, we want to double the funds in Germany for the Center for International Peace Operations and for the Civil Peace Service, give more money to peace research and support the peace education offer in schools.

text: Przywrócimy aktywną politykę Polski na Wschodzie, zwłaszcza wobec Ukrainy.
translation_a: We will restore Poland's active policy in the East, especially towards Ukraine.
translation_b: We will restore active Polish policy in the East, especially towards Ukraine.

text: Ми бачимо Україну центром регіональної економічної інтеграції.
translation_a: We see Ukraine as the center of regional economic integration.
translation_b: We see Ukraine as the center of regional economic integration.

text: Dzięki temu będziemy naturalnym łącznikiem państw największych i mniejszych, Europy Zachodniej i Środkowej, Bałtyckiej i Naddunajskiej.
translation_a: This will make us a natural link between the largest and smaller countries, Western and Central Europe, the Baltic and Danube.
translation_b: Thanks to this, we will be a natural link between the largest and smaller countries, Western and Central Europe, the Baltic and the Danube.

text: Koalicja Obywatelska chce, by rodzina była razem.
translation_a: The Civic Coalition wants the family to be together.
translation_b: People want the family to be together.

text: Die SVP ist nicht bereit, dem Steuerzahler weitere Sanierungsmassnah-men aufzubürden.
translation_a: The SVP is not prepared to impose further restructuring measures on the taxpayer.
translation_b: The SVP is not ready to impose on the taxpayer further recovery measures.

text: Vor allem Frauen, aber auch alle anderen Beschäftigten werden immer häufiger zu Opfern einer gezielten Beseitigung existenzsichernder Arbeitsverhältnisse.
translation_a: Women in particular, but also all other employees, are increasingly becoming the victims of the targeted elimination of living wage employment.
translation_b: Women in particular, but also all other workers, are becoming increasingly victims of the targeted abolition of subsistence-saving working relationships.

text: Propomos, por isso, imediatamente, a possibilidade de renovação destes contratos, ainda que a título excepcional.
translation_a: We therefore propose, immediately, the possibility of renewing these contracts, albeit on an exceptional basis.
translation_b: We therefore propose the possibility of renewing these contracts immediately, though exceptionally.

text: Bu miktar tüm zamanlarda sahip olduğumuz derslik sayısının 3'te 1'inden daha fazladır.
translation_a: This is more than 1/3 of the number of classrooms we have at all times.
translation_b: This amount is more than 1 in 3 of the number of classrooms we have at all times.

text: Vhodným motivačním faktorem jsou stipendijní programy určené nejen pro žáky středních škol, jak je tomu dnes, ale i pro vysokoškoláky.
translation_a: Scholarship programmes designed not only for secondary school students, as is the case today, but also for university students are a suitable motivating factor.
translation_b: A suitable motivating factor are scholarship programs designed not only for high school students, as is the case today, but also for college students.

text: Wynagradzanie za przeprowadzone procedury medyczne nie przyniosło oczekiwanych efektów: zadłużenie szpitali dalej narasta, kolejki do lekarza są jeszcze dłuższe.
translation_a: Paying for medical procedures carried out has not had the desired effect: hospital debts continue to grow, doctor queues are even longer.
translation_b: The reimbursement for the medical procedures carried out did not bring the expected results: the debt of hospitals continues to grow, the queues to the doctor are even longer.

text: Het Vlaams Belang wil van de parketten opnieuw de zenuwcentra maken van de criminaliteitsbestrijding.
translation_a: Vlaams Belang wants to turn public prosecutors' offices back into the nerve centers of the fight against crime.
translation_b: The Flemish Belang wants to make the parks again the nerve centers of the fight against crime.

text: Партия власти так и не сумела решительно улучшить положение народа.
translation_a: The ruling party never managed to decisively improve the situation of the people.
translation_b: The party of power has never been able to resolutely improve the situation of the people.

text: Ο τρίτος άξονας έχει να κάνει με τις γνώσεις, τα προσόντα και τις ικανότητες που αποκτά κάθε φοιτητής με τις σπουδές του και εκφράζεται με το Πλαίσιο Πιστοποιημένων Προσόντων (Qualifications Framework).
translation_a: The third axis has to do with the knowledge, qualifications and competences that each student acquires through their studies and is expressed in the Qualifications Framework.
translation_b: The third axis refers to the knowledge, qualifications and competences that each student acquires through his or her studies and is expressed in the Qualifications Framework.

text: Para Convergencia, urge que los poderes de la unión demuestren los signos de madurez política para llegar a acuerdos que privilegien una política exterior de Estado, que se sitúe por encima de los partidos, los intereses burocráticos y cualquier otro interés particular, que la aleje de su objetivo central: la defensa de la soberanía nacional, y con un solo propósito: el beneficio de la sociedad.
translation_a: For Convergencia, it is urgent that the powers of the union show signs of political maturity to reach agreements that privilege a State foreign policy, which is placed above parties, bureaucratic interests and any other particular interest, which takes it away from its central objective: the defense of national sovereignty, and with a single purpose: the benefit of society.
translation_b: For Convergence, it is urgent that the powers of the union demonstrate the signs of political maturity to reach agreements that privileged a foreign policy of the State, which is situated above the parties, bureaucratic interests and any other particular interest, which removes it from its central goal: the defense of national sovereignty, and with one purpose: the benefit of society.

text: Kamu projelerinin yöneti-minde """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""proje döngüsü yöneti-mi""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""nin her aşamasinda yani proje belirleme, hazirlama, analiz, uygulama, izleme ve değerlendirme aşamalarinda uyulmasi gerekli temel prensip-ler belirlenecek, uygulamadaki keyfiliğin ve dağinikliğin önü-ne geçilecektir.
translation_a: In the management of public projects, the basic principles to be followed at each stage of """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""project cycle management"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""", i.e. project identification, preparation, analysis, implementation, monitoring and evaluation, will be determined and arbitrariness and disorganization in implementation will be prevented.
translation_b: The management of public projects - in every stage of the project cycle management - in each stage of the project, i.e. in the phases of project determination, preparation, analysis, implementation, monitoring and evaluation, the necessary basic principles will be determined, the pleasure and diversity in the implementation will be given priority.

text: Российскому образованию и науке вынесен смертный приговор.
translation_a: Russian education and science have been given a death sentence.
translation_b: Russian education and science were sentenced to death.

text: Партия открыта для вступления в нее всех, кто разделяет, её программные и уставные положения независимо от пола, социального положения, национальной и религиозной принадлежности.
translation_a: The Party is open for membership to all who share its program and statutory provisions regardless of gender, social status, national and religious affiliation.
translation_b: The Party is open to membership of all who share its program and statutory provisions regardless of gender, social status, nationality and religion.

text: Înlăturarea aberaţiei impozitării pensiilor, dublarea pensiilor mici şi majorarea burselor studenţeşti până la dublarea acestora.
translation_a: Remove the pension tax abomination, double small pensions and increase student grants to double.
translation_b: Eliminate the aberration of taxation of pensions, double small pensions and increase student scholarships to double them.

text: Es wäre falsch, die Zukunft der neuen Länder dauerhaft mit niedrigen Löhnen zu erkaufen.
translation_a: It would be wrong to permanently buy the future of the new states with low wages.
translation_b: It would be wrong to buy the future of new countries permanently with low wages.

text: Las empresas y los inversores buscan para cada actividad la localización geográfica más eficiente y el capital humano con mejores niveles de cualificación.
translation_a: Companies and investors look for the most efficient geographic location and the best qualified human capital for each activity.
translation_b: Companies and investors seek for each activity the most efficient geographical location and human capital with better levels of qualification.

text: Je propose que dans les entreprises employant aumoins mille salariés dans la société et ses filiales, la représentation des salariés dans les conseilsd’administration et conseils de surveillance soit portée au tiers de leurs membres (ou au nombre immédiatement inférieur au 1/3 en cas de composition ne permettant pas d’atteindre ce pourcentage).
translation_a: I propose that in companies employing at least one thousand employees in the company and its subsidiaries, employee representation on boards of directors and supervisory boards be increased to one-third of their members (or to the number immediately below 1/3 if the composition does not allow this percentage to be reached).
translation_b: I propose that in companies employing up to 1,000 employees in the company and its subsidiaries, the representation of employees in the boards of directors and supervisory boards be increased to one-third of their members (or to the number immediately less than 1/3 in the case of composition that does not allow to reach this percentage).

text: Singura ”dictatură” în democrație va fi dictatura legii, o lege severă, dar dreaptă!
translation_a: The only """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""dictatorship"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" in democracy will be the dictatorship of the law, a severe but just law!
translation_b: The only “dictatorship” in a democracy will be the dictatorship of the law, a strict but just law!

text: Мы требуем убрать рекламу с государственных каналов телевидения, а для коммерческих каналов создать Общественный совет по борьбе с нравственным и духовным разложением молодого поколения.
translation_a: We demand to remove advertising from state television channels, and for commercial channels to create a Public Council to combat the moral and spiritual decay of the younger generation.
translation_b: We demand to remove advertising from state television channels, and for commercial channels to create a Public Council to combat the moral and spiritual degradation of the young generation.

text: Daar verdienen we ons geld en dragen we bij aan een betere wereld.
translation_a: That is where we earn our money and contribute to a better world.
translation_b: We make our money and contribute to a better world.

text: In alle opzichten worden de direct betrokken burgers dichter bij het bestuur gebracht.
translation_a: In all respects, directly affected citizens are brought closer to government.
translation_b: In all respects, the directly involved citizens are brought closer to the administration.

text: Per contrastare sul serio la precarietà cancelleremo tutti i contratti atipici lasciati in vigore dalla Riforma Fornero facendo dell’apprendistato il contratto di avvio al lavoro principale.
translation_a: To seriously counter precarity we will cancel all atypical contracts left in place by the Fornero Reform by making apprenticeship the main job start contract.
translation_b: In order to seriously counter the precariousness, we will cancel all the atypical contracts left in force by the Fornero Reform, making apprenticeship the starting contract at the main job.

text: Мы - за то, чтобы политика, наконец, начала служить устройству жизни, а не сводилась к самодостаточной борьбе за власть.
translation_a: We are for politics to finally begin to serve the ordering of life, rather than being reduced to a self-sufficient power struggle.
translation_b: We advocate that politics should finally begin to serve the order of life, and not be reduced to a self-sufficient struggle for power.

text: A primeira: restringindo-se à construção de habitações, a intervenção governamental não deu nenhuma atenção à questão urbana como um todo.
translation_a: The first: by restricting itself to housing construction, government intervention paid no attention to the urban question as a whole.
translation_b: The first: restricting itself to housing construction, government intervention has given no attention to the urban issue as a whole.

text: Наявність власних збройних сил - невіддільний атрибут суверенної держави й гарант державної незалежності народу.
translation_a: Having its own armed forces is an integral attribute of a sovereign state and a guarantor of the state independence of the people.
translation_b: The presence of own armed forces is an inseparable attribute of a sovereign state and a guarantor of the state independence of the people.

text: Эмиссия денег категорически неприемлема для решения стоящих перед страной проблем.
translation_a: Issuing money is categorically unacceptable to solve the problems facing the country.
translation_b: The issue of money is categorically unacceptable for solving the problems facing the country.

text: ХДП України виступає за налагодження взаємовигідний відносин з усіма країнами світу.
translation_a: The CDU stands for establishing mutually beneficial relations with all countries of the world.
translation_b: The HDP of Ukraine advocates the establishment of mutually beneficial relations with all countries in the world.

text: Мы боремся за власть трудового народа.
translation_a: We are fighting for the power of the working people.
translation_b: We are fighting for the power of the working people.

text: D’altra parte anche negli Stati Uniti, faro della ‘democrazia’ occidentale la scena politica è dominata dalla ricchezza.
translation_a: On the other hand, even in the United States, the beacon of Western 'democracy,' the political scene is dominated by wealth.
translation_b: On the other hand, even in the United States, the beacon of Western ‘democracy’, the political scene is dominated by wealth.

text: Zo een vastgelegd maximum op de winstuitkering bestaat al bij de coöperatieve vennootschappen met sociaal oogmerk.
translation_a: Such a defined ceiling on profit distribution already exists in the case of cooperative societies with social purposes.
translation_b: Such a fixed maximum on profit benefit already exists for cooperative societies with a social purpose.

text: Мы - также сторонники высоких расходов государства на воспитание и обучение подрастающего поколения.
translation_a: We are also supporters of high government spending on the upbringing and education of the younger generation.
translation_b: We are also supporters of high state spending on the upbringing and training of the growing generation.

text: Contamos con un cuerpo normativo, la Ley de Prestación Canaria de Inserción, que no sólo ha elevado las cuantías económicas que se otorgan, sino que ofrece a las personas en diﬁcultad social una nueva oportunidad para construir un proyecto de vida a través de los itinerarios de inserción.
translation_a: We have a regulatory body, the Canary Islands Insertion Benefit Law, which has not only raised the economic amounts granted, but also offers people in social diﬁculty a new opportunity to build a life project through insertion itineraries.
translation_b: We have a regulatory body, the Canary Insert Benefit Law, which has not only raised the economic amounts granted, but also offers people with social difficulties a new opportunity to build a life project through the insert itineraries.

text: Bei der Mittelvergabe in der Entwicklungszusammenarbeit müssen gute Regierungsführung und Fortschritte im Bereich der Menschenrechte maßgebliche Kriterien sein.
translation_a: When allocating funds in development cooperation, good governance and progress in the area of human rights must be decisive criteria.
translation_b: Good governance and progress in the field of human rights must be key criteria for funding in development cooperation.

text: Noi siamo convinti, e tutti gli indicatori di salute ci danno ragione, che un servizio sanitario pubblico sia lo strumento più efficiente per tutelare quello che è un diritto, la salute, non un bene di consumo.
translation_a: We are convinced, and all health indicators prove us right, that a public health service is the most efficient tool to protect what is a right, health, not a consumer good.
translation_b: We are convinced, and all health indicators give us right, that a public health service is the most efficient tool for protecting what is a right, health, not a consumer good.

text: Situação: A educação permanente é a marca atual da sociedade do conhecimento.
translation_a: Situation: Permanent education is the current hallmark of the knowledge society.
translation_b: Situation: Permanent education is the current mark of the knowledge society.

text: Dados do Sistema Europeu de Vigilância Nutricional Infantil (COSI:2008) elaborado pela Organização Mundial de Saúde (OMS) e pelo Instituto Nacional de Saúde Dr. Ricardo Jorge (INSA) indicam que: mais de 90% das crianças portuguesas consome fast-food, doces e bebe refrigerantes, pelo menos quatro vezes por semana.
translation_a: Data from the European Child Nutrition Surveillance System (COSI:2008) prepared by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Dr. Ricardo Jorge National Health Institute (INSA) indicate that: more than 90% of Portuguese children consume fast food, sweets and drink soft drinks at least four times a week.
translation_b: Data from the European Child Nutritional Surveillance System (COSI:2008) prepared by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the National Institute of Health Dr. Ricardo Jorge (INSA) indicate that: more than 90% of Portuguese children consume fast food, sweets and beverages, at least four times a week.

text: Deshalb werden wir das große ehrenamtliche Engagement, insbesondere im Bereich der Heimatkultur, weiter fördern.
translation_a: That is why we will continue to promote the great voluntary commitment, especially in the area of local culture.
translation_b: Therefore, we will continue to promote large volunteer engagement, especially in the field of home culture.

text: Lograr que el 100 % de los jóvenes entre 15 y 17 años culminen estudios de educación media básica al 2020.
translation_a: To achieve that 100% of young people between 15 and 17 years of age complete basic secondary education by 2020.
translation_b: Achieving 100% of young people aged 15 to 17 to complete primary secondary education by 2020.

text: Pokračování v reformě justice.
translation_a: Continuing the reform of the justice system.
translation_b: Continuation of the Justice Reform.

text: Reducerea cu 50% a impozitelor indirecte aplicate la taxe de timbru, taxe de spitalizare şi taxe şcolare.
translation_a: A 50% reduction in indirect taxes on stamp duty, hospital fees and school fees.
translation_b: Reduction by 50% of indirect taxes on stamp fees, hospital fees and school fees.

text: Geçtiğimiz yıllarda adalet hizmetleri alanında önemli atılımlar gerçekleştirilmiştir.

text: Se abre un periodo intenso y difícil pero obligado tras los acontecimientos de los últimos años a los que se hace referencia en el Preámbulo de este programa.

text: Etliche Privatisierungen sind rückgängig gemacht und Einrichtungen der öffentlichen Daseinsvorsorge erfolgreich wieder kommunalisiert worden.

translation_b: Several privatizations have been reversed and institutions of public welfare have been successfully re-communalized.

text: V lepším případě slibují sociální podpory, které pak tiše odpískají, protože na ně stát prostě nemá.
translation_a: At best, they promise social benefits, which they then quietly write off because the state simply cannot afford them.
translation_b: In the best case, they promise social support, which they then silently repay, because the state simply does not have them.

text: Для достижения этих целей в социальной сфере мы считаем, что России необходима общественно-политическая система, в которой экономическая, социальная и духовная жизнь будет ориентирована на защиту прав и свобод личности, удовлетворение ее потребностей.
translation_a: In order to achieve these goals in the social sphere, we believe that Russia needs a socio-political system in which economic, social and spiritual life will be oriented towards the protection of the rights and freedoms of the individual and the satisfaction of his or her needs.
translation_b: In order to these goals in the social sphere, we believe that Russia needs a socio-political system in which economic, social and spiritual life will be oriented towards the protection of the rights and freedoms of the individual, the satisfaction of his needs.

text: Про них даже в Конституции России не говорится.
translation_a: They are not even mentioned in the Russian Constitution.
translation_b: It is not mentioned in the Russian Constitution.

text: Соціальна ринкова система найвищою мірою відповідає принципам християнської моралі, тому що в центр уваги економічного життя стає людина.
translation_a: The social market system is the most consistent with the principles of Christian morality because it puts people at the center of economic life.
translation_b: The social market system in the highest degree corresponds to the principles of Christian morality, because the human being becomes the center of attention of economic life.

text: Per quanto riguarda il conflitto di interesse che riguarda i concessionari di pubblici servizi noi proponiamo che venga riaffermata l'ineleggibilità, cosi come previsto dalla legge dello Stato mentre per gli altri conflitti si rende necessario introdurre una nuova disciplina.
translation_a: Regarding the conflict of interest affecting public service concessionaires we propose that ineligibility should be reaffirmed as provided for in state law, while for other conflicts it is necessary to introduce new regulations.
translation_b: As for the conflict of interest that concerns concessionaries of public services, we propose that the inelegibility be reaffirmed, as provided by state law, while for other conflicts it becomes necessary to introduce a new discipline.

text: Svět se rychle mění, takže s tím, co se naučí ve škole, člověk celý život nevystačí.
translation_a: The world is changing fast, so what you learn in school won't last your whole life.
translation_b: The world is changing rapidly, so with what you learn in school, you will not be enough for a lifetime.

text: Okul mekanlarının Lider Türkiye'ye yaraşır şekilde planlaması ve inşasını yapacağız.

translation_b: We will plan and build the school premises in a manner suitable for the Leader of Turkey.

text: Przed wyborami w 2005 roku obiecaliśmy, że zlikwidujemy Wojskowe Służby Informacyjne (WSI).

translation_b: Before the 2005 elections, we promised to eliminate the Military Intelligence Service (WSI).

text: Veel radio- en televisieuitzendingen kunnen de toets der bijbelse kritiek niet doorstaan.

text: МЕДВЕДЬ объединяет всех тех, кто стремится изменить ситуацию в стране.

translation_b: BEAR unites all those who seek to change the situation in the country.

text: Așa după cum v-ași dat și dvs. seama, o bună parte din clasa politică din România își aduce aminte de Poporul Român o dată la doi ani sau o dată la patru ani, în funcție de cum sunt alegerile locale, parlamentare sau prezidențiale.
translation_a: As you may have noticed, a good part of the political class in Romania remembers the Romanian people once every two years or once every four years, depending on the local, parliamentary or presidential elections.
translation_b: As you may have realized, a good part of the political class in Romania remembers the Romanian people once every two years or once every four years, depending on whether it is a local, parliamentary or presidential election.

text: Aufrechterhaltung einer effizienten Landesverteidigung.
translation_a: Maintaining effective national defense.
translation_b: Maintain an efficient national defense.

text: A côté de l’incompatibilité à établir entre la fonction parlementaire et le mandat exécutif local, Ecolo propose d’organiser un réel décumul des mandats dérivés, prioritairement par la limitation du nombre de mandats d’administrateur ou d’administratrice au sein d’une entité dérivée, telle qu’une entreprise publique, une intercommunale, un organisme d’intérêt public ou une structure assimilée.
translation_a: Alongside the incompatibility to be established between the parliamentary function and the local executive mandate, Ecolo proposes to organize a real decumulation of derived mandates, first and foremost by limiting the number of director mandates within a derived entity, such as a public company, an intermunicipal company, a public interest organization or a similar structure.
translation_b: In addition to the incompatibility to be established between the parliamentary function and the local executive mandate, Ecolo proposes to organize a real decumulation of derivative mandates, primarily by limiting the number of mandates of administrator or administrator within a derivative entity, such as a public enterprise, an intercommunal, a public-interest organization or a similar structure.

text: Van universiteiten en hogescholen wordt ver-wacht dat zij een eigen helder profiel ontwik-kelen en inzetten op verdere specialisatie (focus en massa).
translation_a: Universities and colleges are expected to develop their own clear profile and commit to further specialization (focus and mass).
translation_b: Universities and colleges are expected to develop their own clear profile and commit to further specialization (focus and mass).

text: Desarrollaremos, conjuntamente con las universidades, programas de formación de futuros maestros con niveles de excelencia internacional.

translation_b: We will develop, together with the universities, training programs for future masters with levels of international excellence.

text: Relacionar melhor a escola, a vida, o mercado de trabalho e os processos de socialização e de realização individual.

translation_b: Better connecting school, life, the labour market and the processes of socialization and individual accomplishment.

text: El ahorro de gasto público superfluo y las mejoras en la gestión son condiciones para compensar el costo de estas medidas, que representan un acumulado de unos 360 millones de dólares.
translation_a: Savings in superfluous public spending and improvements in management are conditions for offsetting the cost of these measures, which represent a cumulative amount of some US$360 million.
translation_b: Unnecessary public spending savings and management improvements are conditions to offset the cost of these measures, which represent a cumulative $360 million.

text: Ukončit současné mise v zahraničí, které neodpovídají tomuto požadavku.

translation_b: Terminate current missions abroad that do not meet this requirement.

translation_b: We will prevent the problems caused by urban overplanning and improve the quality of life in cities.

text: Claro que é tudo fantasia.

translation_b: Of course, it is all fantasy.

translation_b: The economic, political and spiritual revival of Russia is in the hands of its citizens.

text: La priorità numero uno è sbloccare l'accesso al credito per i piccoli e medi imprenditori e artigiani che continuano a investire e produrre in Italia.

text: Hastanelerin teknolojik altyapısı ve insan gücü imkanları iyileştirilecek, yönetim kapasitesi geliştirilecektir.

text: Мы - за сильное государство, которое наведет порядок, обеспечит права, безопасность и достаток.

translation_b: We are for a strong state that will bring order, guarantee rights, security and prosperity.

text: Но при нынешних механизмах решения жилищной проблемы 70% граждан никогда не смогут приобрести квартиру ни по льготной цене, ни по ипотеке.
translation_a: But under the current mechanisms for solving the housing problem, 70% of citizens will never be able to buy an apartment either at a reduced price or on a mortgage.
translation_b: But with the current mechanisms of solving the housing problem, 70% of citizens will never be able to purchase an apartment either at a discounted price or on a mortgage.

text: Но сегодня у неё нет пятого и главного фактора – ответственного и национально мыслящего правительства.
translation_a: But today it lacks the fifth and most important factor - a responsible and nationally minded government.
translation_b: But today it has no fifth and main factor – a responsible and nationally thoughtful government.

text: In Italia è stato avviato un processo nuovo di governance del farmaco e di riforma del prezzo e dell’accessibilità che è fondamentale venga portato a termine per garantire l’accesso ai cittadini italiani ai farmaci innovativi ad alto costo.
translation_a: A new process of drug governance and pricing and accessibility reform has been initiated in Italy, and it is critical that it be completed to ensure that Italian citizens have access to high-cost innovative drugs.
translation_b: In Italy, a new process of drug governance and price and accessibility reform has been initiated, which is crucial to ensure that Italian citizens have access to high-cost innovative drugs.

text: Якісна освіта сьогодні – це процвітання держави в майбутньому.

translation_b: Quality education today is the prosperity of the country in the future.

text: Z myślą o osobach starszych, przewlekle chorych stworzymy centra usług socjalnych, zapewniające kompleksową opiekę z nowymi alternatywnymi formami opieki nad osobami starszymi.
translation_a: For the elderly, chronically ill, we will create social service centers to provide comprehensive care with new alternative forms of care for the elderly.
translation_b: With the elderly, chronically ill people in mind, we will create social services centers, providing comprehensive care with new alternative forms of care for the elderly.

text: El gastar más de lo que se recibe en impuestos o tarifas públicas ha llevado al sector público a tener faltantes que tiene que financiar con préstamos o inflación.
translation_a: Spending more than is received in taxes or public fees has led to public sector shortfalls that have to be financed by borrowing or inflation.
translation_b: Spending more than it receives on taxes or public tariffs has led the public sector to have shortages that it has to finance with loans or inflation.

translation_b: Create an integrated financial support plan for new and investments.

text: Požadování revize smluv, které umožňují, aby zisk vytvořený v ČR byl vyváděn do zahraničí, zvláště v oblastech důležitých pro soběstačnost a bezpečnost státu.
translation_a: Demanding a review of treaties that allow profits generated in the Czech Republic to be exported abroad, especially in areas important for the self-sufficiency and security of the state.
translation_b: Requirements for the revision of contracts that allow the profit generated in the Czech Republic to be exported abroad, especially in areas important for self-sufficiency and state security.

text: От КПРФ: МЕДВЕДЬ — не партия тоталитарного прошлого и всеобщего страха.

translation_b: CPRF: BEAR is not a party of totalitarian past and universal fear.

text: Dzięki profesjonalnej polityce zagranicznej i dyplomacji będziemy przeciwdziałać podzia- łom między sojusznikami USA i Europy.

translation_b: Through professional foreign policy and diplomacy, we will counter the divisions between the allies of the United States and Europe.

text: Wir wollen eine EU, in der gut entlohnte und sozial abgesicherte Arbeit und ein Leben in Würde für alle gesichert ist.
translation_a: We want an EU in which well-paid and socially secure work and a life in dignity are ensured for all.
translation_b: We want an EU in which well-paid and socially secure work and a life in dignity are guaranteed for all.

text: Dobbiamo garantire il ricambio del potere, e la scelta preventiva, da parte degli elettori, dei partiti e degli uomini che debbono governare.
translation_a: We must ensure the turnover of power, and the voters' prior choice of the parties and men who are to govern.
translation_b: We must guarantee the replacement of power, and the prior choice, by the voters, the parties, and the men who must rule.

text: Vuol dire prevedere riserve e addizionalità per gli strumenti di politica industriale nazionale (come Impresa 4.0), poiché per ragioni strutturali le imprese del Sud hanno in partenza svantaggi che ne rendono più complesso l’accesso.
translation_a: It means providing reserves and additionality for national industrial policy instruments (such as Impresa 4.0), since for structural reasons Southern companies have disadvantages at the outset that make access to them more complex.
translation_b: It means providing reserves and complementarities for national industrial policy instruments (such as Enterprise 4.0), as for structural reasons Southern enterprises have disadvantages that make it more difficult to access them.

text: Milli Akıllı bombalar ile donatarak 2020 yılında ülkemizin hizmetine sunacağız.

text: Fortaleceremos la experiencia extraordinariamente positiva de las cooperativas para la prestación de servicios de salud.

translation_b: We will strengthen the extraordinary positive experience of cooperatives for the provision of health services.

text: Демократія - нетотожна консенсусу як прагненню до згоди і загальноприйнятних рішень, і в цьому, на нашу думку, її як сильні, так і слабкі сторони.
translation_a: Democracy is not the same as consensus, as the desire for agreement and generally accepted decisions, and this, in our opinion, is both its strength and weakness.
translation_b: Democracy is not identical to consensus as the desire for agreement and generally accepted decisions, and in this, in our opinion, its both strengths and weaknesses.

text: Nedopustíme, aby výše spoluúčasti ohrozila dostupnost zdravotní péče.

translation_a: PROGRAM OF THE ELECTORAL BLOC OF POLITICAL PARTIES """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Yulia Tymoshenko Bloc """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""We choose the path of justice, the path of unity and prosperity of the Ukrainian people.

text: Введення миротворців ООН на всю територію окупованого Росією Донбасу прискорить звільнення і повернення цих територій під суверенітет України.

translation_b: The introduction of UN peacekeepers into the entire territory of the occupied Donbass by Russia will accelerate the liberation and return of these territories under the sovereignty of Ukraine.

text: Justitie is na acht jaar Phenix en 12 miljoen euro nog steeds niet geïnformatiseerd, gebouwen verloederen waardoor gevangenen kunnen ontsnappen door slechte sloten, gevangenissen lopen over bij gebrek aan plaats en personeel, justitiehuizen draaien op halve kracht, eenvormige statistieken over gerechtszaken en ophelderingsgraden van misdrijven zijn nog steeds een wensdroom.
translation_a: Justice is still not computerized after eight years of Phenix and 12 million euros, buildings are decaying allowing prisoners to escape through bad locks, prisons are overflowing due to lack of space and staff, courthouses are running at half capacity, uniform statistics on court cases and clearance rates of crimes are still a pipe dream.
translation_b: Justice is still uninformed after eight years of Phenix and 12 million euros, buildings are damaging allowing prisoners to escape through bad locks, prisons are running over due to lack of space and staff, courthouses are running half-powered, uniform statistics on court cases and crime clarification rates are still a dream.

text: УКРП вважає, що головною перешкодою на шляху здійснення цих завдань є невирішене питання про політичну владу.
translation_a: The UCBC believes that the main obstacle to the implementation of these tasks is the unresolved issue of political power.
translation_b: The UKRP believes that the main obstacle to the implementation of these tasks is the unsolved question of political power.

text: Hierzu gehört auch, die unfairen Wettbewerbsvorteile internationaler Konzerne durch Steuergestaltungsmodelle zu beenden.
translation_a: This also includes putting an end to the unfair competitive advantages enjoyed by international corporations through tax structuring models.
translation_b: This also includes ending the unfair competitive advantages of international corporations through tax modeling.

text: Ciò però non vuol dire che tutti coloro che si riconoscono nell’ispirazione cristiana debbano necessariamente accettare la “diaspora” come condanna inappellabile della storia dei cattolici italiani, come se dovesse essere obbligatorio vivere in “partibus infidelium”, e non possano invece ritrovarsi in una stessa casa politica, se la cornice identitaria e programmatica corrisponde ai loro valori.
translation_a: This, however, does not mean that all those who identify with Christian inspiration must necessarily accept the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""diaspora"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" as an unappealable condemnation of the history of Italian Catholics, as if it were obligatory to live in """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""partibus infidelium,"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" and cannot instead find themselves in the same political house, if the identity and programmatic framework corresponds to their values.
translation_b: This, however, does not mean that all those who recognize themselves in Christian inspiration must necessarily accept the “diaspora” as an inapelable condemnation of the history of Italian Catholics, as if it should be mandatory to live in “partibus infidelium”, and can not instead find themselves in the same political house, if the identity and programmatic framework corresponds to their values.

text: Pacjent traktowany jest jak petent, niechciany i namolny klient.

translation_b: The patient is treated as a petent, undesirable and complacent client.

text: Daarmee wordt tegemoet gekomen aan de ernstige klachten van internationale mensenrechtenorganisaties.
translation_a: This responds to serious complaints from international human rights organizations.
translation_b: This is a response to serious complaints from international human rights organizations.

text: La salute è un diritto tutelato dalla nostra Costituzione ed è un interesse della collettività.
