translation_b: Health is a right protected by our Constitution and is in the interest of the community.

text: Avem nevoie de o nouă societate-educație,creativitate,tineri și noi tehnologiiO nouă societate care, fără a-și dizolva suveranitatea națională, face parte din marea familie a Uniunii Europene și este compatibilă cu aceasta, astfel încât între cetățenii României și cei ai celorlalte țări să nu existe deferențe majore privind mentalitatea, nivelul de trai, condițiile de muncă, accesul la știință, educație, informare și noi tehnologii, accesul la puterea politică și la posibilitatea de a-și decide viitorul.
translation_a: We need a new society-education, creativity, young people and new technologiesA new society which, without dissolving its national sovereignty, is part of the big family of the European Union and is compatible with it, so that between the citizens of Romania and those of the other countries there are no major differences in mentality, living standards, working conditions, access to science, education, information and new technologies, access to political power and the possibility to decide their future.
translation_b: A new society that, without dissolving its national sovereignty, is part of the great family of the European Union and is compatible with it, so that between Romanian citizens and those of other countries there are no major differences regarding mentality, living standards, working conditions, access to science, education, information and new technologies, access to political power and the ability to decide their future.

text: Το ΜέΡΑ25 θα νομοθετήσει την άμεση ενίσχυση των ασθενέστερων οικονομικά οικογενειών με την παροχή ελάχιστου εγγυημένου εισοδήματος (ΕΕΕ) σε εκείνες που βρίσκονται επισήμως κάτω του ορίου της φτώχειας όπως εκείνο οριζόταν το 2010, με σκοπό καμία οικογένεια να μην χρειάζεται να διαβιώνει κάτω αυτού του ορίου.

translation_b: The MEA25 will legislate the direct support for the economically weakest families by providing a guaranteed minimum income (MNE) to those who are officially below the poverty line as defined in 2010, so that no family needs to live below this limit.

text: Da parecchi decenni purtroppo, le acque minerali naturali vengono utilizzate al posto delle acque di rubinetto perché, grazie alla pubblicità martellante dei mezzi di comunicazione di massa, nell’immaginario collettivo sono considerate più controllate e quindi più sicure: in altri termini migliori delle acque di casa.
translation_a: For several decades now, unfortunately, natural mineral waters have been used in place of tap water because, thanks to the mass media's hammering advertising, they are considered in the public imagination to be more controlled and therefore safer-in other words, better than home waters.
translation_b: For several decades, unfortunately, natural mineral waters have been used instead of tap water because, thanks to the hammering advertising of the mass media, in the collective imagination they are considered more controlled and therefore safer: in other terms better than home water.

text: Citons les patients atteints de la maladie d’Alzheimer, de maladies rares, de maladies orphelines, etc. pour lesquelles aucun traitement n’est disponible faute d’investissement dans ces maladies.

text: Kısa vad eli portföy yatırımlarının piyasalardaki dalgalanmalar sonucu hızlı ve yüksek miktarda yurt dışına çıkmasını önleyecek tedbirler alınarak, kısa vad eli sermaye hareketleri ekon omik is tikrarsızlık unsuru ol maktan çıkarılacaktır.

text: Změnou služebního zákona zabráníme odchodu zkušených a schopných policistů.

translation_b: By changing the law, we will prevent the departure of experienced and capable police officers.

text: Позбавлення волі передбачатиметься лише за тяжкі злочини проти людини і суспільства, а решта буде каратися штрафами, майновими стягненнями чи примусовими роботами.

translation_b: Often, as soon as he is healed or when he no longer needs specialized care in the hospital, the patient wants to go home as soon as possible.

text: Для нас - свидетелей и соучастников великих потрясений - важно другое: найти в себе силы и волю к преодолению вражды и распри, к объединению всех групп, слоев и поколений во имя спасения и возрождения России как единой авторитетной в мире демократической державы, в которой каждый человек, чтущий Закон и правопорядок, сможет жить свободно, в достатке и под надежной защитой своего Российского государства.
translation_a: For us - witnesses and accomplices of the great upheavals - it is important to find in ourselves the strength and will to overcome hostility and strife, to unite all groups, strata and generations for the sake of salvation and revival of Russia as a single authoritative democratic power in the world, in which every person, honoring the law and the rule of law, will be able to live freely, in prosperity and under the reliable protection of the Russian state.
translation_b: For us, witnesses and accomplices of the great shocks, another thing is important: to find in ourselves the strength and will to overcome hostility and disagreement, to unite all groups, layers and generations in the name of the salvation and revival of Russia as a single authoritative democratic power in the world, in which every person who respects Law and legal order will be able to live freely, in abundance and under the reliable protection of his Russian state.

text: Приведемо військові пенсії у відповідність до рівня грошового забезпечення тих, хто служить зараз.

text: Diese Fehlentwicklung muss nun durch konkrete, international abgestimmte Maßnahmen abgestellt werden.

translation_b: Immediate legislative and systemic measures must be implemented to restore citizen confidence in the State.

text: Dost ve müttefik ülkeler bizden MİLGEM sipariş ediyor çünkü batılıların onlara vermediği teknolojileri biz kendilerine transfer ediyoruz.

translation_b: To develop public services with equity criteria oriented to: break the cycle of disadvantages of origin in children and girls; provide a system of care for adults, so that the conciliation for men and women is favored and birth rate is facilitated.

translation_b: Only a single public and free system of education at all levels, including vocational education, can ensure high-quality education and education and the reduction of class discrimination until their complete elimination.

translation_b: The police should be entitled to expel the perpetrator from a common residence and to prohibit entry to it for a certain period of time.

translation_b: The remuneration of the work must correspond to its quantity and quality.

translation_b: However, we want to promote further re-qualification and adult education programmes for Roma.

translation_a: We will bring fair working conditions, social security, the right to organize and collective bargaining in line with the ILO and the European Social Charter.

translation_b: For humanitarian reasons, the loss of citizenship applies to the perpetrator’s entire family, because it is not in our interest to break it apart.

translation_b: The authority should be aware of its punishability, not believe in its own impunity.

translation_b: Quotation of the first job for graduates of secondary special and higher educational institutions.

translation_b: We must not forget that a healthy economy can only be in a healthy state.

translation_b: We want temporary and short-term workers to enjoy the same social protection as permanent workers.

translation_a: The formation of cooperatives and other forms of voluntary association will be encouraged, in order to eliminate intermediation by private capital and allow users to have ample freedom to decide on the best forms of construction.
translation_b: The formation of cooperatives and other forms of voluntary association will be encouraged, in order to eliminate the intermediation made by private capital and allow users wide freedom to decide on the best forms of construction.

text: Vom promova un pachet legislativ coerent, stimulativ şi eficient vizând ameliorarea funcţionalităţii sistemului naţional de învăţământ (legea finanţării învăţământului, legea profesionalizării, legea învăţământului preuniversitar particular, statutul corpului didactic etc).
translation_a: We will promote a coherent, stimulating and effective legislative package aimed at improving the functionality of the national education system (law on education financing, law on professionalisation, law on private pre-university education, status of teaching staff, etc.).
translation_b: We will promote a coherent, stimulating and effective legislative package aimed at improving the functionality of the national education system (the law of financing education, the law of professionalization, the law of private pre-university education, the status of the teaching body, etc.).

text: Влада в державі не перейшла до рук носіїв національної ідеї — виразників інтересів українського народу.

translation_b: We express the united interests of modern Russian society.

text: La forma universale, che ai diritti fondamentali proviene dalla loro stipulazione in norme costituzionali sopraordinate a qualunque potere decisionale, garantisce che essi siano di tutti, siano inalienabili e indisponibili, rappresentando così limiti e vincoli invalicabili di qualsiasi potere, pubblico e privato.
translation_a: The universal form, which to fundamental rights comes from their stipulation in constitutional norms superordinate to any decision-making power, guarantees that they belong to everyone, are inalienable and unavailable, thus representing impassable limits and constraints of any power, public or private.
translation_b: The universal form, which the fundamental rights derive from their stipulation in constitutional norms above any decision-making power, ensures that they are of all, are inalienable and indisponible, thus representing inalienable limits and constraints of any power, public and private.

translation_b: In the past four years, accelerating reform has been included in the list of priorities of the governing coalition, but often the lack of a clear conception and operational difficulties of the coalition have hindered the achievement of the proposed goals.

translation_b: The ensuring of national unity and integrity, the approximation between citizens and the state and the important contributions to the settlement of various preliminary judgments, we believe, will ensure that religious education in schools is given by the state.

translation_b: Voluntary and non-profit activities must therefore be more recognized and poverty must be combated consistently.

translation_b: We want Italian wages to rise, starting with the recovery of the fiscal drag and the dismissal of the thirteenth.

translation_b: What if, instead of raising the purchase and sale price, the rental price dropped?

translation_b: The sale of non-agricultural land for construction on the basis of an open auction will bring to local budgets hundreds of times more money for the development of local self-government and solving issues of development of villages, cities, districts than today.

translation_a: We will use the Fund effectively in the fight against unemployment, especially youth unemployment.
translation_b: We will use the fund effectively in the fight against youth unemployment, in the first place.

translation_a: Change, with regard to self-employed contributions, the period for payment of contributions from monthly to quarterly, in order to better adapt them to seasonal or temporary activities.

text: Allo scioglimento del patto di Varsavia si è risposto rilanciando e rafforzando la Nato.

translation_b: In response to the dissolution of the Warsaw Pact, NATO was revitalized and strengthened.

text: Prioritățile guvernării și ale acțiunii noastre au fost stabilite, în mod fundamental, pornind de la nevoile și de speranțele cetățenilor țării.
translation_a: The priorities of our government and our action have been set, fundamentally, on the basis of the needs and hopes of the country's citizens.
translation_b: The priorities of our government and action have been established, fundamentally, based on the needs and hopes of the citizens of the country.

text: Espacios para atención de dependientes, léase adultos mayores y personas con capacidades diferentes a cargo de la familia –mayoritariamente mujeres- con preferencia de administración municipal con coparticipación en ejecución, administración, elaboración de lineamientos y supervisión de organismos del gobierno central como MIMP, MINSA y MIDIS.
translation_a: Spaces for the care of dependents, i.e., the elderly and people with disabilities, run by the family -mostly women- with preference for municipal administration with co-participation in execution, administration, preparation of guidelines and supervision of central government agencies such as MIMP, MINSA and MIDIS.
translation_b: Spaces for care of dependents, older adults and people with different capacities in charge of the family – mostly women – with preference of municipal administration with co-participation in execution, administration, formulation of guidelines and supervision of central government bodies such as MIMP, MINSA and MIDIS.

translation_b: Objective: facilitate access to credit and capital by companies and projects oriented to export and internationalization.

text: Uniunea recomandă alcătuirea unei reţele micro-regionale de şcoli, cu luare în considerare a următorilor factori: poziţia geografică a localităţilor, accesibilitatea lor şi reţeaua de drumuri publice, caracteristicile reţelei de învăţământ existente, caracteristicile generale ale localităţilor şi potenţialul de finanţare a autorităţilor locale.

translation_b: The Union recommends the establishment of a micro-regional network of schools, taking into account the following factors: the geographical position of the localities, their accessibility and the network of public roads, the characteristics of the existing educational network, the general characteristics of the localities and the financing potential of local authorities.

translation_b: Since the creator and guardian of Ukrainian culture (in its broadest sense) has always been a village, it is necessary to promote its revival.

text: Kamu üniversitelerinde yemekhane hizmetlerini kar amacı gütmeyecek şekilde düzenleyecek, kaliteyi yükseltecek ve ücretleri düşüreceğiz.
translation_a: We will organize cafeteria services at public universities on a non-profit basis, improve quality and reduce fees.
translation_b: We will organize the catering services in public universities in a way that is not for profit, we will improve the quality and reduce the fees.

text: Nekompromisně stojíme za tím, že splníme své závazky vůči našim partnerům, a to včetně výdajů na obranu ve výši 2 % HDP.
translation_a: We are uncompromising in our commitment to meet our commitments to our partners, including defence spending of 2% of GDP.
translation_b: We are committed to fulfilling our commitments to our partners, including defence spending of 2% of GDP.

text: Πιστεύουμε ότι είμαστε ένα έθνος με μεγάλη ναυτική παράδοση που θα πρέπει να διαφυλαχθεί και να αυξηθεί ακόμα περισσότερο.
translation_a: We believe that we are a nation with a great maritime tradition that should be preserved and further enhanced.
translation_b: We believe that we are a nation with a great naval tradition that should be preserved and further developed.

text: We hervormen de financiering van ziekenhuizen zodat ze financieel leefbaar zijn los van hun apotheek (zie ook verder). (F) Bovendien vraagt Groen transparantie over de kortingen die ziekenhuisapotheken krijgen bij de aankoop van geneesmiddelen.
translation_a: We reform the financing of hospitals so that they are financially viable separate from their pharmacy (see also below). (F) In addition, Green calls for transparency about the discounts hospital pharmacies receive when purchasing drugs.
translation_b: We are reforming the financing of hospitals so that they are financially viable independent of their pharmacy (see also further). (F) In addition, Green calls for transparency on the discounts that hospital pharmacies receive when purchasing medicines.

text: Tendo em vista que 67% dos trabalhadores brasileiros não possuem ensino fundamental completo, será dada especial atenção à formulação de programas de formação profissional e de educação de jovens e adultos.
translation_a: Given that 67% of Brazilian workers do not have completed elementary school, special attention will be paid to designing vocational training and education programs for young people and adults.
translation_b: Given that 67% of Brazilian workers do not have complete basic education, special attention will be paid to the formulation of vocational training and education programs for young people and adults.

text: México invierte apenas el equivalente a 0.45% del PIB en ciencia y tecnología.

text: Pensione di garanzia per i giovani.

translation_b: Digital services must also be accessible without the creation of customer profiles.

text: ЛДПР выступает за то, чтобы роль государства стала определяющей в стратегически важных отраслях экономики: энергетике, машиностроении, транспорте.
translation_a: The LDPR advocates that the role of the state should become decisive in strategically important sectors of the economy: energy, machine building, and transportation.
translation_b: LDPR advocates that the role of the state becomes decisive in strategically important sectors of the economy: energy, engineering, transport.

text: Le prochain gouvernement a besoin d’un projet commun pour l’avenir.
translation_a: The next government needs a common project for the future.
translation_b: The next government needs a common plan for the future.

text: Noi suntem alături de 7,4 milioane de români și nu renunțăm la obiectivul de a scăpa România de Traian Băsescu.
translation_a: We are with 7.4 million Romanians and we are not giving up our goal to rid Romania of Traian Băsescu.
translation_b: We are with 7.4 million Romanians and we do not give up the goal of getting rid of Traian Băsescu.

text: Следует срочно принять Закон о ЖСК, чтобы защитить законопослушных граждан от мошенников и чиновников-коррупционеров.

translation_b: It is necessary to urgently adopt the Law on Social Security in order to protect law-obedient citizens from fraudsters and corrupt officials.

text: Ми виступаємо за ліквідацію обмежень свободи вільного пересування та вибору місця проживання і роботи.

translation_b: We advocate the elimination of restrictions on freedom of movement and choice of place of residence and work.

text: Zejména ženy a děti jsou vystaveni specifickým formám násilí, jako je násilí v rodině a mezi partnery.
translation_a: Women and children in particular are exposed to specific forms of violence, such as domestic and inter-partner violence.
translation_b: In particular, women and children are exposed to specific forms of violence, such as domestic violence and violence between partners.

text: Schulen und Hochschulen sind wichtige Orte, an denen Demokratie erprobt werden kann.
translation_a: Schools and universities are important places where democracy can be tested.
translation_b: Schools and colleges are important places where democracy can be tested.

text: Ключевые посты в экономике в федеральных, региональных и муниципальных органах власти должны занять только честные профессионалы с хорошим образованием и соответствующим опытом работы не менее пяти лет.
translation_a: Key positions in the economy in federal, regional and municipal authorities should be occupied only by honest professionals with good education and relevant work experience of at least five years.
translation_b: Key positions in the economy in federal, regional and municipal authorities should be occupied only by honest professionals with good education and relevant work experience of at least five years.

text: Realizar un acompañamiento individualizado de las familias que reciben Asignaciones Familiares.
translation_a: To carry out an individualized follow-up of families receiving Family Allowances.
translation_b: Individual support for families receiving family allowances.

text: Do państw członkowskich Unii Europejskiej i Sojuszu Północnoatlantyckiego adresowane były także projekty takie jak: Trójmorze, Format Bukaresztański, współpraca nordycko-bałtycka.

translation_b: Projects such as the Three Seas, the Bucharest Format, the Nordic-Baltic cooperation were also addressed to the Member States of the European Union and the North Atlantic Alliance.

text: Der Hebel ist jetzt angesetzt, und die geleistete Arbeit muss konsequent fortgeführt werden, damit unser Schulwesen sich weiterhin neuen bildungspolitischen und gesellschaftlichen Herausforderungen stellen kann.
translation_a: The lever is now in place, and the work that has been done must be continued consistently so that our school system can continue to face new educational and social challenges.
translation_b: The leverage is now set, and the work done must be continued consistently so that our school system can continue to face new educational and social challenges.

text: Pouvoir devenir propriétaire de son logement est une priorité pour de nombreuses personnes.
translation_a: Owning your own home is a priority for many people.
translation_b: Being able to own a home is a priority for many people.

text: Мы выступаем за конституционную, а не договорную федерацию.
translation_a: We are in favor of a constitutional federation, not a treaty federation.
translation_b: We are in favor of a constitutional, not a treaty federation.

text: Таким чином, соціальна ринкова система створює передумови для гідного людини буття, вільного розвитку особи, збагачення суспільства і забезпечення реальної незалежності держави.
translation_a: Thus, the social market system creates the preconditions for a decent human existence, free development of the individual, enrichment of society and ensuring the real independence of the state.
translation_b: Thus, the social market system creates prerequisites for a worthy human being, free development of the person, enrichment of society and ensuring real independence of the state.

text: Accesul la justiţie este prima condiţie a statului de drept.

translation_b: Access to justice is the first condition of the rule of law.

text: Vláda proto navrhne zvýšit institucionální financování těchto služeb, tedy dotace těmto poskytovatelům.

translation_b: The Government will therefore propose to increase the institutional financing of these services, i.e. subsidies to these providers.

text: Aber eine falsche Regierungspolitik verschenkt die wichtigsten Chancen.
translation_a: But the wrong government policies are giving away the most important opportunities.
translation_b: But a misguided government policy loses the most important opportunities.

text: Народна влада і Закон зроблять систему соціальних стандартів основою державних гарантій матеріального достатку всіх громадян України.
translation_a: The people's power and the Law will make the system of social standards the basis of state guarantees of material well-being for all citizens of Ukraine.
translation_b: The people’s authorities and the Law will make the system of social standards the basis of state guarantees of material prosperity for all citizens of Ukraine.

text: Zasadíme se o posílení počtu pracovníků orgánů sociálně právní ochrany dětí a zvý-šení dostupnosti terénních sociálních služeb.
translation_a: We will strive to strengthen the number of staff of social and legal protection of children and increase the availability of field social services.
translation_b: We will work to strengthen the number of employees of the social protection authorities and increase the availability of field social services.

text: Eine sinnvolle und nachhaltige Steuerreform darf nicht durch neuerliche Schulden finanziert werden.

translation_b: A meaningful and sustainable tax reform cannot be financed by new debt.

text: Toplumsal varlığımızın belkemiği olan ve helâl kazanç için bütün sermayesini ve emeğini seferber edip gece gündüz çalışan esnaf ve sanatkârlarımız ekonomimizin can damarlarıdır.
translation_a: Our tradesmen and artisans, who are the backbone of our social existence and who mobilize all their capital and labor for halal earnings and work day and night, are the lifeblood of our economy.
translation_b: Our craftsmen and artists, who are the foundation of our social existence and who mobilize all their capital and labor for worthy profit and work day and night, are the vital vessels of our economy.

text: Reintegrarea ţării şi cooperarea economică externă constituie garantul achiziţiilor de resurse energetice în condiţii favorabile.
translation_a: The country's reintegration and external economic cooperation are the guarantors of favourable energy procurement.
translation_b: The reintegration of the country and external economic cooperation are the guarantor of procurement of energy resources under favourable conditions.

text: Забезпечимо доступним житлом молоді сім’ї, лікарів, учителів, військовослужбовців, працівників правоохоронних органів за рахунок щорічного будівництва 100 000 квартир.
translation_a: We will provide affordable housing for young families, doctors, teachers, military personnel, and law enforcement officers by building 100,000 apartments annually.
translation_b: We will provide affordable housing for young families, doctors, teachers, military personnel, law enforcement workers at the expense of the annual construction of 100,000 apartments.

text: Управляющие компании должны отчитываться перед жильцами за каждую потраченную копейку.

translation_b: Managing companies must report to tenants for every penny spent.

text: Milli eğitimin temel direği öğretmendir.

translation_b: The foundation of national education is the teacher.

text: Facilitar la transmisión empresarial y la adopción de mejores prácticas en las pymes, adoptando una plataforma española que conecte las empresas con especialistas en fusiones y adquisiciones, derecho, auditoría, contabilidad, fiscalidad, bancos y todos aquellos intermediarios y agencias dedicadas a la transmisión de empresas.
translation_a: To facilitate business transfer and the adoption of best practices in SMEs, by adopting a Spanish platform that connects companies with specialists in mergers and acquisitions, law, auditing, accounting, taxation, banks and all those intermediaries and agencies dedicated to business transfer.
translation_b: Facilitate the transmission of business and the adoption of best practices in SMEs, adopting a Spanish platform that connects companies with specialists in mergers and acquisitions, law, audit, accounting, taxation, banks and all those intermediaries and agencies dedicated to the transmission of companies.

text: Wesprzemy wspólnoty ludzi dobrej woli.

text: Komendant Główny PSP nie jest zwierzchnikiem wojewodów i nie może wydawać im poleceń; tym bardziej dotyczy to komendantów woje-wódzkich.
translation_a: The Chief Fire Officer of the Fire Department is not the superior of the provincial commanders and cannot give them orders; even less so for provincial commanders.
translation_b: The Commander-in-Chief of the PSP is not the commander-in-chief of the voivodes and cannot give orders to them; this is especially true of the commander-in-chief of the voivodes.

text: Мы понимаем также, что в той новой системе координат, которую ей, по логике истории, придется осваивать всерьез и надолго, проблемы нравственности и справедливости будут носить острый и глубоко противоречивый внутренне характер.
translation_a: We also realize that in that new system of coordinates, which, according to the logic of history, it will have to master seriously and for a long time, the problems of morality and justice will be acute and deeply contradictory internally.
translation_b: We also understand that in that new system of coordinates which it, according to the logic of history, will have to master seriously and for a long time, the problems of morality and justice will be acute and deeply contradictory internally.

text: Ab Herbst 2017 sollen zusätzlich 10.000 Stipendien vergeben werden. Die Beträge wurden um 18% erhöht.
translation_a: An additional 10,000 scholarships will be awarded starting in the fall of 2017. The amounts have been increased by 18%.
translation_b: As of autumn 2017, an additional 10,000 scholarships will be awarded, with amounts increased by 18%.

text: Wir wollen die Anzahl der Studienplätze vom regionalen Bedarf entkoppeln und damit auch die ostdeutschen Hochschulen für ihre überdurchschnittlichen Ausbildungsleistungen belohnen.
translation_a: We want to decouple the number of study places from regional demand and thus also reward the eastern German universities for their above-average educational performance.
translation_b: We want to disconnect the number of study places from the regional needs and thus also reward the East German universities for their above-average training services.

text: Subvenţionarea chiriei şi utilităţilor reprezentând 75% din costul acestora, dar nu mai mult de 900 de lei pentru fiecare angajat care îşi găseşte un loc de muncă la o distanţă de 50 de km faţă de locul de reşedinţă, anual din 2017.
translation_a: Subsidising rent and utilities at 75% of their cost, but no more than 900 lei for each employee who finds a job within 50 km of their place of residence, annually from 2017.
translation_b: Subsidy of rent and utilities representing 75% of their cost, but not more than 900 lei for each employee who finds a job at a distance of 50 km from the place of residence, annually since 2017.

text: Sogar die Bundesregierung stimmt regelmäßig in der UN gegen die US-Blockade.

translation_b: Even the federal government regularly votes in the UN against the U.S. blockade.

text: Vom promova consumul de alimente produse în agricultura din România, pentru a spori numărul de locuri de muncă din agricultura noastră.
translation_a: We will promote the consumption of food produced in Romanian agriculture to increase the number of jobs in our agriculture.
translation_b: We will promote the consumption of food produced in agriculture in Romania, to increase the number of jobs in our agriculture.

text: Fără o victorie a USL în alegeri, Traian Băsescu va decide din nou în România, va face iar guverne, și va relua tot ce a stricat în acești ani!
translation_a: Without a USL victory in the elections, Traian Băsescu will decide again in Romania, will make governments again, and will resume everything he has ruined during these years!

translation_b: This will allow us to find and formulate a system of national Russian interests at a new historical stage of development.

translation_a: To increase pensions, create a """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Senior Generations Fund"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" from revenues from oil and gas exports and privatization of state property.

translation_b: For us, it is unacceptable to form a program of action based on populist slogans.

text: A questi fini, le opzioni strategiche che proponiamo - da abbinare alla ricetta tradizionale, ma niente affatto semplice da realizzare, della valorizzazione e dismissione del patrimonio pubblico – consistono nel lancio di nuova tipologia di titoli del debito pubblico a un tasso d’interesse analogo a quello dei titoli tedeschi, la cui sottoscrizione verrebbe incentivata dalla previsione di una completa esenzione fiscale sui relativi rendimenti, nonché dalla revisione dei regimi d’imposizione patrimoniale e dall’applicazione di un’imposta sui patrimoni superiori a 2,5 milioni di euro.
translation_a: For these purposes, the strategic options we propose - to be combined with the traditional, but by no means simple to implement, recipe of the valorization and divestment of public assets - consist of the launch of new type of public debt securities at an interest rate similar to that of German bonds, the subscription of which would be incentivized by the provision of a complete tax exemption on the related yields, as well as the revision of wealth tax regimes and the application of a tax on assets exceeding 2.5 million euros.
translation_b: For this purpose, the strategic options we propose – to be combined with the traditional, but not at all easy to, recipe of the valuation and dismissal of public assets – consist of the launch of a new type of public debt securities at a rate of interest similar to that of German securities, the subscription of which would be encouraged by the provision of a complete tax exemption on the respective yields, as well as the revision of the asset tax schemes and the application of a asset tax above 2.5 million euros.

text: Мы, члены и сторонники ПЭВК, осознавая ответственность за судьбу нашего государства, объединились в политическую партию для того, чтобы совместными усилиями способствовать предотвращению экономического краха и социальной катастрофы, созданию необходимых экономических, политических и правовых условий для развития Республики Крым как правового демократического государства в составе Украины, способного защитить интересы граждан всех национальностей.
translation_a: We, members and supporters of the PEVK, realizing the responsibility for the fate of our state, have united into a political party in order to jointly contribute to the prevention of economic collapse and social catastrophe, to the creation of the necessary economic, political and legal conditions for the development of the Republic of Crimea as a legal democratic state within Ukraine, capable of protecting the interests of citizens of all nationalities.
translation_b: We, members and supporters of the PEVK, conscious of the responsibility for the fate of our state, united into a political party in order to jointly contribute to the prevention of economic collapse and social catastrophe, to the creation of the necessary economic, political and legal conditions for the development of the Republic of Crimea as a legal democratic state within Ukraine, capable of protecting the interests of citizens of all nationalities.

translation_a: With autocratic governments, the gap in inequalities in wages and pensions has been so brutally widened that the few are prospering and the many are starving.

text: Chceme je zvýšit tak, aby Česká republika byla méně oblíbenou průjezdní trasou pro transevropské kamiony a aby bylo výhodnější k dálkové přepravě použít železnici.

text: Este marco de convivencia que nos ha evitado luchas fratricidas, es fruto de muchos años de lucha del pueblo mexicano y ahora necesita ser reforzado y defendido ante los ataques de quienes pretenden sustituir la visión civil de la política y de las acciones de los gobiernos y del Estado, por sus particulares concepciones morales y religiosas.
translation_a: This framework of coexistence, which has prevented fratricidal struggles, is the result of many years of struggle by the Mexican people and now needs to be reinforced and defended against the attacks of those who seek to replace the civil vision of politics and the actions of governments and the State with their particular moral and religious conceptions.
translation_b: This framework of coexistence that has avoided our fraternal struggles, is the fruit of many years of struggle of the Mexican people and now needs to be reinforced and defended against the attacks of those who intend to replace the civil vision of politics and the actions of governments and the State, by their particular moral and religious conceptions.

text: L’edilizia residenziale pubblica non basta a dare risposte a chi vive situazioni di disagio abitativo e risulta sufficiente per appena 1/3 di chi ne ha veramente bisogno.

text: El incremento de penas para determinados delitos en el nuevo Código Penal no parece haber supuesto un sistema disuasorio ni una efectiva reducción de esos hechos, al no acompañarse de un intento de concienciar sobre los aspectos antisociales de los mismos.

text: È necessario cambiare drasticamente le regole, imponendo, a chi intende rimanere nell’università, un effettivo tempo pieno e allontanando dagli atenei i professionisti con studio privato, in modo da porre fine allo scandalo tutto italiano di chi usa il marchio università per tornaconto personale.
translation_a: It is necessary to drastically change the rules, imposing, on those who intend to remain in the university, an effective full-time status and driving professionals with private practice away from the universities, so as to end the all-Italian scandal of those who use the university brand for personal gain.

translation_a: In its attitude toward people who do not recognize any religion, the CDU is guided by the universally recognized right of every person to choose their own attitude toward religion, and respects the worldview beliefs of each person, provided they do not contain elements of hostility to the ideals of Christianity.
translation_b: In relation to people who do not recognize any religion, the Democratic Party of Ukraine is guided by the universally recognized right of each person to choose their own attitude toward religion, respects the world-view beliefs of each person, provided that they lack elements of hostility to the ideals of Christianity.

text: З ліквідацією кляси ракет середнього та більшого засягу, крилатих ракет наземного базування сухопутні війська втратили можливість завдавати ударів по військах та об’єктах противника, його резервах у глибині оперативної побудови військ, що збільшило їхню залежність від дій авіяції, бо у складі Збройних Сил України тільки вона спроможна завдавати ефективних ударів на значному віддаленні від місць свого базування та лінії фронту (державного кордону).
translation_a: With the elimination of the class of medium-range and long-range missiles and ground-launched cruise missiles, the ground forces lost the ability to strike at enemy troops and facilities, as well as their reserves, in the depths of the operational formation of troops, which increased their dependence on aviation, since it is the only force in the Armed Forces of Ukraine that can deliver effective strikes at a considerable distance from their base and the front line (state border).
translation_b: With the elimination of the class of medium and greater impact missiles, cruise missiles of ground-based land troops lost the ability to strike the troops and objects of the enemy, its reserves in the depth of the operational construction of the troops, which increased their dependence on the actions of aviation, because in the Armed Forces of Ukraine only it is able to strike effective strikes at a considerable distance from the places of its base and the front line (state border).

translation_b: The social and economic transformations experienced by the country in recent decades (the growth of certain sectors of the economy, migrations and settlements in marginal peripheral areas, accelerated urban growth, among others) generate changes that impact health processes and make new and old health problems emerge, which require integral strategies for their attention and solution.

text: A partire dalla metà di luglio, da quando è entrata in vigore la riforma, con una accelerazione crescente attesa per l’autunno, e sotto il peso della crisi, per effetto della Legge Fornero le imprese non solo non creeranno posti fissi, ma faranno sempre meno contratti di lavoro a tempo determinato: manderanno a casa coorti crescenti di lavoratori a tempo determinato; lo faranno semplicemente via mancato rinnovo dei contratti che vengono via via a scadenza, non avranno neppure l’onere di spiegarlo: diranno solo che è la legge che li costringe.
translation_a: As of mid-July, since the reform took effect, with an increasing acceleration expected in the fall, and under the weight of the crisis, as a result of the Fornero Law, companies will not only not create permanent jobs, they will make fewer and fewer fixed-term employment contracts: they will send home growing cohorts of fixed-term workers; they will do so simply via non-renewal of contracts that are gradually coming to an end, they will not even have the burden of explaining it: they will just say that it is the law that forces them.
translation_b: From mid-July, since the reform came into force, with an increasing acceleration expected for autumn, and under the weight of the crisis, as a result of the Fornero Law, companies will not only not create fixed jobs, but will make fewer and fewer fixed-term employment contracts: they will send home increasing cohorts of fixed-term workers; they will simply do so without renewal of the contracts that are terminated, they will not even have the burden of explaining it: they will only say that it is the law that compels them.

text: II. SIGURANŢĂ SOCIALĂ ŞI SIGURANŢA TRAIULUI„…ne făurim propria soartă, iar viaţa ne va oferi daruri doarîn măsura în care o vom forţa noi prin tenacitate îndârjită,cooperare indesolubilă, muncă hotărâtă şi serioasă.”(Márton Áron)În anii precedenţi au fost implementate mai multe reforme sociale în domenii ca sistemul public de pensii, asigurarea de pensii private şi facultative, indemnizaţia pentru creşterea copiilor, indemnizaţia pentru familii mari, trusoul pentru nou-născuţi, protecţia socială a persoanelor cu dizabilităţi, integrarea socială a persoanelor în şomaj, protecţia socială a persoanelor în vârstă, construcţia de locuinţe pentru tineret, etc.

SOCIAL SECURITY AND SECURITY OF LIVING""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""...we make our own destiny, and life will give us gifts only to the extent that we force it upon ourselves through dogged tenacity, indomitable cooperation, determined and earnest work.""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""(Márton Áron)In the previous years, several social reforms have been implemented in areas such as the public pension system, private and voluntary pension insurance, child-raising allowance, allowance for large families, the newborn baby kit, social protection for the disabled, social integration of the unemployed, social protection for the elderly, construction of housing for young people, etc.

translation_a: It is necessary, therefore, to provide our country with a national legislative framework that enshrines the public nature of """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""integrated water service""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""(IWS) and removes it from that of local public services of economic importance.
translation_b: It is therefore necessary to equip our country with a national legislative framework that establishes the public nature of the “integrated water service” (SII) and subtract it from that of local public services of economic importance.

text: Народные предприятия будут поставлены в равные правовые условия с другими видами акционерных обществ.

translation_b: People's enterprises will be placed in equal legal conditions with other types of joint-stock companies.

text: Gaat het over ons strafrecht, dan heeft de SGP ook nog wel een paar wensen: geen pardon voor degenen die hulpverleners hinderen of aanvallen, hogere straffen voor moord en doodslag, minder kale taakstraffen, en: levenslang is levenslang.
translation_a: When it comes to our criminal law, the SGP also has a few wishes: no pardon for those who obstruct or attack emergency workers, higher sentences for murder and manslaughter, less barren community service, and: life in prison is life in prison.
translation_b: When it comes to our criminal law, the SGP also has a few wishes: no forgiveness for those who hinder or attack aid providers, higher penalties for murder and murder, fewer bald office penalties, and: life sentence is life sentence.

text: Η συρρίκνωση του κυπριακού στόλου την τελευταία διετία πρέπει να ανακοπεί χωρίς βέβαια να διακυβεύεται η ποιοτική αναβάθμιση που είχε επιτευχθεί στην πορεία ένταξης στην Ε.Ε.

text: Vamos também dedicar toda a atenção para o turismo de negócios nos principais centros urbanos, especialmente por sua ligação com setores de ponta como a agropecuária empresarial e as indústrias da moda, de calçados, de móveis, de informática e outras, que se reúnem periodicamente em grandes feiras de negócios.

translation_b: We will also pay full attention to business tourism in major urban centers, especially for its connection with cutting-edge sectors such as business farming and the fashion, footwear, furniture, computer and other industries, which meet periodically at major business fairs.

translation_b: We want to contribute to ensuring the conditions for a physically and mentally healthy and quality life of man.

translation_b: Citizens need to be able to better understand which associations and companies have influenced a law, whether at the national or European level.

translation_b: Respect for the stability of the institutional framework governing shipping in tax and organizational matters.

text: Переконаність у тому, що людство неминуче прийде до торжества розуму і справедливості, що тільки соціалізм є надійною гарантією порятунку держави від катастрофи, — ось та стрижнева ідея, навколо якої об’єднуються комуністи.
translation_a: The conviction that humanity will inevitably come to the triumph of reason and justice, that only socialism is a reliable guarantee of saving the state from disaster, is the core idea around which communists unite.
translation_b: The conviction that humanity will inevitably come to triumph of reason and justice, that only socialism is the reliable guarantee of the salvation of the state from catastrophe, is the basic idea around which communists are united.

text: Uskutečnit odkup akcií státem ve strategické oblasti (energie, spoje, veřejná do-prava, voda, kanalizace, těžba surovin).

translation_b: Acquisition of shares by the state in strategic areas (energy, connections, public procurement, water, sewage, raw materials mining).

text: Le scelte da compiere non sono semplici né scontate.

translation_b: The choices to be made are neither simple nor obvious.

text: Não pretende o Bloco de esquerda substituir a liberalização por um sistema de preços tabelados, que obrigasse o estado a compensar as empresas distribuidoras e portanto a transferir receitas orçamentais, financiadas por impostos pagos por todos os contribuintes, para um subsídio às empresas e aos automobilistas.
translation_a: The Left Bloc does not want to replace liberalization with a system of fixed prices, which would oblige the state to compensate the distribution companies and therefore transfer budget revenue, financed by taxes paid by all taxpayers, to subsidize companies and motorists.
translation_b: The Left Bloc does not intend to replace liberalization with a system of tabulated prices, which would force the state to compensate the distribution companies and thus to transfer budget revenues, financed by taxes paid by all taxpayers, into a subsidy to companies and car drivers.

text: Rząd Prawa i Sprawiedliwości prowadzi systemową, skuteczną restytucję polskich strat wojennych.

translation_b: The Law and Justice Government is carrying out a systematic and effective compensation for Polish war losses.

text: Luchamos contra la delincuencia y la ocupación ilegal, no contra aquellos que están en una situación de precario.

translation_b: We fight against crime and illegal occupation, not against those who are in a precarious situation.

text: Роль держави в регулюванні економічних процесів поступово зменшується, значення ринку, отже, і господарської ініціативи окремих виробників, підприємств, асоціацій зростає.
translation_a: The role of the state in regulating economic processes is gradually decreasing, while the importance of the market, and thus the economic initiative of individual producers, enterprises, and associations, is increasing.
translation_b: The role of the state in regulating economic processes gradually decreases, the value of the market, therefore, and the economic initiative of individual producers, enterprises, associations increases.

translation_b: Youth will be raised with love for Ukraine, its history, cultural traditions.

translation_a: We prepared and implemented the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""Action Plan for the Prevention of Human Rights Violations"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" within the framework of the case law of the ECtHR in order to address human rights issues one by one and to solve them within a certain timeframe.

translation_a: The very large increase in recent years in health care expenditure, but also the ever-increasing costs of various operations, specialised examinations and treatments, make it problematic for a large part of the population to adequately meet the corresponding financial requirements.
translation_b: The very high increase in healthcare spending in recent years, as well as the ever-increasing cost of various surgeries, specialized examinations, as well as therapeutic treatments, make it problematic for a large part of the population to adequately meet the corresponding financial requirements.

text: Alors qu’avant le déclenchement de la crise, les taux de chômage entre Etats membres étaient assez semblables aujourd’hui les écarts sont énormes !

translation_b: While before the crisis the unemployment rates between member states were quite similar, today the disparities are huge!

text: Η ΝΔ και το ΠΑΣΟΚ λένε και πάλι ψέματα, όταν ισχυρίζονται ότι δεν θα πάρουν άλλα αντι-λαϊκά μέτρα.

text: In un momento di grande sofferenza per le casse pubbliche italiane e di assoluta necessità di risorse da destinare a politiche pubbliche in funzione anti crisi, crescono le imposte che Eni SpA versa all’estero, erogando dividendi alle società controllate aventi sede in Stati e territori a regime fiscale privilegiato la cui opacità rende di fatto impossibile alcun controllo sulla natura e sugli scopi delle stesse.
translation_a: At a time of great distress for Italy's public coffers and absolute need for resources to be allocated to anti-crisis public policies, the taxes that Eni SpA pays abroad are growing, disbursing dividends to subsidiaries based in states and territories with privileged tax regimes whose opacity makes any control over their nature and purposes effectively impossible.
translation_b: In a time of great suffering for the Italian public treasures and of the absolute need for resources to be allocated to public policies in anti-crisis function, the taxes that Eni SpA pays abroad are growing, paying dividends to controlled companies based in states and territories with a privileged tax regime whose opacity makes it practically impossible to control the nature and purposes of the same.

text: Tanto los pueblos que han conseguido derrotar a la barbarie, como los que la sufren, cuentan con nuestro apoyo internacionalista.
translation_a: Both the peoples who have managed to defeat barbarism, as well as those who suffer from it, count on our internationalist support.
translation_b: Both the peoples who have succeeded in defeating barbarism and those who suffer from it have our internationalist support.

text: Stattdessen wollen wir den Zugang zu Datenbeständen sektorbezogen und gegen Entgelt ermöglichen, wenn ein Wettbewerber keine Chance hat, selbst entsprechende Datenbestände aufzubauen.
translation_a: Instead, we want to enable access to databases on a sector-specific basis and for a fee if a competitor has no chance of building up corresponding databases itself.
translation_b: Instead, we want to enable access to data repositories by sector and for a fee if a competitor has no chance to build the corresponding data repositories himself.

text: Dostrzegamy fundamentalne znaczenie, jakie dla integracji europejskiej ma tandem francusko-niemiecki.

text: D’abord il s’agit d’utiliser l’instrument fiscal pour encourager l’investissement dans le capital humain (formation, recherche, innovation) reconnu comme un facteur de croissance ainsi que de lutte contre les exclusions, dès lors que l’absence de formation est précisément le handicap majeur de beaucoup de sans emplois : voir la première priorité.
translation_a: Firstly, we need to use the tax system to encourage investment in human capital (training, research, innovation), which is recognized as a factor in growth and the fight against exclusion, given that lack of training is precisely the major handicap facing many of the unemployed: see the first priority.
translation_b: The first is to use the tax instrument to encourage investment in human capital (training, research, innovation) recognised as a factor of growth as well as combating exclusion, since the lack of training is precisely the major disability of many unemployed: see the first priority.

text: Alle Mitgliedstaaten müssen gemäß ihren Kapazitäten Flüchtlinge und Asylsuchende aufnehmen.

translation_b: All Member States must accept refugees and asylum seekers in accordance with their capacity.

text: Мы введем федеральную законодательную норму о замещении любых выборных должностей не более двух сроков подряд.

translation_b: We will introduce a federal legislative norm on the replacement of any elected positions for no more than two consecutive terms.

text: Україна потребує кардинальних змін.

text: Ввести обязательную выплату социального пособия индивидуальному предпринимателю из федерального бюджета в случае его болезни или временной нетрудоспособности.
translation_a: Introduce mandatory payment of social benefits to an individual entrepreneur from the federal budget in the event of his illness or temporary disability.
translation_b: Compulsory payment of social benefits to individual entrepreneurs from the federal budget in case of illness or temporary disability.

text: Vrijwilligersvergoedingen blijven tot een maximumbedrag onbelast.
translation_a: Volunteer compensation remains untaxed up to a maximum amount.

text: É uma decorrência lógica da sua condição de centro hegemônico mundial e, conseqüentemente, regional.
translation_a: This is a logical consequence of its status as the hegemonic center of the world and, consequently, of the region.
translation_b: It is a logical consequence of its status as a global and consequently regional hegemonic center.

text: De duurzame affectieve relaties die we onderhouden met gezins- en familieleden zorgen voor geborgenheid en zijn een basis van onderlinge solidariteit.
translation_a: The lasting affective relationships we maintain with family and relatives provide security and are a basis of mutual solidarity.
translation_b: The lasting affective relationships we maintain with family and family members provide security and are a basis for mutual solidarity.

text: Ao separar a supervisão para uma entidade autónoma, aumentaria a independência na prossecução da respetiva função, em linha com as melhores práticas internacionais e com as recomendações do BCE ao nível da relação entre a função de autoridade monetária e da função de autoridade de supervisão, ao mesmo tempo que permitiria ao Banco de Portugal continuar a financiar esta função regulatória.
translation_a: By separating supervision into an autonomous entity, it would increase independence in the pursuit of the respective function, in line with international best practices and the ECB's recommendations regarding the relationship between the function of monetary authority and the function of supervisory authority, while allowing the Bank of Portugal to continue to finance this regulatory function.
translation_b: By separating the supervision to an autonomous entity, it would increase the independence in the exercise of its function, in line with international best practices and the ECB’s recommendations on the relationship between the role of monetary authority and the role of supervisory authority, while allowing the Bank of Portugal to continue to finance this regulatory function.

text: Crear un programa de capacitación para formadores de policías y civiles tomadores de decisión en temas de seguridad, que responda un programa de formación que ha sido debidamente actualizado y con el apoyo de expertos de organismos internacionales en las distintas materias (Oficina de NNUU contra la Droga y el Delito y el Alto Comisionado de NNUU para los derechos humanos).
translation_a: Create a training program for police trainers and civilian decision-makers on security issues, which responds to a training program that has been duly updated and with the support of experts from international organizations in different areas (UN Office on Drugs and Crime and the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights).
translation_b: Create a training program for police trainers and civil security decision-makers, which responds to a training program that has been duly updated and with the support of experts from international bodies in the various subjects (UNODC Office Against Drugs and Crime and UNODC High Commissioner for Human Rights).

text: O abuso sexual de crianças também aumentou 12,9%.

text: Právě proto hodláme prosazovat, aby v rámci prevence kriminality (minimalizace příležitostí pro kriminalitu) vznikl i vzdělávací a informační systém občanů, protože každý z nás je potenciální obětí.

translation_b: This is why we intend to promote an educational and information system for citizens as part of the prevention of crime (minimising opportunities for crime), because each of us is a potential victim.
