translation_a: In relation to countries in other parts of the world (America, Africa, Australia and Oceania) - they are beyond our immediate vital interests.
translation_b: In relation to the countries of other parts of the world (America, Africa, Australia and Oceania), they are outside the area of our immediate vital interests.

text: Im Mittelpunkt internationaler Politik steht für uns der Mensch mit seiner Würde, seinen unveräußerlichen Rechten und seiner Freiheit.
translation_a: For us, the human being with his dignity, his inalienable rights and his freedom is at the center of international politics.
translation_b: At the center of international politics is for us the human being with his dignity, his inalienable rights and his freedom.

text: Udział Polski w przywracaniu stabilności i pokoju nie powinien przekraczać naszych realnych możliwości, powinien być za to powiązany z naszymi interesami politycznymi i gospodarczymi.
translation_a: Poland's participation in restoring stability and peace should not exceed our real capabilities, instead it should be linked to our political and economic interests.
translation_b: The participation of Poland in the restoration of stability and peace should not go beyond our real capabilities, but should be linked to our political and economic interests.

text: Chcemy dalej realizować wznowioną za rządów PO współpracę z Niemcami i Francją w ramach Trójkąta Weimarskiego, podtrzymując otwarty dialog opierający się na relacjach partnerskich i zaufaniu.
translation_a: We want to continue to implement the cooperation with Germany and France within the Weimar Triangle, which was resumed under the PO government, maintaining an open dialogue based on partnership and trust.
translation_b: We want to continue our renewed cooperation with Germany and France under the Weimar Triangle, whileining an open dialogue based on partnership and trust.

text: Nederland blijft zich inzetten voor de ruimte voor het maatschappelijk middenveld, het tegengaan van wet- en regelgeving die deze ruimte inperkt, het ondersteunen van onafhankelijke media en pers, en het beschermen van mensenrechtenverdedigers.
translation_a: The Netherlands remains committed to providing space for civil society, countering laws and regulations that restrict this space, supporting independent media and press, and protecting human rights defenders.
translation_b: The Netherlands continues its commitment to the space for civil society, counteracting laws and regulations that restrict this space, supporting independent media and press, and protecting human rights defenders.

text: Înseamnă că, zi de zi, unul dintre obiectivele majore al partidului trebuie să fie acela de a ţine naţiunea unită şi nu divizată, de a găsi mereu punctele care-i unesc pe cetăţenii moldoveni şi nu de a le accentua şi alimenta pe acelea care îi despart.
translation_a: It means that, day after day, one of the major objectives of the party must be to keep the nation united and not divided, to always find the points that unite Moldovan citizens and not to accentuate and fuel those that divide them.
translation_b: It means that, day by day, one of the major goals of the party must be to keep the nation united and not divided, to always find the points that unite Moldovan citizens and not to emphasize and feed those that divide them.

text: Mais do que apenas compatível com a inserção da economia brasileira no cenário internacional, o fortalecimento do mercado intemo proporcionará uma vantagem competitiva fundamental, ao permitir o aproveitamento de economias de escala e propiciar novos elementos de dinamismo e flexibilidade estratégica.
translation_a: More than just being compatible with the Brazilian economy's position on the international stage, strengthening the domestic market will provide a fundamental competitive advantage by allowing economies of scale to be exploited and providing new elements of dynamism and strategic flexibility.
translation_b: More than just compatible with the insertion of the Brazilian economy in the international scene, the strengthening of the intemo market will provide a fundamental competitive advantage, allowing the exploitation of economies of scale and provide new elements of dynamism and strategic flexibility.

text: Met hulp van familie, buren en anderen kan dat ook.
translation_a: With help from family, neighbors and others, it can be done.
translation_b: With the help of family, neighbors and others.

text: Η θέση μας αυτή δεν ισοδυναμεί με την αποδοχή της σημερινής κατάστασης στο δημόσιο τομέα.
translation_a: Our position is not tantamount to accepting the current situation in the public sector.
translation_b: Our position is not equivalent to accepting the current situation in the public sector.

text: Der Abzug deutscher Kampftruppen hat begonnen.
translation_a: The withdrawal of German combat troops has begun.
translation_b: The withdrawal of German troops has begun.

text: Wanneer een staat tegenover de eigen bevolking de verantwoordelijkheid tot bescherming niet kan of wil opnemen, neemt de internationale gemeenschap die verantwoordelijkheid over met een VN-mandaat.
translation_a: When a state cannot or will not assume the responsibility to protect toward its own people, the international community takes over that responsibility with a UN mandate.
translation_b: When a State cannot or wishes to assume responsibility for protection of its own people, the international community assumes that responsibility with a UN mandate.

text: Om spin-offs te faciliteren,hebben bedrijvenzones en -centra de nodige voorzieningen om deze een startkans tegeven zonder administratieve overhead.
translation_a: To facilitate spin-offs,business zones and centers have the necessary facilities to give them a start-up opportunity without administrative overhead.
translation_b: To facilitate spin-offs, business zones and centres have the necessary facilities to provide them with a start-up opportunity without administrative overhead.

text: Zbliżone znaczenie będziemy przypisywać stosunkom polsko-francuskim.
translation_a: We will attribute a similar importance to Polish-French relations.
translation_b: We will pay close attention to the Polish-French relations.

text: L’economia italiana si basa su due pilastri fondamentali: la manifattura ed il risparmio.
translation_a: The Italian economy is based on two basic pillars: manufacturing and savings.
translation_b: The Italian economy is based on two pillars: manufacturing and savings.

text: Liberi da ogni conformismo, da ogni meschinità, da ogni pegno da pagare alle oligarchie costituite.
translation_a: Free from all conformity, from all pettiness, from all pledges to be paid to the established oligarchies.
translation_b: Free from all conformism, from all meschinity, from every bond to be paid to the established oligarchies.

text: Quando però un aeroporto sopravvive solo grazie all’indotto portato da una compagniaaerea low cost, che fa scalo in quell’aeroporto solo perché è il gestore stesso o addirittural’ente pubblico a finanziarlo con vari meccanismi come ad esempio il co-marketing (ma cisono vari meccanismi che permettono alle compagnie aeree di ricevere finanziamentidiretti – co-marketing-o indiretti – sconti sulle tariffe aeroportuali -da parte di Entipubblici o dai gestori aeroportuali), allora è evidente che si è di fronte a una distorsione delmercato non sostenibile a lungo.
translation_a: When, however, an airport survives only thanks to the inducement brought by a low-cost airline, which stops over at that airport only because it is the operator itself or even the public body that finances it through various mechanisms such as co-marketing (but there are various mechanisms that allow airlines to receive direct financing-co-marketing-or indirect financing-discounts on airport fees-from public bodies or airport operators), then it is clear that we are faced with a distortion of the market that is not sustainable for long.
translation_b: But when an airport survives only thanks to the induction brought by a low-cost airline, which stops at that airport only because it is the operator itself or even public entity to finance it with various mechanisms such as co-marketing (but there are various mechanisms that allow airlines to receive direct funding – co-marketing – or indirect – discounts on airport rates – from Entipubblici or airport managers), then it is obvious that you are facing a market distortion not sustainable in the long run.

text: Infine, ma non è l’ultima delle priorità, la politica deve recuperare autorevolezza, promuovere il rinnovamento, ridurre i suoi costi e la sua invadenza in ambiti che non le competono.
translation_a: Finally, but not the last of the priorities, politics needs to regain authority, promote renewal, and reduce its costs and intrusiveness in areas where it does not belong.
translation_b: Finally, but not the last of the priorities, policy must regain its authority, promote renewal, reduce its costs and its invasion in areas that do not compete with it.

text: Promouvoir et développer l’économie de la cybersécurité dans les domaines suivants :
translation_a: Promote and develop the cybersecurity economy in the following areas:
translation_b: Promote and develop the cybersecurity economy in the following areas:

text: Para facilitar estas medidas se establecerán deducciones fiscales que incentiven la implantación.
translation_a: To facilitate these measures, tax deductions will be established to encourage implementation.
translation_b: To facilitate these measures, tax deductions will be established that encourage implementation.

text: Budeme pokračovat ve zvyšování veřejných výdajů na školství a kulturu.
translation_a: We will continue to increase public spending on education and culture.
translation_b: We will continue to increase public spending on education and culture.

text: Дело чести любого политика — уйти из власти в тот момент, когда выяснится, что он не справляется со взятыми на себя обязательствами.
translation_a: It is a matter of honor for any politician to leave power the moment it becomes clear that he or she is failing to live up to his or her commitments.
translation_b: It is a matter of honour for any politician to step out of power when it turns out that he fails to meet his commitments.

text: В результате прибыль олигархов в 400 с лишним раз больше того, что получает вся наша страна от эксплуатации природных ресурсов.
translation_a: As a result, the profits of the oligarchs are more than 400 times what our entire country gets from the exploitation of natural resources.
translation_b: As a result, the profits of the oligarchs are 400 times more than what our entire country receives from the exploitation of natural resources.

text: Jesteśmy za tym aby każdy świadomie, dobrowolnie na własne ryzyko podejmował decyzję czy chce należeć do drugiego filaru i część składki przekazywać do OFE, czy całą składkę pozostawić w ZUS.
translation_a: We are in favor of everyone consciously, voluntarily, at their own risk, deciding whether they want to belong to the second pillar and transfer part of their contribution to the OFE, or leave the entire contribution in the Social Security.
translation_b: We are in favor of everyone consciously, voluntarily, at their own risk, to decide whether they want to belong to the second pillar and transfer a part of the contribution to the OFE, or leave the entire contribution to the ZUS.

text: Consideriamo, inoltre, il nostro territorio indisponibile per il deposito e il transito di armi nucleari, batteriologiche e chimiche nonché per installazioni e addestramenti che ledano la salute degli italiani.
translation_a: We also consider our territory unavailable for the storage and transit of nuclear, bacteriological and chemical weapons as well as for installations and trainings that harm the health of Italians.
translation_b: We also consider our territory unavailable for the storage and transit of nuclear, bacteriological and chemical weapons as well as for installations and training that harm the health of Italians.

text: Als Nederlanders horen ze er volledig bij.
translation_a: As Dutch people, they fully belong.
translation_b: The Dutch are fully involved.

text: Wir werden uns international dafür einsetzen, Strompreissubventionen abzubauen.
translation_a: We will work internationally to remove electricity price subsidies.
translation_b: We will work internationally to reduce electricity price subsidies.

text: Noi ştim că numai concurenţa liberă şi loială este cea care stimulează şi mobilizează energiile, care descătuşează imaginaţia şi iniţiativa, care îi face pe oameni să se autodepăşească şi care pe o asemenea cale conduce la bunăstare.
translation_a: We know that it is only free and fair competition that stimulates and mobilises energies, that unleashes imagination and initiative, that makes people excel themselves and that in this way leads to wealth.
translation_b: We know that it is only free and fair competition that stimulates and mobilizes energies, that unleashes imagination and initiative, that makes people overcome themselves and that thus leads to well-being.

text: Desaparecería, pues, la actual distinción entre tipo reducido (10%) y tipo súper-reducido (4%).
translation_a: The current distinction between the reduced rate (10%) and the super-reduced rate (4%) would therefore disappear.
translation_b: Therefore, the current distinction between reduced rate (10%) and super-reduced rate (4%) would disappear.

text: Per questo una valorizzazione moderna che tuteli pienamente e insieme promuova è la sfida che ci pone il nostro tempo.
translation_a: Therefore, a modern valorization that fully protects and at the same time promotes is the challenge of our time.
translation_b: Therefore, a modern appreciation that fully protects and promotes it is the challenge that our time poses to us.

text: Es ist unsere Pflicht, jedem Kind in Österreich die Neugier und Freude am Lernen zu fördern.
translation_a: It is our duty to foster the curiosity and joy of learning in every child in Austria.
translation_b: It is our duty to promote the curiosity and joy of learning for every child in Austria.

text: Allo stesso tempo, si dovrà valorizzare e difendere la buona cooperazione, combattendo però le cooperative spurie che non rispettano i principi della concorrenza leale e utilizzano contratti pirata per praticare dumping contrattuale.
translation_a: At the same time, good cooperation should be valued and defended, while combating spurious cooperatives that do not respect the principles of fair competition and use pirate contracts to practice contract dumping.
translation_b: At the same time, good cooperation will have to be valued and defended, but it will also be combated by spies cooperatives that do not respect the principles of fair competition and use pirated contracts to practice contractual dumping.

text: Les aéroports régionaux sont confrontés quotidiennement à la législation européenne qui ne prend pas encore assez en compte leur réalité et leur développement.
translation_a: Regional airports are confronted on a daily basis with European legislation that does not yet take sufficient account of their reality and development.
translation_b: Regional airports are faced daily with European legislation that does not yet adequately take into account their reality and development.

text: Le pouvoir judiciaire ne doit pas être au service du pouvoir exécutif, ni constituer le relais et l’orchestre de la démocratie d’opinion.
translation_a: The judiciary should not be at the service of the executive, nor should it be the relay and orchestra of the democracy of opinion.
translation_b: The judiciary must not be at the service of the executive, nor should it constitute the relay and orchestra of the democracy of opinion.

text: Prevalece o desejo de guardar reservas para situações futuras ainda mais aflitivas.
translation_a: The desire to save reserves for even more distressing future situations prevails.
translation_b: The desire to keep reserves for even more afflictive future situations prevails.

text: As regras de uma sociedade e o seu ambiente institucional são determinantes de primeira ordem do desenvolvimento econômico e social das nações.
translation_a: The rules of a society and its institutional environment are key determinants of the economic and social development of nations.
translation_b: The rules of a society and its institutional environment are primary determinants of the economic and social development of nations.

text: ODS tomuto zvratu bude bránit, neboť je přesvědčena, že „postátnění“ energetiky je vstupenkou do světa nedostatku a mizerné kvality za vysoké ceny.
translation_a: ODS will prevent this reversal, as it is convinced that the """"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""post-statisation"""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""" of the energy sector is a ticket to a world of scarcity and poor quality at high prices.
translation_b: ODS will prevent this reversal, as it is convinced that the “dumping” of energy is a ticket to a world of shortage and miserable quality at high prices.

text: Але ми не зможемо змінити Україну, якщо не змінимося самі, не змінимо свого ставлення до власного життя і до життя держави.
translation_a: But we cannot change Ukraine unless we change ourselves, unless we change our attitude to our own lives and to the life of the state.
translation_b: But we cannot change Ukraine if we do not change ourselves, if we do not change our attitude to our own life and to the life of the state.

text: За допомогою економічних важелів держава повинна здійснювати макроекономічне регулювання господарство.
translation_a: The state should use economic levers to regulate the economy macroeconomically.
translation_b: With the help of economic leverage, the state must carry out macroeconomic regulation of the economy.

text: Za obèany nad 58 let je nebudou muset platit vùbec.
translation_a: Citizens over 58 will not have to pay them at all.
translation_b: People over the age of 58 will not have to pay.

text: Вместе с тем, нынешний статус госпредприятий превращает их в постоянно действующий генератор инфляции и инструмент саморазрушения экономического потенциала общества.
translation_a: At the same time, the current status of state-owned enterprises turns them into a permanent generator of inflation and an instrument of self-destruction of the economic potential of society.
translation_b: At the same time, the current status of state-owned enterprises turns them into a permanent generator of inflation and an instrument of self-destruction of the economic potential of society.

text: L'attuale guerra di sanzioni va contro gli interessi del nostro Paese.
translation_a: The current sanctions war goes against our country's interests.
translation_b: The current war of sanctions is against the interests of our country.

text: Se pagará un ingreso ciudadano a la niñez (INCINI) para todo los niños y niñas hasta los 18 años, administrado por las madres o quien se halle a cargo y cuyo beneficio será graduado según la edad.
translation_a: A citizen's income for children (INCINI) will be paid for all boys and girls up to 18 years of age, administered by the mothers or whoever is in charge and whose benefit will be graduated according to age.
translation_b: A citizen's childhood income (INCINI) will be paid for all children up to the age of 18, administered by the mothers or whoever is in charge and whose benefit will be graduated according to age.

text: Δάνειο ιδιωτών (στεγαστικό, προσωπικό-καταναλωτικό) για το οποίο έχει ήδη αποπληρωθεί το κεφάλαιο, συν ένα εύλογο κέρδος, αυτό να διαγράφεται.
translation_a: Private loan (housing, personal-consumer) for which the principal has already been repaid, plus a reasonable profit, this to be written off.
translation_b: A private loan (housing, personal-consumer) for which the capital has already been repayed, plus a reasonable profit, this shall be discarded.

text: Wir wollen bessere Leistungen für alle, in der Spitze wie in der Breite.
translation_a: We want better services for everyone, at the top and across the board.
translation_b: We want better performance for all, at the top as well as at the breadth.

text: Z drugiej jednak strony, nie udało nam się stworzyć większego współdziałania krajów Europy Środkowo-Wschodniej.
translation_a: On the other hand, however, we have not been able to create greater interaction among the countries of Central and Eastern Europe.
translation_b: On the other hand, we have failed to create greater cooperation between the countries of Central and Eastern Europe.

text: Ils s’engagent résolument en faveur d’un accès équitable pour tous les internautes à Internet, et en faveur d'une plus grande concurrence sur le net, avec une différenciation entre le métier de fournisseurs d’accès et celui de fournisseurs de contenus.
translation_a: They are resolutely committed to fair access for all Internet users, and to greater competition on the net, with a differentiation between access providers and content providers.
translation_b: They are firmly committed to equal access for all Internet users, and to greater competition on the Internet, with a distinction between the business of access providers and that of content providers.

text: Les personnes âgées – qui ont contribué au financement de la sécurité sociale durant toute leur vie - sont trop souvent perçues comme recevant davantage qu’elles n’offrent (pensions, soins de santé…).
translation_a: Older people - who have contributed to the financing of social security throughout their lives - are too often perceived as receiving more than they offer (pensions, healthcare, etc.).
translation_b: Older people – who have contributed to social security financing throughout their lives – are too often perceived as receiving more than they offer (pension, health care, etc.).

text: Рух обстоює право підприємств об’єднуватись на добровільній основі в асоціації, концерни, консорціуми та інші господарські об’єднання, в тому числі з закордонними підприємствами, за умови гарантії економічногосуверенітету України, а також створювати чи брати пайову участь за рахунок власних коштів у капіталі інших підприємств і господарських об’єднань.
translation_a: The Movement defends the right of enterprises to unite on a voluntary basis in associations, concerns, consortia and other business associations, including with foreign enterprises, subject to the guarantee of Ukraine's economic sovereignty, as well as to create or participate in equity at their own expense in the capital of other enterprises and business associations.
translation_b: The movement defends the right of enterprises to associate on a voluntary basis in associations, corporations, consortia and other economic associations, including with foreign enterprises, subject to the guarantee of economic sovereignty of Ukraine, as well as to create or participate in equity at the expense of own funds in the capital of other enterprises and economic associations.

text: Wprowadzimy takie zasady nadzoru nad bankami, które zagwarantują, że nasze państwo stać będzie na straży interesów obywateli a nie instytucji finansowych.
translation_a: We will introduce such rules for the supervision of banks that will ensure that our state will uphold the interests of citizens and not financial institutions.
translation_b: We will introduce rules of banking supervision that will ensure that our state is in the interests of its citizens and not of financial institutions.

text: Une nouvelle répartition des tâches a été opérée sous cette législature pour libérer les capacités policières par l’élargissement des compétences des agents de sécurité dans les transports en commun, les agents de sécurité et les gardiens de la paix.
translation_a: Under this legislature, a new division of tasks has been introduced to free up police capacity by extending the remit of public transport security officers, security guards and peacekeepers.
translation_b: A new assignment of tasks was carried out during this legislature to unleash police capabilities through the expansion of the powers of public transport security officers, security officers and peacekeepers.

text: Jeopolitik konumu itibariyle çatışmaların, kaos ve kargaşanın odağında bulunan Türkiye’nin etrafındaki gelişmelerin dünyayı ve dünyanın en stratejik bölgesinde yer alan Türkiye’yi ne denli tehdit ettiğinin farkında olan Milliyetçi Hareket Partisi; siyaset sahnesin-de yer aldığı geçmiş kırk dokuz yılda Türkiye’yi ve insanlığı tehdit eden gelişmeleri kimsenin henüz algılayamadığı dönemlerde önceden görerek milli menfaatler doğrultusunda kararlı duruşunu ortaya koymuştur.
translation_a: The Nationalist Movement Party, which is aware of how the developments around Turkey, which is at the center of conflicts, chaos and turmoil due to its geopolitical position, threatens the world and Turkey, which is located in the most strategic region of the world; In the past forty-nine years that it has been on the political scene, the Nationalist Movement Party has foreseen the developments that threaten Turkey and humanity in periods when no one could perceive them yet and has demonstrated its determined stance in line with national interests.
translation_b: The Nationalist Movement Party, which is aware of how much the developments around Turkey, which are at the center of conflict, chaos and chaos in terms of its geopolitical position, threaten the world and Turkey, which is located in the most strategic region of the world, has shown its determined stance in the direction of national interests during the past forty-nine years in which it is on the political scene, and the developments that have threatened Turkey and humanity in periods no one can yet perceive.

text: Історично склалося так, що Україна стала колискою нової єврейської культури, євреї зробили великий внесок у розвиток багатьох галузей життя українського народу.
translation_a: Historically, Ukraine became the cradle of a new Jewish culture, and Jews made a great contribution to the development of many areas of Ukrainian life.
translation_b: Historically, Ukraine has become the cradle of a new Jewish culture, the Jews have made a great contribution to the development of many branches of the life of the Ukrainian people.

text: Підвищення відповідальності за злочини чи злочинну бездіяльність посадових осіб держави, прокурорів, правоохоронців зі скороченням чисельності та підвищенням оплати праці.
translation_a: Increased liability for crimes or criminal omissions of state officials, prosecutors, and law enforcement officers with a reduction in their number and an increase in their salaries.
translation_b: Increase responsibility for crimes or criminal inaction of officials of the state, prosecutors, law enforcement officers with reduction of number and increase of wages.

text: Daartoe moeten zij de mogelijkheid blijven hebben om private ontwikkelaars te dwingen een deel van hun grote bouwprojecten te reserveren voor betaalbaar wonen.
translation_a: To that end, they should continue to have the ability to force private developers to set aside a portion of their major construction projects for affordable housing.
translation_b: To do this, they should continue to be able to force private developers to reserve part of their large construction projects for affordable housing.

text: Określimy przeznaczenie przychodów z prywatyzacji na istotne dla obywateli cele, w tym np. zwiększenie wpływów na fundusz rezerwy demograficznej, by zabezpieczyć emerytury.
translation_a: We will determine the allocation of privatization proceeds for purposes that are important to citizens, including, for example, increasing revenues to the demographic reserve fund to secure pensions.
translation_b: We will determine how the revenue from privatization will be allocated to the objectives relevant to citizens, including, for example, increasing revenues to the demographic reserve fund to secure pensions.

text: Fica, portanto, confirmado que, se uma reestruturação de dívida pública sob jurisdição nacional não é alcançada por acordo, existe o direito legal da sua imposição pelo Estado.
translation_a: It is therefore confirmed that if a public debt restructuring under national jurisdiction is not reached by agreement, there is a legal right for the state to impose it.
translation_b: It is therefore confirmed that if a restructuring of public debt under national jurisdiction is not achieved by agreement, there is a legal right to be imposed by the State.

text: Promover inversiones que sirvan para construir nuevas escuelas y mejorar la infraestructura de las ya existentes con agencias específicamente creadas para monitorear licitaciones, adjudicaciones, gastos y cumplimiento de las fechas.
translation_a: Promote investments that serve to build new schools and improve the infrastructure of existing schools with agencies specifically created to monitor bids, awards, expenditures and compliance with deadlines.
translation_b: Promote investments that serve to build new schools and improve the infrastructure of existing ones with agencies specifically set up to monitor tenders, adjudications, expenses and compliance with deadlines.

text: Tocmai din această cauză, pentru următorii patru ani România are nevoie de un program clar și realizabil.
translation_a: This is precisely why Romania needs a clear and achievable programme for the next four years.
translation_b: For this reason, for the next four years, Romania needs a clear and feasible program.

text: Sosyal yardımların kapsamı ve etkinliği geliştireceğiz, yardımların dağıtilmasında adalet sağlayacağız.
translation_a: We will improve the coverage and effectiveness of social assistance and ensure fairness in the distribution of aid.
translation_b: We will improve the scope and effectiveness of social aid and ensure fair distribution of aid.

text: Рух сподівається, що росіяни, які живуть в Українській державі, залишатимуться й далі прихильними співучасниками теперішнього українського національного відродження.

text: УКРП вважає, що ефективним засобом нейтралізації імперських зазіхань Росії може стати рішуче і принципове протистояння цим зазіханням, а не принизливі поступки та вмовляння Росії з боку ВР України і президента, які часом переходять в рабське блазнювання.
translation_a: The UCIPR believes that an effective means of neutralizing Russia's imperial encroachments can be a resolute and principled opposition to these encroachments, rather than humiliating concessions and persuasion of Russia by the Verkhovna Rada and the President, which sometimes turn into slavish buffoonery.
translation_b: The Ukrainian People’s Party believes that an effective means of neutralizing the imperial abuses of Russia can be a decisive and principled confrontation with these abuses, rather than humiliating concessions and pledges to Russia by the Ukrainian People’s Republic and the President, which sometimes go into slave blasphemy.

text: Politica fiscală este mijlocul creşterii economice sustenabile, aşadar trebuie să fie stabilă, clară şi transparentă.
translation_a: Fiscal policy is the means to sustainable economic growth, so it must be stable, clear and transparent.
translation_b: Fiscal policy is the means of sustainable economic growth, so it must be stable, clear and transparent.

text: Republikanizm, który odgrywał w ostatnich wiekach naszych dziejów wielką rolę te wartości stawiał wysoko.

translation_b: Republicanism, which has played a great role in the last centuries of our history, has highlighted these values.

translation_b: The president should not actively interfere in the work of the government.

text: Snížíme vývozy elektrické energie, především té, která je vyráběná pálením našeho uhlí.

translation_b: We will reduce our electricity exports, especially those produced by burning our coal.

translation_b: For those who are sober looking at the situation in the country and learned to understand who can be trusted and who can not.

text: Países em rota de convergência ou em crescimento acima da Europa e comparáveis em dimensão populacional com Portugal, como a Holanda e a Irlanda, têm esforços fiscais de 30% e 13%, respetivamente.

translation_b: Countries on a convergence or growth route above Europe and comparable in population size to Portugal, such as the Netherlands and Ireland, have tax efforts of 30% and 13%, respectively.
